passages.name: Investigate the pale shape amongst the rocks.
passages.content:
<<if $Body1Seen is "Not Played">>Moving closer to the scene, the man looks up, towards me.  //What's Aaron doing out here?// Is my first thought.

Aaron glances at the mass again, then back to me, motioning for me to come.

The well dressed woman continues to look down at the pale mass on the ground, a blank look with just a hint of shock in her features.  It's a look that I came to associate with people who had seen something horrible, and their mind is still trying to make sense of it.  

//Good luck with that.//  I think darkly.

A moment later, when I can see the shape better, it becomes gut wrenchingly obvious that the mass isn't just another dead fish, or some other bit of sea life, but is instead a pale and naked female body.

My mind instantly shifts gear, my eyes taking in everything in the immediate area, "Both of you should step back from the body, and don't touch anything."  //Why does it feel like I'm suddenly back in my element after leaving the force?//

//She was young, maybe in her mid twenties.//  I think, //Dark hair, but it covers her face, obscuring who she might have been.  Looks like a dislocated shoulder from the way her arm is twisted to one side.  She was in good shape, athletic, . . . //  I pause, my attention locked on her ankle, //An old scar, and a nasty one at that.  Might be something that can help identify who she was.// 

My eyes never leaving the body, I add, "Stay close, I'd like to ask you both some questions once I've had a chance to examine the body,"  My voice is firm and focused.

[img[images/shoreBody.jpg]]

Several paces away from the body, I pause, my eyes carefully going over every inch of the area surrounding the body for anything that seems out of place.  All I see are jagged rocks, small bits of driftwood a bit down the beach, and the water lapping at the rocks right beside the body.

It takes me several minutes to walk around the body, looking for anything that might explain how, or when, the body
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Body1Seen is "Not Played"]走近現場，那名男子抬起頭看向我。Aaron 在這裡做什麼？這是我第一個念頭。

Aaron 又瞥了一眼那團東西，然後轉向我，示意我過去。

那位穿著得體的女子繼續低頭看著地上那團蒼白的物體，臉上表情空洞，僅帶著一絲震驚。那是我在見過可怕事物、腦子還在試圖理解的人臉上常見的表情。

祝你好運。我陰鬱地想。

片刻之後，當我能更清楚地看到那形體時，令人反胃的事實變得顯而易見：那團東西不是另一條死魚，也不是什麼其他海洋生物，而是一具蒼白、赤裸的女性屍體。

我的思緒瞬間切換模式，眼睛掃視著附近區域的一切，「你們兩個都應該從屍體旁退開，不要碰任何東西。」為什麼感覺我離開警隊後，突然又回到了自己的本行？

她很年輕，也許二十五六歲。我想著，深色頭髮，但頭髮蓋住了她的臉，讓人看不清她是誰。從她手臂扭曲到一側的樣子來看，肩膀似乎脫臼了。她身材很好，有運動員的體格，……我停頓了一下，注意力鎖定在她的腳踝上，一道舊傷疤，而且相當嚴重。這或許有助於辨識她的身份。

我的目光始終沒有離開屍體，補充道：「待在附近，等我檢查完屍體後，想問你們兩人一些問題。」我的聲音堅定而專注。

在離屍體幾步遠的地方，我停下腳步，仔細審視屍體周圍區域的每一寸土地，尋找任何不尋常之處。我只看到嶙峋的岩石、沙灘下方一點的零散浮木，以及拍打著屍體旁邊岩石的海水。

我花了幾分鐘繞著屍體走了一圈，尋找任何可能解釋這具屍體是如何、或何時來到萬頓灣岸邊這些岩石中的線索。

[ELSE]我後退一步，再次審視現場，仔細觀察細節，同時思考如何最好地進行下一步。

[/IF][靠近些看個仔細。]
[詢問那名女子。]
[詢問 Aaron。]
或
[結束調查並離開。]

passages.name: DeformedDocks
passages.content:
<<if $GooCounter is 0 and $SailorGoo is "Played">>A short distance a head of me, I see a figure, their heavy jacket pulled tightly around themselves and a wide brimmed hat on their head.

The person doesn't seem to notice me as they walk along the waterfront, dissappearing behind one of the buildings hear the docks.

[[Continue on my way.|the waterfront]]<<set $GooCounter += 1>><<elseif $GooCounter is 1 and $SailorGoo is "Played">>A short distance a head of me, I see a figure, their heavy jacket pulled tightly around themselves and a wide brimmed hat on their head.

The figure pauses half way across the street, turning towards me.  For a split second, I think I see a large tentacle where their mouth belongs, small tentacles surrounding it in a ring of writhing pink flesh.  In the time it takes me to blink, the figure has turned away from me.

The figure quickly continues across the street before disappearing behind one of the buildings hear the docks.

[[Continue on my way.|the waterfront]]<<set $GooCounter += 1>><<elseif $GooCounter is 2 and $SailorGoo is "Played">>I see a feminine figure standing at the nearest dock, facing towards me.  The figure's heavy jacket and wide brimmed hat have a slow but steady drip of water coming off them from the light rain.

My walk slows, unsure of the figure's intention.  

The figure doesn't have a shirt on, a pair of tentacles twitching and writhing from where her nipples should be visible, suction cups like an octopus' cover the tentacles from every conceivable angle.

Where a normal set of eyes should be, she instead has a pair of goat like eyes that stare at me.

I tremble at the sight, my hand going to the handle of my .38 Special.

The figure stands there for another heartbeat, then turns, walking quickly behind one of the buildings hear the docks.

I stand there in the cold rain for several more seconds, my heart pounding rapidly in my chest. 

[[Continue on my way.|the waterfront]]<<set $GooCounter

[ELSEIF $weaponChance lte 99][ELSE][/IF] 那身影非但沒有停下，反而毫不猶豫地轉向我。

我震驚地睜大了雙眼。眼前的生物幾乎不能稱之為人。牠的眼睛相對於頭部來說過於巨大，瞳孔混濁如乳。過寬的嘴裡似乎長滿了鋒利如刀的牙齒。我能看見的身體部分覆蓋著死灰般的蒼白皮膚。而牠胸前那對佔據主導地位的乳房，清楚地表明這是雌性。

我的思緒因眼前的景象而混亂，拒絕完全處理我所看到的一切。

在我意識到這個可憎之物移動之前，牠已經朝我衝了過來。牠身上那件如斗篷般、濕漉漉的拼湊皮革在移動時在身後翻騰。

牠的一隻手彎曲、向後收。我能在本該是指甲的地方看到長長的黑爪，而牠的手指之間似乎有某種薄膜，讓牠們看起來像青蛙一樣有蹼。

在最後一刻，我的求生本能猛然啟動。我踉蹌地側身閃避，牠的利爪擦過我的臉龐，近得我能感覺到牠的手掠過我的皮膚。

當我再次轉身面對這生物時，牠只是站在那裡，過薄的嘴唇上掛著一抹微笑，讓我頸後的寒毛直豎。

[我準備好自衛。]

passages.name: Slum 3
passages.content:

The sound repeats itself, more clear now that I am listening for it.  <<if $Depravity gte 7>>There’s no doubt to the carnal nature of the moan as the sound draws out for several seconds, changing pitch towards the end.  

My own body responds to the implications, feeling my breath quicken as a wave of arousal washes over me.

I take several steps towards the sound, looking from building to building as I try to figure out which house the sound may have come from.  //There’s nothing wrong with taking a peek, right?//  The thought would have been alien to me before arriving in Wanton Cove.  //I bet she’s wreathing under him, her legs spread wide as he plunges into her depths,//  My own knees feel weak, //Her cunt stretched wide around his massive cock,// I stumble at the thought, nearly falling in the muddy street.

A  cry of release cuts through the thunder like a hot knife through butter.  My own arousal spikes just short of orgasm in response, my breath coming in ragged gasps.

For several seconds, I struggle against the urge to shove my hands into my pants, to pleasure myself, but the chill rain running down the back of my neck quickly sobers those thoughts.

With a sigh of frustration, I get unsteadily back to my feet. <<elseif $Depravity gte 4>>If there was any doubt to the carnal nature of the moan before, its erased the moan stretches on for several seconds, reaching a high pitch cry at its end.  

My own sudden arousal distracts me for a few precious seconds, my urge to thrust my hands into my pants makes me weak in the knees.

I struggle with myself, part of me wanting to seke out the sound and gaze upon the aftermath of these stranger’s lovemaking, while the rest of me wants to flee the scene before someone spots me, and surmises my inne
passages.content_zh:
一聲響亮的呻吟充斥著空氣[IF $Day gte 5]，甚至蓋過了我周圍肆虐的暴風雨咆哮聲。[/IF]。我轉向聲音來源，仔細聆聽，試圖判斷聲音可能來自何處。

聲音再次響起，既然我正專注聆聽，現在聽得更清楚了。[IF $Depravity gte 7]毫無疑問，這呻吟帶著肉慾的本質，聲音持續了好幾秒，並在結尾時音調產生了變化。

我自己的身體對這暗示產生了反應，我感到呼吸加快，一股興奮感席捲了我。

我朝聲音方向走了幾步，目光在建築物間搜尋，試圖找出聲音可能來自哪間房子。偷看一眼沒什麼不對吧？這個想法在我來到萬頓灣之前會讓我覺得很陌生。我敢打賭她正在他身下扭動，雙腿大張，而他深深刺入她的深處。想到這裡，我自己的膝蓋都發軟了。她的陰戶被他巨大的陽具撐開，這個念頭讓我踉蹌了一下，差點跌倒在泥濘的街道上。

一聲釋放的叫喊劃過雷聲，如同熱刀切過奶油。我自己的興奮感隨之飆升，幾乎達到高潮，呼吸變得粗重而急促。

有好幾秒鐘，我掙扎著抵抗將手伸進褲子裡、自我滿足的衝動，但沿著我後頸流下的冰冷雨水很快讓我清醒了這些念頭。

帶著挫敗的嘆息，我不穩地重新站了起來。[ELSEIF $Depravity gte 4]如果之前對這呻吟的肉慾本質還有任何懷疑，當呻吟持續數秒、並在結尾達到高亢的哭喊時，這些懷疑也煙消雲散了。

我自己突如其來的興奮感讓我分神了好幾秒，那股想將手插入褲中的衝動讓我雙膝發軟。

我內心掙扎著，一部分的我想找出聲音來源，窺視這些陌生人做愛後的景象；而另一部分的我則想在有人發現我、並猜出我內心想法之前逃離現場。

一縷冰水沿著我的後頸流下，足以讓我清醒思緒，恢復理智。[ELSE]好好享受吧，我想著，覺得有些好笑，竟然有人在如此私密的事情上發出這麼大的聲響。[/IF]

[繼續我的路。]

passages.name: Dock3
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>I come upon the docks just as the rain seems to ease slightly.  Among the rain slick rocks, I can see something that appears slightly off.  <<if $SailorGoo is "Played">>There is little doubt in my mine what I’m about to see, the faint glow I detect is a none too subtle clue that this Is yet another bit of White Goo.  

One more step takes me far enough past a largish rock that I can see the source of the faint glow.  There, somewhat sheltered from the storm by the rock is a smallish puddle of the White Goo I have witnessed around the island before.

[[Continue on my way.|the waterfront]]
or
[[Investigate Further|G3]] <<else>>The faint glow draws me closer, like a moth to the flame.  I take a step to the side so I can see around the largish rock blocking my view.  

There, somewhat sheltered from the storm by the rock is a small puddle of some kind of luminescent White Goo.  

Curious, I move closer, nudging the substance with the tip of my boot.  The slime juggles slightly as I touch it, then seems to cling to my book as I pull back.  With a grimace, I wipe the tip of my boot on a convenient rock.

[[Continue on my way.|the waterfront]]
<<set $SailorGoo to "Played">><<endif>><<else>>The rocks near the water draw my attention.  Something not looking quite right.  At first, I think it’s just the way the light is striking the rocks, but upon closer examination, I realize that that doesn’t explain what I am seeing.

I move closer, realizing that whatever is near the rocks is giving off a faint glow.  <<if $SailorGoo is "Played">>//More of that White Goo.//  I think.  //What the hell is this stuff?//

[[Continue on my way.|the waterfront]]
or
[[Investigate Further|G3]]<<else>>//Peculiar.//  I think, leaning closer for a better look.  

I start to reach out, but quickly stop myself.  //No idea what that stuff is, no sense getting it on me just in case its dangerous.//  Instead, I stand back up, prodding the slime with my boot instead.
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]當我抵達碼頭時，雨勢似乎稍微減弱了。在雨水浸潤的岩石間，我瞥見某種不太對勁的東西。[IF $SailorGoo is "Played"]我心中幾乎已確定即將看見什麼——那隱約的微光是個再明顯不過的提示，這又是另一灘白色黏液。

再往前一步，我繞過一塊巨大岩石，終於看清微光的來源。在那裡，被岩石稍作遮蔽的避風處，積著一小灘我在島上曾見過的白色黏液。

[繼續前行。]
或
[進一步調查。][ELSE]那隱約的微光如飛蛾撲火般吸引我靠近。我側身一步，繞過擋住視線的巨大岩石。

岩石背風處，積著一灘發著微光的白色黏液。

好奇心驅使我湊近，用靴尖輕觸那團物質。黏液在我碰觸時微微晃動，當我收回腳時竟黏附在靴上。我皺著臉，順勢在旁邊的岩石上蹭淨靴尖。

[繼續前行。]
[/IF][ELSE]水邊的岩石引起了我的注意。某種東西看起來不太對勁。起初我以為是光線照射岩石的角度問題，但仔細觀察後，發現那無法解釋眼前的景象。

我走近些，意識到岩石附近的物體正散發著微弱光芒。[IF $SailorGoo is "Played"]又是那種白色黏液。我暗忖。這到底是什麼鬼東西？

[繼續前行。]
或
[進一步調查。][ELSE]真詭異。我邊想邊俯身細看。

我下意識伸手，又猛地停住。根本不知道那是什麼，萬一有危險，沾到身上就糟了。我直起身，改用靴尖戳了戳那團黏液。整灘黏液隨之晃動，觸感像果凍般彈顫，當我抽回腳時，它竟黏在靴底。

我皺著臉，將靴尖在地上摩擦，把那團物質抹在岩石上。

[繼續前行。]
[/IF][/IF]

passages.name: Trail8
passages.content:
A quiet falls over the forest.  The petter patter of raindrops falling through the canopy above fades away, the sounds of insects and animals in the underbrush dropping off one small sound at a time.  The change is so subtle that I nearly miss it entirely.

My boot makes a soft squelching sound in the muddy path I am walking along.

I can feel my muscles tightening, tensing as you search for any sign of danger.  I nearly jump when I feel something touch my arm.  Instinctively I jerk away from the sensation, my eyes going to the place I can feel the touch.  The touch does not change in anyway, it lingers, even though I can not see whatever it is.

Fearing something under my jacket, I quickly throw it off into the nearby underbrush, my free hand swipes at my arm where I still feel the thing, but I find nothing there.

Terribly unsettled by whatever is happening to me, I look at my arm.  //This is madness,//  Like a lover's touch, I can feel a sensation like fingertips brushing across my skin.  Even as I watch, I can see neat rows of goosebumps breaking out across my skin only in the places the phantasmal touch comes in contact with.

I find myself rooted to the spot, unable to will myself to move as i watch the rows of goosebumps move up and down my arm.

In some dark and long forgotten corner of my mind, I can hear a soft whisper, a playful giggle coming from an infinite void intent to swallow the sound.

My wrist turns, a gentle touch rotating it so my hand faces upward.  If I wasn't looking at it happen, I'd never believe it was true.  I can feel those fingers trace across my wrist toward my hand, then my fingers part, I can even see the skin move as the ghostly hand takes hold of my own, intertwining it's fingers with my own.  

"The fuck?"  My own shaken voice breaks the deafening silence around me.

Like someone flipped on a light switch, the world around me comes alive again.  The sounds of water dripping past leaves, insects and animals, all
passages.content_zh:
森林陷入一片寂靜。雨滴穿過頭頂樹冠的淅瀝聲逐漸消散，灌木叢中的蟲鳴獸語也一點一點消逝。這變化如此細微，我幾乎完全沒察覺。

靴子在泥濘小徑上踩出輕微的噗嗤聲。

我感覺肌肉逐漸繃緊，全身戒備地掃視任何危險跡象。當某物觸及手臂時，我差點驚跳起來。本能地猛然抽身，視線投向那被觸碰的位置。觸感並未消失，它持續滯留著，儘管我什麼也看不見。

擔心是外套底下有東西，我迅速將外套甩進旁邊的灌木叢，空著的手猛掃仍殘留觸感的手臂——卻什麼也沒摸到。

這詭異的狀況令我極度不安，我盯著自己的手臂。真是瘋了。如同愛人的撫觸，我能感覺到指尖輕拂過肌膚的觸感。即便親眼看著，仍可見整齊排列的雞皮疙瘩，精準地沿著那無形觸碰的軌跡在皮膚上浮現。

我發現自己僵在原地，眼睜睜看著成排的雞皮疙瘩沿手臂上下移動，卻無法動彈。

在腦海某個黑暗遺忘的角落裡，我聽見輕柔的低語，以及來自無盡虛空、意圖吞噬一切聲響的嬉笑。

我的手腕被輕柔轉動，手掌向上翻轉。若非親眼所見，我絕不會相信這是真的。能感覺到那些手指從手腕滑向掌心，接著我的手指被分開——甚至能看見皮膚被無形的手握住、十指交扣時的細微牽動。

「搞什麼？」我顫抖的聲音打破了周遭震耳欲聾的寂靜。

如同有人突然打開開關，周圍的世界瞬間恢復生機。水滴滑過葉片、蟲鳴、動物窸窣——所有聲音頃刻回歸，彷彿從未消失。

我仍盯著自己的手，看著皮膚上的雞皮疙瘩緩緩消退。

剛才那到底是什麼？

我伸手從灌木叢中撿回長外套，竭力無視自己顫抖不止的手。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: FinalBookEnd
passages.content:
I feel dizzy when I open my eyes.  The room is cast in shadow, the dim light coming in through the closed window of my room giving no indication of how long I may have been out for.

Rolling to my side, I realize that I'm in my bed, //Did Tanya help me to the bed, close the window?//  It takes me a few seconds to piece together what happened, but once I do, I bolt upright in bed.  The sudden motion sending a wave of nausia through me.  I force it back down, looking towards the table.

//The book is gone,//  There's a cold finality to the thought.

I look around the room, seeing nothing else out of place.  Eventually I stand up, noticing my .38 Special still sitting on the floor where I left it, I pick it up and slip it back into its holster.  Then I look towards the table.  Where the book was sitting, I can see a slip of paper resting there.  

Approaching the table, I realize that my eyes have mostly recovered from the lightning strike earlier as I pick up the note.

//I'm sorry.

The Al Azif may hold the key to learning what has been happening to both of us, maybe even curing my condition.  When you blacked out, I moved you to the bed, but when I tried to wake you I couldn't.  I know a little bit about what is happening here, and I think I can learn the rest through the Al Azif, or at least enough to change me back.

I know you're going to be mad that I took the book.  I know you are going to look for me.  But its a waste of time, I know a place where I won't be found by anyone.  I promise, once I'm able to cure myself, I'll bring the book back to you and help you too.

~Tom//

Anger wells up inside of me, but with no obvious outlet, it quickly becomes frustration, //Guess this means she won't be downstairs.//

I slam my fist down on the desk and feel the anger fading into dissappointment, //I come here to help, and this is the thanks I get.//  Picking the paper up, I crumple it into a ball, then throw it against the wall.  I nearly start to le
passages.content_zh:
睜開眼睛時我感到一陣暈眩。房間籠罩在陰影中，從我房間緊閉的窗戶透進的昏暗光線，完全無法判斷我究竟昏迷了多久。

翻身側躺時，我意識到自己正躺在床上。是Tanya幫我躺上床、關上窗戶的嗎？我花了幾秒鐘拼湊起發生的事，但一旦想起來，我立刻從床上彈坐起身。這突然的動作讓我湧起一陣噁心感。我強壓下不適，望向桌子。

那本書不見了。這個念頭帶著冰冷的終結感。

我環顧房間，沒發現其他異樣。最後我站起身，注意到我的.38特製手槍仍放在我原先留下的地板上。我撿起它，滑回槍套中。然後我再次望向桌子。原本放書的位置，現在躺著一張紙條。

走近桌子時，我意識到自己的視力已從先前的閃電衝擊中大致恢復，便拾起了那張字條。

對不起。

《阿爾·阿吉夫》或許掌握著解開發生在你我身上之事的關鍵，甚至可能治癒我的狀況。你昏過去時，我將你移到床上，但試圖喚醒你卻失敗了。我對這裡發生的事略知一二，我相信能透過《阿爾·阿吉夫》學到其餘部分，或至少學到足夠讓我變回原樣的知識。

我知道你會因為我拿走書而生氣。我知道你會找我。但這是浪費時間，我知道一個任何人都找不到我的地方。我保證，一旦我能治癒自己，我會把書帶回來給你，也會幫助你。

~Tom

怒火在我心中翻騰，但由於沒有明確的發洩對象，它迅速轉為沮喪。看來這意味著她不會在樓下了。

我一拳捶在書桌上，感受憤怒逐漸褪成失望。我來這裡是為了幫忙，這就是我得到的感謝。我抓起紙條，揉成一團扔向牆壁。幾乎要轉身離開房間時，我改變了主意，反而撿回紙團，將它攤平撫順，摺好後塞進我長外套的內袋裡。

[繼續。]

passages.name: HighTaintEnd
passages.content:
I pull my long coat around myself, if only to cover my fully female body from myself for a fleeting moment.

Mercifully, I begin to hear something.  Something that momentarily draws my attention away from my physical changes.

The sound is somewhere between a hum and a chant, with soft moans of arousal punctuating the drone at the very edge of my ability to hear.

I focus on the sound, using it to anchor myself so I do not have to think about my female form too much.

I begin to turn in a slow circle, trying to figure out from which direction the sound might be coming from, but it proves difficult.  I've nearly finished turning in a full circle when I notice a patch of the fog that seems darker than the rest.  Not for lack of fog, but as if something is pulling the depth and substance from the fog.

My curiosity winning out over my caution, I take a few steps toward the darkness.  I quickly stop short when I realize that I'm merely looking at that black //nothing// from before.  

Turning back toward where I had come from, I stagger backward in alarm when I find the void mere inches from my face.  

Before I can fall, I hear the sound of my boot striking wood.  Reaching out quickly, I close my hand around a thick length of rope.  I look around frantically, trying to orient myself again only to realize that I'm somehow standing on the rope bridge from before, or perhaps another like it.

While it only took a single step back to end up on the bridge, it somehow takes me a dozen paces before my feet touch the brown gray soil of the land once more.  

I look from side to side, trying to spot the blackness again.  It feels like my head is spinning in circles as I try to make sense of my situation, I question my sanity, I question whether this is a dream, and more than anything I feel deep down that I'm not understanding something profound in this moment, like I'm the alien in a place that was never intended to host a being of my limited understanding.
passages.content_zh:
我將長外套拉攏裹住自己，哪怕只是為了讓自己短暫地避開這具完全女性化的身軀。

謝天謝地，我開始聽見某種聲音。某種暫時將我的注意力從身體變化上引開的聲響。

那聲音介於低吟與誦唱之間，夾雜著情慾的輕柔呻吟，斷續點綴在嗡鳴聲的邊緣，勉強可聞。

我專注於那聲音，用它作為錨點，好讓自己不必過多思考這副女性形體。

我開始緩緩轉身，試圖判斷聲音來自哪個方向，但這很困難。就在我快要轉完一圈時，我注意到一片比其他區域更暗的霧。並非因為霧氣稀薄，而像是某種東西正從霧中汲取深度與實質。

好奇心戰勝了謹慎，我朝那片黑暗邁了幾步。但當我意識到自己看到的只是先前那片虛無的漆黑時，便猛地停住腳步。

我轉身想退回原處，卻驚恐地踉蹌後退——那片虛空竟離我的臉只有幾英寸遠。

在我跌倒之前，我聽見靴子撞擊木頭的聲響。迅速伸手一抓，我握住了一截粗繩。我慌亂地環顧四周，試圖重新辨識方位，卻發現自己不知何時站在了之前的繩橋上——或者另一座相似的橋上。

雖然只退了一步就踏上橋，但我卻花了十幾步才讓雙腳再次觸及這片棕灰色土地。

我左右張望，試圖再次找到那片黑暗。試圖理解自身處境時，我感到天旋地轉。我質疑自己的神智，質疑這是否是一場夢，而最深層的感受是：此刻我未能領悟某種深奧的事物——彷彿我成了異類，身處一個從未打算容納我這般理解力有限的存在之地。正是這種認知最令我顫慄：無論這裡發生什麼，都遠超我的理解範疇，而我將再也無法以同樣的方式看待世界。這還是我的世界嗎？抑或已是別處？

[繼續。]

passages.name: MidTaintEnd
passages.content:
Pulling my long coat around myself, if only to hide the changes that have happened from myself.

Mercifully, I begin to hear something.  Something that momentarily draws my attention away from my physical changes.

The sound is somewhere between a hum and a chant, with soft moans of arousal punctuating the drone at the very edge of my ability to hear.

I focus on the sound, using it to anchor myself so I do not have to think about my new sexless body.

I begin to turn in a slow circle, trying to figure out from which direction the sound might be coming from, but it proves difficult.  I've nearly finished turning in a full circle when I notice a patch of the fog that seems darker than the rest.  Not for lack of fog, but as if something is pulling the depth and substance from the fog.

My curiosity winning out over my caution, I take a few steps toward the darkness.  I quickly stop short when I realize that I'm merely looking at that black //nothing// from before.  

Turning back toward where I had come from, I stagger backward in alarm when I find the void mere inches from my face.  

Before I can fall, I hear the sound of my boot striking wood.  Reaching out quickly, I close my hand around a thick length of rope.  I look around frantically, trying to orient myself again only to realize that I'm somehow standing on the rope bridge from before, or perhaps another like it.

While it only took a single step back to end up on the bridge, it somehow takes me a dozen paces before my feet touch the brown gray soil of the land once more.  

I look from side to side, trying to spot the blackness again.  It feels like my head is spinning in circles as I try to make sense of my situation, I question my sanity, I question whether this is a dream, and more than anything I feel deep down that I'm not understanding something profound in this moment, like I'm the alien in a place that was never intended to host a being of my limited understanding.  And that more th
passages.content_zh:
我將長外套拉攏裹緊自己，哪怕只是為了隱藏身上發生的變化，不讓自己看見。

謝天謝地，我開始聽見一些聲音。某種暫時將我的注意力從身體變化上轉移開的東西。

那聲音介於低吟與誦唱之間，在我聽力所能觸及的邊緣，夾雜著情慾的輕柔呻吟，斷續點綴著單調的嗡鳴。

我專注於那聲音，用它來錨定自己的心神，這樣我就不必去想自己這具全新的、無性別的身軀。

我開始緩緩轉圈，試圖判斷聲音來自哪個方向，但這並不容易。就在我快要轉完一整圈時，我注意到一片霧氣似乎比其他地方更暗。並非因為霧氣稀薄，而是彷彿有什麼東西正從霧中抽走其深度與實質。

好奇心戰勝了謹慎，我朝那片黑暗走了幾步。但當我意識到自己看到的只是先前那片虛無的漆黑時，我猛地停住了腳步。

我轉身想回到來時的方向，卻驚恐地踉蹌後退——那片虛空離我的臉只有幾英寸遠。

在我跌倒之前，我聽見靴子撞擊木頭的聲音。我迅速伸手，抓住了一截粗繩。我慌亂地環顧四周，試圖重新辨認方位，卻發現自己不知怎地正站在先前那座繩橋上，或者另一座類似的橋上。

雖然只退了一步就踏上了橋，但我卻花了十幾步，雙腳才再次觸及那片棕灰色的土地。

我左右張望，試圖再次找到那片黑暗。當我試圖理解自身處境時，感覺頭腦天旋地轉。我質疑自己的理智，質疑這是否是一場夢，而最深處的感覺是：此刻我未能理解某種深刻的事物，彷彿我是一個異類，身處一個從未打算容納我這般理解力有限的存在的地方。這一點最讓我感到震撼——我知道這裡發生的一切遠遠超出了我的理解，而我將再也無法以同樣的方式看待這個世界。這還是我的世界嗎？抑或這裡已是別處？

[繼續。]

passages.name: Do as Vick says.
passages.content:
Seeing no alternatives, I sit the shotgun down carefully, then step away from it before I begin to walk down the sloped cave into the darkness below.  //Until I come out the other side?  What the hell is he talking about?//

I fight the urge to look back, to see if Vick is still standing behind me with his rifle aimed at my spine.

Shivering even in the unexpected warmth around me, I slow my pace when the slope begins to even out.  <<if $cave gte 2>>//This is too deep.  I should have reached the Cathedral by now.//<<else>>//He said to walk down into the 'Cathedral' but I still don't see anything.  Just this cave that seems to go on forever.//<</if>>  I think, looking into the unnatural blackness.  

Stopping, I become aware of two things at once.  The first is that I can still somehow see my footing in this darkness which strikes me as strange.  

The second is that the blackness before me isn't just darkness.  Its something else, not just the absence of light, but the absence of //anything.//

The realization is so alien to me that I can't quite wrap my head around it. 

I glance at my feet, making out just enough detail to see my boot against the dirt and rock at my feet.  But just inches in front of me, . . . . . //nothing.//

It feels like my mind is slipping, trying to understand what is before me, knowing that is can not be real, but being confronted by the reality of it at the same time.

My hand trembles as I slowly reach out toward, . . . whatever it is that is before me.

I feel a sensation at my fingertips, like my hand is trying to go to sleep but not as sharp.  I pull my hand back quickly, but as if the darkness that is nothing does not want to loose contact, it surges forward to engulf me.

The whole world seems to tilt in every direction at once.  Vertigo washes over me and I wretch.  No sound, no sight, and no sensation, I feel like I am drifting within some kind of void.  The sensation of no sensation is so peculiar that I don't
passages.content_zh:
眼看別無選擇，我小心地放下霰彈槍，然後退開幾步，開始沿著傾斜的洞穴向下方的黑暗走去。從另一頭出去？他到底在說什麼？

我強忍著回頭的衝動，不去看Vick是否仍站在我身後，用步槍瞄準我的脊椎。

即使周圍出乎意料地溫暖，我仍不住顫抖。當斜坡開始變得平緩時，我放慢了腳步。[IF $cave gte 2]這太深了。我現在應該已經到達大教堂了。[ELSE]他說要走進「大教堂」，但我還是什麼都沒看見。只有這個彷彿永無止境的洞穴。[/IF]我望著那不自然的黑暗，心想。

我停下腳步，同時意識到兩件事。第一件是，在這片黑暗中我竟仍能看見腳下的路，這讓我感到詭異。

第二件是，眼前的黑暗不僅僅是缺乏光線。它是別的什麼東西——不只是光的缺席，而是一切事物的缺席。

這種認知對我而言如此陌生，我完全無法理解。

我瞥向自己的腳，勉強能辨認出靴子踩在泥土與岩石上的細節。但就在我前方幾英寸處，……什麼都沒有。

感覺我的理智正在流失，試圖理解眼前的東西，明知那不可能是真實的，卻同時被它的現實性所衝擊。

我的手顫抖著，緩緩伸向……無論面前是什麼。

指尖傳來一種感覺，就像手快要睡著了，但沒那麼尖銳。我迅速抽回手，但那片空無一物的黑暗彷彿不願失去接觸，猛然向前湧來將我吞沒。

整個世界似乎同時朝各個方向傾斜。暈眩感淹沒了我，我一陣乾嘔。沒有聲音、沒有視覺、沒有感覺，我彷彿漂浮在某種虛空之中。這種「毫無感覺」的感覺如此奇特，我不知道自己在那裡漂浮了多久——可能是一秒，也可能是一天。

劇痛突然在我顱內炸開，視野中迸出明亮的光點，隨即我便失去了意識。

[感覺恢復。]

passages.name: nextforest
passages.content:
<<if $DeepCombat is "true">>Chest heaving, my breath comes in ragged gasps as I look down on the disgusting thing laying dead at my feet.

Cautiously, I nudge it once with my foot, but elict no response from the thing.  Emboldened, I give it a little kick, resulting in the same response.

After a couple of seconds, I give it a push with my foot again, this time moving it onto its back so I can get a better look at it.  

The crest along the back of its head causes its entire head to list to one side.  a trickle of blackish blood leaking from the corner of its mouth where it siwrls in the muddy puddle beneath its face.  Like its back, its arms, legs, and sides are covered in thick scaly skin.  Not quite true scales, and not quite leather.  Along its belly, the coloration lightens slightly and the scales seem smaller, though after more than one encounters with the creatures, I figure its safe to say that they offer no less protection for it.

Finally, my eyes move lower, between its legs where I can see the tip of its pink cock peeking out of a slit that seems to bulge slightly, like something large is contained within.  I put pressure beside the area using the heel of my boot, causing more of its cock to inch free of its confines, along with the start of what might be its ball sack.  When I remove my foot, the creatures member slips back into the slit, nearly concealing it entirely now.

I take a few moments to consider what I have seen before stepping away from the body.

[[Continue.|Trail]]<<else>>My eyes dart around my surroundings, searching the nearby trees and bushes for any further sign of threat.

Satisfied that there is no further immediate threat, I take a deep breath to calm myself.

passages.content_zh:
[IF $DeepCombat is "true"]胸膛劇烈起伏，我低頭看著腳下那具噁心東西的屍體，呼吸破碎而急促。

我小心翼翼地用腳尖輕推了它一下，但那東西毫無反應。膽子大了些，我稍微用力踢了一腳，結果依舊。

過了幾秒鐘，我再次用腳推了推它，這次把它翻了個面朝上，好讓我看得更清楚。

它後腦勺的冠狀突起使得整個頭部歪向一邊。一股黑紅色的血從牠嘴角滲出，在臉部下方的泥水窪中暈開。就像它的背部一樣，它的手臂、腿部和側腹都覆蓋著厚厚的鱗狀皮膚。不完全是真正的鱗片，也不完全是皮革。沿著腹部，顏色略淺，鱗片似乎也較小，不過在與這些生物多次遭遇後，我想可以說這裡提供的防護並不稍遜。

最後，我的視線往下移，落在牠雙腿之間——那裡可以看見牠粉紅色陽具的尖端，從一個微微鼓起的縫隙中探出，彷彿裡面藏著什麼龐然大物。我用靴跟按壓那區域旁邊，使得更多陽具從束縛中緩緩滑出，連同可能是牠陰囊的起端也露了出來。當我移開腳，那生物的器官又滑回縫隙中，現在幾乎完全隱沒了。

我花了一點時間思索所見，然後才從屍體旁退開。

[繼續。][ELSE]我目光迅速掃視周遭，搜尋附近樹木和灌木叢，看是否有進一步的威脅跡象。

確信暫時沒有其他直接威脅後，我深吸一口氣讓自己鎮定下來。

[IF $random is 1][ELSE][IF $EnemyFlee is "true"]  [ELSE][IF $weaponChance lte 5]
花點時間搜查屍體：

passages.name: Ask Vick about the Ruins.
passages.content:
<<if $RuinsVick is "Not Played">>I keep hearing about some ruins that are supposed to be on this island.  I've been able to learn that the ruins are out here in the forest somewhere, but I'm not sure where exactly."

Before I can ask him specifically, he begins to speak, "Da uins?  Ye ont onna go ere,"  His tone is cold, holding just a little anger.

"Why wouldn't I want to go there?"  I ask, careful to keep my tone soft in an effort to not provoke the man.

"Do bones, evn da bones ont ptect ye der.  Da uins be death."  Vick's madness is clear in his features, but there's a hardness as well that makes me pause. 

"I'll be careful," I assure him, "I've started to think that the ruins may be somehow linked to why I am here.  Its important to me that I find these ruins.  I don't know if they hold answers for me, but I have to know for sure."

Anger and barely restrained rage dance behind his eyes.  Then one second to the next his expression softens and he smiles, "Aye, ah ken unerstan da need ta unerstan,"  There's s distant look in his eyes, like he's gone somewhere else in his head for a few seconds, remembering days long past, when his eyes refocus, he turns them on me, "Da path be behen da house.  Ook fer da break in da trees."

"Thank you,"  I say softly.

<<set $RuinsVick to "Played">><<else>>"Any chance you can tell me a little bit about the ruins?  You pointed me in the right direction, but surely there's something more you can tell me?"  I implore.

The look he gives me makes my blood run cold.  I'm not sure how he's going to react, but I find myself leaning back slightly as I try to put a little distance between the two of us.

His mad gaze lingers on me for several seconds, then his expression softens suddenly, "Aye, nothen ore I ave ta share."

<</if>>

[[What can you tell me about Wanton Cove?]]

[[Who is SHE?]]

[[Do you know anything about a guy named Tom?]]<<if $Pastor is "Played">>

[[Ask Vick about
passages.content_zh:
[IF $RuinsVick is "Not Played"]我一直聽說這島上應該有些遺跡。我已經打聽到遺跡就在這森林裡的某處，但不確定確切位置。」

我還沒來得及具體詢問，他就先開口了：「遺跡？你不該去那兒。」他的語氣冰冷，帶著一絲怒意。

「為什麼我不該去那裡？」我問道，謹慎地保持語調柔和，以免激怒這個人。

「連骨頭……連骨頭在那兒都保護不了你。遺跡就是死亡。」Vick 的瘋狂在他的面容上清晰可見，但其中還有一種堅硬的特質讓我遲疑。

「我會小心的，」我向他保證，「我開始覺得遺跡可能和我為何在此有關聯。找到這些遺跡對我來說很重要。我不知道那裡是否有我要的答案，但我必須確定。」

憤怒與勉強壓抑的狂怒在他眼中翻騰。接著下一秒，他的表情軟化下來，露出微笑：「是啊，俺能理解想弄明白的那股勁兒。」他眼神飄向遠方，彷彿思緒瞬間去了別處，回憶著久遠的過往。當他目光重新聚焦時，轉而看向我：「小路在屋子後面。找樹林裡的缺口。」

「謝謝你，」我輕聲說。

[ELSE]「你能不能多告訴我一點關於遺跡的事？你給我指了方向，但肯定還有更多你能告訴我的吧？」我懇求道。

他看我的眼神讓我血液為之凍結。我不確定他會如何反應，卻發現自己微微向後傾，試圖拉開我們兩人之間的距離。

他瘋狂的凝視在我身上停留了好幾秒，然後表情突然柔和下來：「是啊，沒啥別的可分享了。」

[/IF]

[你的故事是什麼？]

[關於萬頓灣，你能告訴我什麼？]

[她是誰？]

[你認識一個叫 Tom 的人嗎？][IF $Pastor is "Played"]

[詢問 Vick 關於牧師的事。][/IF][IF $Taint gte 95]

[詢問 Vick 關於你的變異。][/IF][IF $VickSex is "Played"][IF $Mutation lte 7]

[與 Vick 發生性關係][/IF][/IF]

或
[結束與 Vick 的對話。]

passages.name: Dream1.
passages.content:
<<set $Bed to "False">><<set $Day += 1>>//I find myself standing, naked, on the rocky shore of Wanton Cove.  The cold, damp air leaving me feeling chilled to the bone.

I know that I need to return to my room, find some clothes, and get warm.

My bare feet pad across the shore and onto the street that runs through the core of Wanton Cove.  My feet slap wetly against the cold street, splashing in puddles that I find myself unable to step around.

Up ahead, the Barmaid's Daughter seems impossibly far away, it's windows dim points of light in a gloomy grey world.  

There are sounds all around me, the ravings of madmen and wails of anguish bound together in a uncomprehendable drone that is impossible to understand, though I know in understanding, I would find salvation.

I push forward, refusing to look to either side, knowing that there are horrors all around and to look on them would draw their attention.

The Barmaid's Daughter is closer now, though I feel I've traveled towards the tavern for hours.

I see something in a window on the second story, my room.  I see a silhouette, a feminine form standing in the room, it's head tilted.  I know that she is looking down on my sleeping form.//

This is only a dream.  I can't be in two places at once.  I'm asleep in that bed, so I can't be here in the street.

//Around the feminine form, I can see a half dozen or more tentacles reaching out towards where I am sleeping.

From the street, I scream at myself to wake up, trying to rouse myself from my slumber, but no matter how hard I try to cry out, no sound escapes my mouth.//

[img[images/Dream1.jpg]]

My eyes snap open, my heart pounding in my chest.  I sit up shakily, becoming aware of how my sweat slick body sticks to the sheets of the bed.

I breathe deeply, trying to calm myself.  When I glance out the small window nearby, I see that the grey sky has just started to brighten with the coming day.

<<set $CharHP = 10>><<set $Research to 0>><<i
passages.content_zh:
我發現自己赤身裸體地站在萬頓灣的岩石海岸上。冰冷潮濕的空氣讓我感到刺骨寒意。

我知道我得回到房間，找些衣服穿上，讓身體暖和起來。

我光著腳踩過海岸，踏上貫穿萬頓灣核心的街道。雙腳濕漉漉地拍打著冰冷的路面，水花四濺——我發現自己根本無法避開那些水窪。

前方，「酒保的女兒」看起來遙不可及，它的窗戶在這陰鬱灰暗的世界裡只是幾點微弱的光芒。

四周充斥著各種聲音——瘋子的狂囂與痛苦的哀嚎交織成一片難以理解的嗡鳴。但我明白，若能理解這聲音，我就能找到救贖。

我繼續前行，拒絕看向任何一側。我知道周圍潛伏著恐怖之物，只要瞥上一眼就會引起它們的注意。

「酒保的女兒」現在近了些，儘管我覺得自己已經朝著酒館走了好幾個小時。

我看到二樓某扇窗戶裡有東西——那是我的房間。一個剪影，一個女性的身形站在房內，頭微微傾斜。我知道她正低頭注視著我沉睡的軀體。

這只是夢。我不可能同時身在兩處。我正睡在那張床上，所以不可能同時站在這街道上。

在那女性身影周圍，我看見六七條或更多的觸手正伸向我安睡的位置。

我在街道上朝自己尖叫，試圖將自己從沉睡中喚醒。但無論我多麼用力地嘶喊，嘴裡卻發不出任何聲音。

我猛然睜開雙眼，心臟在胸腔裡狂跳。我顫抖著坐起身，意識到自己汗濕的身體正黏膩地貼在床單上。

我深呼吸，試圖讓自己平靜下來。瞥向旁邊的小窗戶時，我看見灰濛濛的天空已開始隨著黎明到來而轉亮。

[IF $Taint gte 100][ELSEIF $Taint gte 75][ELSEIF $Taint gte 50][ELSEIF $Taint gte 25]
[ELSEIF $Taint gte 1][/IF]
[你的房間。]

passages.name: Ask Nadia about the Ruins.
passages.content:

"Tom was writing an article about some artifact he'd come across,"  Peter begins. "Last I talked to him, he said he had a lead that he was going to follow."  

Peter pauses, obviously thinking about his next words before he says them, "He's always been relentless about getting to the bottom of a story."  He grimaces, "That's something I blame you for by the way."

I can't help myself.  He's found a chink in my armor and a hint of a sad smile finds its way onto my face at the memory of the times I spent with him and his family back when I was still with the force.

//It's not too late to throw him out,//  I think, but even as I think it I know what is coming is inevitable.

He must have seen my expression soften.  I could see it in the subtle way he relaxes across the room from me, how his gaze holds my own with a little more intensity.  "Well, this time was different, he was obsessed in a way I've never seen before."

//Sometimes a person gets sucked into a mystery and can't find their way out again, guess I'm kind of like that.//

"You know how he is.  He checks in at least once a week, always."  Peter is a big man, but something about his posture and his expression made him look small standing across the room from me.  "It was almost a month that we hadn't heard from him, until a letter arrived in the mail from him."

Peter reaches into his coat, pulling a white envelope and holding it out towards me.  I don't take it.  

//Yeah, this is a bad idea, best to just stay away from that letter and forget this whole thing.//

He looks at me like he's trying to will me to take the envelope for a couple more heartbeats, then lowers his arm, still holding it.

passages.name: Lay down for the night.
passages.content:
Laying down in bed, it takes almost an hour before I start to drift off to sleep in spite of how bone weary I feel.  

The whole time I lay there, I think about the encounter in the forest earlier today.  

//It couldn't have been real.//  I try to rationalize what happened, but my thoughts keep returning to what I experienced, the cuts and scrapes on my arms and legs from my headlong flight through the forest in my frantic effort to escape.  

Holding one of my arms up in front of my face, I can see the shallow cuts and scabs, irrefutable proof of my retreat, even if nothing else that happened can be proven.

//Zal'chaas,//  I think.  As soon as the name crosses my mind, I regret it as the strange tongue she //speaks// in whispers in the back of my mind for perhaps a minute before trailing off.  

//What the fuck is happening in this place.  Its like half the locals don't even acknowledge that anything strange is going on, and the rest are actively unwilling to talk in detail about it.//

I roll over on my side, trying to get comfortable.  I flip my pillow so I can rest my head against the cool side, then sit up suddenly in bed when I see movement just outside my window.

Nearly jumping from my bed, I grab my .38 Special then turn towards the window, gun raised.  

That same flicker of movement again.  I step cautiously closer.  This time when the movement happens, I see the source.  A tree branch, casting a shadow over my window whenever a wind gust blows it in front of a lit window just down the street.

I watch as the scene replays itself perhaps half a dozen more times before I finally put my gun away again.

When I lay back down in my bed, I turn my back to the window.

passages.content:
"I was wondering about your tea?"  I ask.

Mr Morichi's eyebrows come up slightly, "You would like a cup?"  His voice holds a note of clear amusement.

"No,"  You blurt quickly, remembering the bitter taste the one time you tried it.

"I suspected as much,"  He hides his smile behind a sip from his own teacup.

"I was actually curious about what all was in it,"  I lean back in my seat, looking at the teacup on the little table between us.

"To be honest, I dont even remember anymore.  My mother used to make it for me as a child, and since then the servants have been responsible for making it.  Are you hoping for the recipe?  If so, I can request a copy be made for you."

"No, no need, just idle curiosity,"  I feel uncomfortable unleashing such a bitter drink on anyone I know.  <<if $Madness gte 1>>A soft feminine voice coos playfully in the back of my mind, putting me suddenly on edge.  My eyes drift to the corners of the room, looking for dark places where shadows may be lurking.<<endif>>

Dismissing the subject from my mind, I consider if I want to ask him anything else.

passages.name: Abrupt End Conversation
passages.content:
<<if $Mutation gte 6>>The room comes to a sudden hush as I enter it.  Nearly every eye in the Barmaid's Daughter turning towards me.

I can see each and every one of them looking at me, observing my mutations with distaste.  I hear someone spit in disgust.

All I can do is pull my jacket tighter around myself in a self conscious effort to hide my changes.  I am however unable to ignore the feeling of their eyes lingering on me as I move across the room.

<<elseif $Mutation gte 4>>Coversations around the room trail off, one and two at a time, until the Barmaid's Daughter is largely silent.  Nearly every eye is on me, looking at me.  I can feel their eyes on my mutations, looking at the terrible ways this island has changed me.

Part of me wants to shout at them, to force them to tell me what is going on, but deep down I know the act would be futile.

<<elseif $Mutation gte 2>>Walking across the room, I notice an occasional person trail off, glancing at me.  Its clear that my more horrific mutations are what is drawing their attention.

There is clear distaste in their eyes as they take in my changes, though no one so much as murmers a word about it.

<<else>>With no warning, the den of conversation starts to die out, conversations trailing off one by one until the room is nearly silent.  

Several of the patrons glance my direction as they stop talking.  

The hairs on the back of my neck begin to stand on end, the whole scene putting my nerves on edge like fingers on a chalkboard.

I stop where I'm standing, not sure what is about to happen.

A few seconds later, conversation starts to pick up again, one and two people starting to talk at a time.  it's not long before the entire room is talking like nothing strange had ever happened.

Watching the people gathered in the tavern warily, I slowly let out a breath that I didn't know I had been holding.

<<endif>>[[Continue on my way.|The Barmaids Daughter]]

passages.name: Knock on the Mansion door.
passages.content:
<<if $GooCounter is 0>>Raising my hand, I knock on the old wooden door.  The dirty white paint where I hit the door seems to flake off onto my knuckles.  

The sound of my knocking is loud and crisp in the cool, damp air.

For almost a minute, I wait, listening.  Soft groans can be heard from the mansion, like a sleeping giant that I might somehow rouse from its slumber.  But it quickly becomes obvious that no one is coming to answer the door.<<set $GooCounter += 1>><<elseif $GooCounter is 1>>I raise my hand, using my knuckles to knock on the old wooden door.  The sound that is caused is loud and hollow, echoing through the mansion and heard clearly against the backdrop of waves breaking against the rocky shore below.

Waiting for several seconds, I can hear soft creaking sounds from the mansion, though I'm unable to determine if its the sound of someone moving around inside of the house, or if its merely the sound of the old mansion protesting as it settles in the damp earth.

I stand there a little longer in the hopes that someone might answer the door, but eventually decide my time might be better spent by coming back at a later time.<<set $GooCounter += 1>><<elseif $GooCounter gte 2>>The sound of my knuckles rapping against the old wooden door is like the distant clap of gunfire in the cool air.  

Almost immediately, I can hear what sounds like footsteps from inside the mansion, and I glance to the side just in time to see a curtain shift slightly.

Taking half a step back from the door for a better look at the window I had seen the curtain move inside of, I wait expectantly.

The seconds tick on, stretching into minutes.  Stepping towards the door again, I knock a second time, but this time I can hear nothing from inside, //Guess they dont want visitors.// I scowl, making mental note to come back at another time.<<set $GooCounter -= 2>><</if>>

[[Step off the porch.|Bluff]]

passages.name: Enjoy the bath.
passages.content:
<<if $Mutation gte 8>>I start to step into the bath, but have to stop myself.  //Hot.//  I think, deciding that I had better wait a minute before entering.  

Once the water has cooled a bit, I slip into the tub, intimately aware of how my webbed feet move under the water.  The barest flick of my foot is enough to make the water in the small tub slop over the sides.

I turn my attention to the gray scaly skin of my hands, spreading my fingers wide to reveal the heavy webbing between them. <<elseif $Mutation gte 6>>Stepping into the bath, I'm intimately aware of the way my webbed feet seem to drag at the water, //kind of like flippers,// I think darkly to myself.

By the time I am laying in the tub, I notice that the hot water feels almost sufficating, but I do my best to ignore it.  

Absently, I move my hands through the water, my webbed fingers moving the water far more than my normal fingers ever would have.  <<elseif $Mutation gte 5>>I pause at the edge of the tub, looking at myself.  Seeing the gray shade of my skin, I'm uncomfortably aware of the fact this is something that won't simply wash off.

Grimacing at the thought, I step into the tub, slipping into the water.  <<elseif $Mutation gte 1>>Slipping into the bath, I can't help but notice the way my grayish skin contrasts with the water. Trying to put the troubling thought aside, I close my eyes and sink into the water, letting the heat soothe me.<<else>>Settling into the water, I close my eyes and enjoy the warmth, even if its a bit on the hot side.  <</if>>

I'm not sure how long I sit in the tub, the hot water covering my body from the neck down, but eventually the water becomes tepid.  

Reluctantly, I step from the tub, the rooms cool air causing my skin to break out in goosebumps.  A few minutes later, I've finished drying myself off and am fully dressed once more.

[[Continue.|Your room.]]

passages.name: Ask Lady Anne about Wanton Cove.
passages.content:
<<if ($PlayerEttiquette + $PlayerCharisma) gte 13>>"You've lived in Wanton Cove your whole life?"  You ask, already suspecting the answer.

Lady Anne nods, her eyes never leaving my own.

"I've been wondering about the town, maybe you can tell me a little bit about Wanton Cove?"

"Not much to tell.  Its a fishing town without much else worth mentioning,"  Her tone is bored, and holds just a hint of annoyance.

<<elseif ($PlayerEttiquette + $PlayerCharisma) gte 7>>"You've lived in Wanton Cove a long time?"  You ask, already suspecting the answer.

Lady Anne nods, her eyes never leaving my own.  Without a word I can feel her annoyance like a physical thing.

I try to choose my words carefully as I continue, "I've been wondering if you might be able to tell me a bit about Wanton Cove?"

"Not much to tell.  Its a fishing town without much else worth mentioning,"  Her tone is bored, but still somehow conveys a warning to not continue this line of questioning.

<<else>>"What can you tell me about Wanton Cove?"  You ask bluntly.

Lady Anne's expression darkens, like the brooding clouds in the sky outside, "I hear that the general store has a quaint little history book about Wanton Cove.  Anything you need to know is likely to be found in that."

Her tone is soft, but the force of her words is nearly enough to force me back in my seat.

<</if>>//Maybe it would be best if I change the subject.//

passages.name: Downstairs.
passages.content:
When I exit my room, I start to become aware of just how quiet it is.  //I can't hear anything downstairs, no one's talking or making any noise.//

I can feel my brow tighten with concern.  Reaching into my jacket, my hand comes to rest on the handle of my .38 Special, comforted by its presence even though I do not draw it.

Reaching the bottom of the stairs, I take in the darkened interior of the Barmaid's Daughter.  //Not a soul in sight,// I think, my sense of unease continuing to grow.

"Hello?"  My voice sounds timid in the empty space, "Is anyone here?"  I continue with a firmer voice.

Only silence replies.

I take a deep breath and let it out slowly.  My hand slips from the handle of my pistol as I make my way toward the bar.  The entire time, my eyes search the area, looking for any sign of where the inhabitants might have gone.

When I reach the bar, I call out one more time, then step behind the counter.  Grabbing the first bottle I can reach, I pull the cork and take a long drink.  I don't even care what it is, only that it burns my dry throat like liquid fire on its way down.

//Wow,// I manage to rasp past my lips.  Turning the bottle, I look at the label, whiskey, though I'm unfamiliar with the brand, //Burns so bad it actually hurts to drink it.//

Raising the bottle, I take a second pull from the bottle, filling my mouth with the liquid and letting it linger on my tongue for several seconds before swallowing.  It burns every bit as bad on the way down the second time.

//Good stuff.//  I think, looking around the tavern's interior one more time to ensure I am alone, then slipping the bottle into the large pocket on the inside of my jacket, //I'll pay for it before I leave the island.//

I'm just about to step back around the bar when the front door of the tavern slams open.

[[Continue.|Morichi Entry]]

passages.name: Ruins11
passages.content:
I almost fail to see it among the paving stones beneath my feet.  But when I see it, my eyes are riveted.  

A smear of something, or rather the remnants of it can be seen on the paving stones.  It doesn't take much imagination to come to the conclusion that this was a puddle of White Goo.

Kneeling at the spot, I throw a cautious glance around myself before focusing on the smear.  Sure enough, it looks as if that's exactly what it once was.

<<if $Taint lte 39>>I look at the smear for a long moment.  Some small part of me wants to reach out and touch it, but I force the thought down.

A minute later, after I realize there is nothing to learn from the spot, I move away from it.

<<elseif $Taint lte 54>>Looking at the stuff, I begin to feel an urge to reach out, to touch the smear, to //consume.//

I lick my lips, salivating.  Then when I realize that there's something //wrong// with how I'm looking at the stuff I quickly move away from it.

<<elseif $Taint lte 94>>I struggle, my will barely keeping me from trying to scrape up any remnant of the White Goo.  Something deep inside of me pushes back just as hard, urging me to touch, to hold, to //consume//.  

After a few seconds, I growl in frustration. I manage to stop myself, my hand poised over the smear, then I quickly move back away from the stuff before the urge to reach out can become any stronger.

<<else>>I lack the will to resist my urge.  I reach out, scraping at the stones with my bare fingers, hoping that there's enough White Goo remaining to touch, to hold, to //consume//.  

After a few seconds, I growl in frustration.  Then leaning forward I begin to lick the ground.  I can feel a faint tingle on my tongue, but I am still unable to get any noteworthy amount of the stuff off of the stones.

<<set $Taint += 1>><</if>>[[Continue.|Continue into the ruins.]]
passages.content_zh:
我差點沒注意到腳下鋪路石間的異樣。但當我看清時，目光便再也無法移開。

鋪路石上沾染著某種污漬，或者更準確地說，是某種殘留物。不需要太多想像力就能得出結論——這曾是一灘白色黏液。

我跪在那處痕跡旁，警覺地環顧四周後才專注審視污漬。果然，看起來這確實曾是那種東西。

[IF $Taint lte 39]我凝視著污漬良久。內心某個微小角落渴望伸手觸碰，但我強行壓抑了這個念頭。

片刻後，意識到從這處痕跡中無法獲得任何線索，我便起身離開。

[ELSEIF $Taint lte 54]注視著這物質，我開始產生一股衝動，想要伸手觸碰那污漬，想要吞噬它。

我舔了舔嘴唇，唾液不自覺分泌。當驚覺自己看待這物質的方式極不正常時，我迅速退離了那個地方。

[ELSEIF $Taint lte 94]我掙扎著，僅存的意志力勉強阻止自己刮取任何白色黏液的殘餘。內心深處卻有股力量同等強烈地反推著，催促我去觸碰、去掌握、去吞噬。

幾秒後，我挫敗地低吼。勉強停住懸在污漬上方的手，趁伸手的衝動尚未加劇前，我迅速向後退離那物質。

[ELSE]我喪失了抵抗衝動的意志力。伸出手，用赤裸的手指刮擦石面，期盼仍有足夠的白色黏液殘留可供觸碰、掌握、吞噬。

幾秒後，我挫敗地低吼。隨即俯身開始舔舐地面。舌尖能感受到微弱的刺痛感，但仍無法從石頭上取得任何值得注意的份量。

[/IF][繼續。]

passages.name: He says firmly.
passages.content:
My entire mind screams for me to throw him out and grab another beer, but instead, I take a deep breath and cross my arms over my stained white tank top, "Say what you have to say." 

"Tom was writing an article about some artifact he'd come across,"  Peter begins. "Last I talked to him, he said he had a lead that he was going to follow."  

Peter pauses, obviously thinking about his next words before he says them, "He's always been relentless about getting to the bottom of a story."  He grimaces, "That's something I blame you for by the way."

I can't help myself.  He's found a chink in my armor and a hint of a sad smile finds its way onto my face at the memory of the times I spent with him and his family back when I was still with the force.

He must have seen my expression soften.  I could see it in the subtle way he relaxes across the room from me, how his gaze holds my own with a little more intensity.  "Well, this time was different, he was obsessed in a way I've never seen before."

"You know how he is.  He checks in at least once a week, always."  Peter is a big man, but something about his posture and his expression made him look small standing across the room from me.  "It was almost a month that we hadn't heard from him, until a letter arrived in the mail from him."

Peter reaches into his coat, pulling a white envelope and holding it out towards me.  I don't take it.  

He looks at me like he's trying to will me to take the envelope for a couple more heartbeats, then lowers his arm, still holding it.

"He's in trouble,"  Peter says, "I couldn't make heads or tails of what was written, but it was in Tom's hand writing.  And the return address is to a place called Wanton Cove."  

The town's name brings images to mind of the most horrific murder scene [[I had ever worked]].
passages.content_zh:
我整個腦海都在尖叫著要我把他趕出去，再抓一瓶啤酒來喝，但我反而深吸一口氣，雙臂交叉抱在染污的白色坦克背心上，「有話快說。」

「Tom當時正在寫一篇關於某件他發現的古物的文章，」Peter開始說道。「我最後一次跟他談話時，他說他找到了一條線索，打算追查下去。」

Peter停頓了一下，顯然在斟酌接下來要說的話，「他一向對追查真相窮追不捨。」他苦著臉，「順帶一提，這點我怪你。」

我忍不住。他找到了我盔甲上的裂縫，回憶起過去我還待在警隊時，與他和他的家人共度的時光，一抹悲傷的微笑悄悄爬上我的臉龐。

他一定看到了我表情軟化。我可以從他站在房間另一頭微微放鬆的姿態看出來，他的目光更加專注地鎖定我的眼睛。「嗯，但這次不同，他著魔的程度是我從未見過的。」

「你知道他的習慣。他至少每週都會報一次平安，一向如此。」Peter是個大塊頭，但他的姿勢和表情卻讓站在房間另一頭的他顯得渺小。「我們將近一個月沒有他的消息，直到一封他寄來的信送到信箱。」

Peter把手伸進外套，掏出一個白色信封，朝我遞過來。我沒有接。

他看著我，彷彿試圖用意念讓我接下信封，過了幾次心跳的時間，他放下手臂，但仍拿著信。

「他遇到麻煩了，」Peter說，「我完全看不懂信裡寫了什麼，但那確實是Tom的筆跡。而回郵地址是一個叫萬頓灣的地方。」

這個城鎮的名字讓我腦海中浮現出[我處理過最恐怖的謀殺現場]的畫面。

passages.name: Lady Anne's Home.
passages.content:
<<set $random to random(1,4)>><<if $random gte 3>>My fist doesn't even touch the door before it swings open in front of me.  I'm left standing in place, my hand raised.  

Wearing that smile that isn't quite a smile, Lady Anne looks back at me, never quite looking at my raised hand as she speaks, "<<print $PlayerName>> <<print $PlayerName2>>, I knew you would be back,"  She makes a small gesture, urging me to enter.  

For a flickering instant, I wonder if its not too late to make an excuse to leave, but the moment her hand comes to rest on my shoulder, I can feel her guiding me through the door.

"I enjoyed our last visit a great deal, I'm pleased that you've returned so soon,"  Her voice purrs so close to my ear that I can feel the heat of her breath.

The sound of the door latching closed behind us echoes in my mind, like that one perfect moment before everything goes inevitably wrong.

<<elseif $random is 2>>My knuckles only strike the door once before it swings part way open.

There, standing half shielded behind the door is Lady Anne's husband, naked and unable to meet my eyes, he gestures for me to enter, "She was expecting your visit,"  He says in a hushed tone.

Glancing past him as I start to step over the threshold, I can see Lady Anne just entering the living room from the hallway on the far side.

[ELSE]我舉起手，指節幾乎還沒碰到木門，就聽到另一側的鎖打開了。一秒後，門開了，露出Lady Anne的身影，她強烈的目光緊鎖我的雙眼，直到我移開視線。

passages.name: stepping carefully inside.
passages.content:
The first thing I notice is the musty, unlived-in smell that seems to be as much a part of the Church as the very walls.

I spend a couple of minutes wandering the old Church, the crisp sound of my footsteps echoing in the abandoned Church. 
 
The pews are in long even rows, arrayed to point at the small pulpit.

The pulpit is a polished oak stand, a torn piece of fabric hangs askew from it's front.
<<if $PlayerIntelligence + $PlayerInvestigation gte 10>><<if $ChurchFoot is "Not Played">>
I'm about ready to leave when I notice old footprints among the dust.

//Someone has been here, not recently, but from the patterns in the dust, I'd guess they were looking for something.//<<set $ChurchFoot to "Played">><<else>>
Like before, my eyes are drawn to the old footprints in the dust.  //Who was here, and more importantly, what were they looking for?  And did they find it?//<</if>><</if>><<if $PastorBook is "Played">>

After a short search, my eyes fall on a large area rug that looks out of place. From the patterns in the dust, it does not look like the rug has been moved.

Stepping closer, I reach out to take a hold of the rug by a corner, it feels both gritty and slightly sticky to the touch.  With a tug, I pull the rug off the place it is resting, filling the air with a heavy cloud of stale smelling dust.

Waving my hand ineffectively at the dust in front of my face, I retreat a few steps while the worst of the cloud once again settles.  

My eyes fall on the trap door on the wooden floor, //interesting// I think to myself, stepping forward for a better look.

[[Open the trap door.]]<<elseif $PastorBook is "Taken">>Eventually, my eyes fall on the drapdoor leading to the basement of the church.

[[Open the trap door.]]<</if>>

<<slumlink "Step back outside.">>

passages.name: Ruins23
passages.content:
I hear a sound almost directly behind me.  A wet cracking sound like someone is breaking a particularly juicy melon.

Tense, I turn toward the sound.  What I see is unlike anything I could have even imagined before arriving on this accursed island.

A bird, if you can even call it that, half the size of a man, is perched on a broken building not ten paces from where I am standing.

It's form is almost human, though it's skin is black as night and had angry red lines that make it look like it's flesh has been torn to expose bloody wounds. Leathery black wings are partially spread, bony fingers make up a pale hand at the tip of each.  Occasional feathers that look like they could rot off of the creature at any second adorn the wings.  The head holds no semblance of humanity though, the head is elongated and in place of a face there is a mass of small tentacles that glisten a greenish black color and seem to glow from within.  

The sound comes again, and I can see the creature's chest heave at the same time.  I watch in morbid fascination as the creature's chest splits, revealing meat and bone as it opens like a gaping maw.  

What I see within looks like a human head, it's eyes looking directly at me.  It grins and begins to giggle shrilly as the creature's rib cage closes again with that same unsettling wet sound.

With no further warning, it's wings spread wider than the creature's small stature would suggest, at least six feet wide.  Then with a thunderous clap it's airborne. 

I watch as it raises into the sky, circling my position once, then gliding further into the ruins.

Rattled, and uncertain of what I just witnessed, I gather my wits and resume my exploration of the ancient ruins. 

[[Continue.|Continue into the ruins.]]
passages.content_zh:

一隻鳥——如果你還能稱之為鳥的話——有著半個人高，停駐在距我站立處不到十步遠的一棟殘破建築上。

它的形體近乎人形，但皮膚漆黑如夜，佈滿憤怒的紅色紋路，彷彿皮肉曾被撕裂、露出血淋淋的傷口。皮革般的黑色翅膀半張著，每隻翅膀末端都長著由骨指構成的蒼白手掌。翅膀上點綴著零星羽毛，看起來隨時會從這生物身上腐落。頭部則毫無人類特徵：頭顱細長，臉部位置是一團泛著青黑色光澤的小觸手叢，內部彷彿透出幽光。

毫無預警地，它的翅膀猛然張開——寬度至少六英尺，遠超這生物矮小體型所能承載。接著一聲雷鳴般的拍擊，它騰空而起。

我心驚膽顫，對剛才目睹的一切茫然不解，定了定神後，繼續探索這片古老遺跡。

[繼續。]

當那人注意到我的視線時，他/她下意識地將雙臂環抱在胸前，並且刻意看向任何地方，就是不看我。

[ELSEIF $GooCounter is 1]一位女子經過時差點撞到我，促使我仔細打量。

當看到的景象與預期不符時，我迅速又看了一眼。雖然此人明顯擁有女性體態，襯衫前襟也被明顯的乳房頂起，但我同時也能看到喉結，以及臉上隱約的柔軟鬍鬚。

我當場僵住，開始轉身想將此人保持在視線內。然而對方注意到了，腳步隨即加快，在我還來不及開口說些什麼之前，便已匆匆遠離。

[ELSE]我看到一位女子站在不遠處街邊的一棟建築前。從我行走的位置，能看見她在衣服裡不安地扭動，拉扯著衣物，彷彿想讓一切穿戴得更妥貼。

如果她不是穿著厚重的夾克擋雨，那件連身裙穿在她身上應該相當迷人。

她臉上帶著煩躁的神情，試圖調整乳房，讓它們在連身裙的上衣中安放妥當。接著，當她發現我正在觀看時，即使站在原處，我也能清楚看見她臉紅了，隨後她便匆忙朝反方向離去。

[/IF][繼續前行。]

passages.name: Deep
passages.content:
Chest heaving, my breath comes in ragged gasps as I look down on the disgusting thing laying dead at my feet.

Cautiously, I nudge it once with my foot, but elict no response from the thing.  Emboldened, I give it a little kick, resulting in the same response.

After a couple of seconds, I give it a push with my foot again, this time moving it onto its back so I can get a better look at it.  

The crest along the back of its head causes its entire head to list to one side.  a trickle of blackish blood leaking from the corner of its mouth where it siwrls in the water on the dock, staining the wood.  Like its back, its arms, legs, and sides are covered in thick scaly skin.  Not quite true scales, and not quite leather.  Along its belly, the coloration lightens slightly and the scales seem smaller, though after more than one encounters with the creatures, I figure its safe to say that they offer no less protection for it.

Finally, my eyes move lower, between its legs where I can see the tip of its pink cock peeking out of a slit that seems to bulge slightly, like something large is contained within.  I put pressure beside the area using the heel of my boot, causing more of its cock to inch free of its confines, along with the start of what might be its ball sack.  When I remove my foot, the creatures member slips back into the slit, nearly concealing it entirely now.

Feeling disgust, I give the creature a shove with my boot, pushing it far enough over the edge of the dock that it rolls the rest of the way on its own.  With a splash, it strikes the water.

I take a moment to glance over the edge, but the body has already vanished into the dark swirling water of the cove.

[[Continue.|the waterfront]]
passages.content_zh:
胸口劇烈起伏，我低頭看著腳下那具死去的噁心生物，呼吸變得破碎而急促。

我小心翼翼地用腳尖輕推了它一下，但那東西毫無反應。這讓我膽子大了些，又輕輕踢了一腳，結果依舊。

過了幾秒鐘，我再次用腳推動它，這次把它翻了個面，讓我能更清楚地觀察。

牠頭骨後方的脊冠使整個頭部歪向一側。嘴角滲出一縷暗黑色的血，在碼頭的木板上與海水混雜暈開，染污了木材。和背部一樣，牠的手臂、雙腿與體側覆蓋著厚重的鱗狀皮膚——不完全是真正的鱗片，也不完全是皮革。腹部顏色稍淺，鱗片似乎較小，不過在遭遇這些生物不止一次後，我敢說那裡的防護力並未減弱。

最後，我的目光向下移動，落在牠雙腿之間——一道微微鼓起的裂縫中，隱約露出粉紅色陰莖的尖端，彷彿裡面藏著什麼龐然大物。我用靴跟壓迫裂縫旁的位置，迫使更多陰莖從束縛中緩緩滑出，連同可能是陰囊的起始部分也顯露出來。當我移開腳，那生物的性器又縮回裂縫中，幾乎完全隱沒。

一陣噁心感湧上，我用靴子猛力一推，將那生物推過碼頭邊緣，讓它自行翻滾落下。撲通一聲，它墜入水中。

我花了一瞬間瞥向水邊，但那具軀體早已消失在灣內幽暗翻湧的深水裡。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Start
passages.content:
[[Adult content]] warning.  If you are under 18, or you are easily offended, then please leave now.  Otherwise, I hope that you enjoy the game!

!HOW TO PLAY THIS GAME:
Your character's stats have the potential to have a huge bearing on how the game plays.  

For example: A character with a low Perception score may only get a basic description of a scene, a character with a middling Perception score may notice some details that people with low scores will not, and a character with a high Perception score may even notice subtle details.  

In other words, pay attention EVERY TIME YOU PLAY, otherwise, you may miss important details.

Also, unlike most twine games, doing the same thing more than once can result in different outcomes.  And some encounters/events can be randomly generated.  Visit places more than once, talk to people whenever you've moved the story along, talked to someone new, or visited a new place, there's a possibility that something new might happen the next time you inspect something or talk to someone.

PS:  Some people may find this game to be frightening or unsettling in nature.  Play at your own risk, I will not be held accountable for any therapy you decide you need after playing this game.

[[Play the game.]]

Become a parton on Patreon!  Gain access to Patreon only polls, exclusive art, and a Cheat Menu!
https://www.patreon.com/user?u=3879205

//The WantonVerse Wiki, where you can find information about all of Aftermath Team's games.  Including overviews of games, hints and conditions for various content, and almost anything else you might want to know about our games.  http://wantonverse.wikia.com/wiki/WantonVerse_Wiki

[[Special Thanks]]

[[Changelog:]]
passages.content_zh:
[成人內容]警告。若您未滿18歲，或容易感到冒犯，請立即離開。否則，祝您遊戲愉快！

如何遊玩本遊戲：
您角色的屬性數值可能對遊戲過程產生重大影響。

例如：感知值低的角色可能只獲得場景的基本描述；感知值中等的角色或許會注意到低感知者忽略的細節；而高感知值的角色甚至能察覺細微之處。

換言之，請在「每次遊玩」時保持專注，否則可能錯過重要情報。

此外，與大多數Twine遊戲不同，重複進行相同行動可能導致不同結果。部分遭遇/事件為隨機生成。多次造訪地點、每當推進劇情、與新角色交談或探索新地點後，再次與人物對話或檢查物品，都有可能觸發新內容。

附註：部分玩家可能認為本遊戲本質上令人恐懼或不安。遊玩風險請自行承擔，對於您遊玩後可能需要的任何心理治療，本人概不負責。

[開始遊戲。]

passages.name: Loud Conversation
passages.content:
<<if $Mutation gte 6>>I'm barely two paces inside of the room before I hear someone curse.  Conversation in that part of the room quickly dies out.  Then, like a ripple in a pond, conversations begin to fade then die out across the Barmaid's Daughter.

Though people are trying not to be obvious about it, I can tell that nearly everyone is looking at me.  //I've become a freak, twisted almost beyond recognition by this place.//

My thoughts delve to dark places as I continue to cross the room.

<<elseif $Mutation gte 4>>Walking across the room, conversations trail off as I pass each table, people looking at me with clear distaste as they see the terrible mutations I have experienced.

Tugging my coat tighter around myself as if it can somehow shield me from their scrutiny, I momentarily have to fight the urge to yell at them, to demand answers to what has been happening to me.  However, the cold looks in their eyes suggest to me that no answers would be forthcoming.

<<elseif $Mutation gte 2>>When I start to make my way across the Barmaid's Daughter, I can't help but notice the way some of the patrons are looking my way.  

Self consciously, I pull my coat tighter around myself in the hopes of hiding the worst of my mutations, but it only seems to make them stare harder.

<<else>>Just inside the Barmaid's Daughter, my attention is drawn to a table towards the far corner of the room where several locals are talking and laughing loudly.

About half of the people at the table are obviously female, and it's hard to tell for sure with a couple of others.  

it's only a moment before I turn my attention back to the room as a whole.

<<endif>>[[Continue on my way.|The Barmaids Daughter]]

passages.name: BackDoor
passages.content:
<<if $LockedOut is "Played">>I'm not really sure why I walk up onto the bluff, but I discover myself standing in the shadow of the Morichi mansion, looking up at the tall building.

I'm about to turn around and leave when I hear something above.

Turning my eyes upward, I can see a window, metal bars covering it, //Azumi's room,// I realize.

"Back door,"  You can hear Azumi's voice carry barely loud enough to hear over the wind, "Don't let anyone see you!"

You almost miss the glint of metal as something falls from the window.  Taking a quick step back, you follow the object as it falls, seeing it splash down in the muddy water.  

Kneeling down, you feel around in the mud and water in search of whatever was just thrown to you.  Your fingers close around a fist full of mud and something small.  Lifting your hand, you can't see what is it, so you swish your hand about in the puddle to rinse most of the mud from your fist before looking again. 

An old metal key lays across your palm.  

//I was told not to come back,//  You think, looking at the key, //But maybe I can sneak in and visit with Azumi one more time?//

You look up at the window.  Taking a step back so you can see it better, you can see the drapes covering the interior of the window, but no sign of Azumi.

Absently, I slip the key into my coat pocket.

[[Approach the back door.]]<<set $AzumiKey to "true">>

<<else>>Motion at one of the windows on the second story of the mansion draws my attention.  I can see the pink drapes settling back into place behind the heavy metal bars outside the window.

//Seems I had a secret observer,//  The thought amuses me more than anything else.

<</if>>[[Continue.|Bluff]]

passages.name: RobedSlum
passages.content:
<<if $GooCounter is 0 and $SailorGoo is "Played">> Walking through the run down residential area, I see something glistening wetly a head of me.

When I step forward to investigate, I see a puddle of White Goo in the grass beside the muddy street.  

It appears to be the same as the White Goo I've seen before.

[[Continue on my way.|Run down part of town.]]
or
[[Investigate Closer.|IG2]]<<set $GooCounter += 1>><<elseif $GooCounter is 1 and $SailorGoo is "Played">>I almost step in the White Goo before I see it glowing softly in the muddy street.

Pausing, I kneel down for a closer look at the White Goo.  

It only takes me a moment to determine that this White Goo looks just like what I've seen before.

[[Continue on my way.|Run down part of town.]]
or
[[Investigate Closer.|IG2]]<<set $GooCounter += 1>><<elseif $GooCounter is 2 and $SailorGoo is "Played">>For just a second, I think I see a cloaked figure.  The figure's hood is pulled up to conceal their features.

Before I can move to get a better look at the figure, the person slips stealthily between two apparently abandoned houses.  

By the time I reach the place I last saw the figure, the only sign that remains of the figure is the boot prints in the mud.

[[Continue on my way.|Run down part of town.]]<<set $GooCounter -= 2>><<else>>For just a second, I think I see a cloaked figure.  The figure's hood is pulled up to conceal their features.

Before I can move to get a better look at the figure, the person slips stealthily between two small houses.  

By the time I reach the place I last saw the figure, there is no sign of the cloaked figure.

[[Continue on my way.|Run down part of town.]]<<endif>>

passages.name: Places
passages.content:
[[return|$return]]
[[Back to Case Notes|Case Notes]]

<<if $WantonCove is "Played">>Wanton Cove.  A small fishing village just off the East coast.  

<</if>><<if $BrandallBluff is "Played">>Brandall's Bluff.  A large mansion rests on this bluff.  This is also where the town's former pastor threw himself into the sea about four years ago.

<</if>><<if $WoodHouse is "Played">>House in the woods.  A small wood cabin in a clearing in the woods.  Inhabited by Victor.

<</if>><<if $Geography is "Played">>The Cathedral.  A large cave on the island that has presumably been used by former inhabitants.  The walls are engraved with inscriptions.

<</if>><<if $Geography is "Played" && $FountainInvestigation is "Not Played">>Ruins:  There are ruins on the island that appear ancient.  Little is known of them, and nothing is known of the people who built them.

<<elseif $FountainInvestigation is "Played">>Ruins:  There are ruins on the island that appear ancient.  Little is known of them, and nothing is known of the people who built them.  Using what I learned from the old tome from the Church, I was able to make sense of a little of what was written there.  There's a clear link between these ruins and what I have seen in that book.<<if $RuinsFound is "Played">>

The ruins are a strange place.  So strange in fact that I have to wonder if the place was even created with human hands.  Everything seems alien to me.  The buildings look like they were as much grown as built.  Like ancient dead corals that could dwarf many of the buildings back home.  How can any place so beautiful be so unsettling at the same time?<</if>><</if>>

[[Back to Case Notes|Case Notes]]

[[return|$return]]

passages.name: Saved by Vick
passages.content:
Inside of Vick's cabin, he rushes to the far wall.  

I watch the door, assuming he's going for another weapon to defend ourselves with, instead when I glance back at him I see him standing with a first full of small bones.

Taking one more good look out the door towards the treeline, I see no sign of the cultists, then turn my attention back to Vick, “You ok?”

Ne nods, but does not reply.  Pressing the bones against the wound in his arm, //Looks like a flesh wound, nothing serious// he then uses a piece of cloth to bind them to the wound.

“You have more weapons?  We need to be prepared to defend this place.  They could attack at any moment.”

Vick lets out a bark of laughter, then shakes his head dismissively, “Iss place be sacred,”  His words are clearer than normal when he says it, my attention focusing exclusively on him in surprise, “Eh ont ome ere.”

“Why not?”  I glance towards the door again, uncertain.

Out of the corner of my eye, I see him shrug, wincing when he moves his injured arm, “Da ame eason //she// one ome ere.”  His says through an unhappy sneer.

Sensing that the conversation isn't going anywhere useful, I glance out the door again, still seeing none of the cultists.  Eventually I turn my attention back to Vick.

[[What's your story?]]

[[What can you tell me about Wanton Cove?]]

[[Who is SHE?]]

[[Do you know anything about a guy named Tom?]]<<if $Pastor is "Played">>

[[Ask Vick about the Pastor.]]<</if>><<if $Taint gte 95>>  

[[Ask Vick about your transformation.]]<</if>><<if $VickSex is "Played">><<if $Mutation lte 7>>

[[Have sex with Vick|getVickLink()]]<</if>><</if>>

or
[[Done talking to Vick.|Enter the Log Cabin.]]

passages.name: HighTaintEndAzumi
passages.content:
I glance around to see where Vick is, and seeing no immediate threat, I pull off my long jacket and throw it across Azumi's body to give her some modesty.  //Besides, if I can get her out of these chains, I can wrap her in it.//

She looks at me finally, not saying a word.  But in her eyes I can see her trust, her hope that I'll be able to save her from this.  In that moment, I know that I would do anything for her.

Reaching for one of the chains holding her wrists, I tug at it once before deciding I'm never going to be able to break the old iron shackles.

But then I see the key, resting on the altar almost perfectly between her wrists.  I quickly grab it and begin to unlock the shackles, revealing raw red wrists smeared in blood from her struggles, //She fought hard when they chained her up.// 

When the last lock has been released, I look around again, but still see now sign of anyone or anything, though the chanting continues softly all around me.

"Sorry, this might hurt a bit,"  I say to Azumi before I pull the long jacket off of her again.

Laying the jacket beside her, I carefully pick her up.  A task I find difficult with my feminine frame.  Laying her on the jacket, I wrap her in it, then pick her up.

"Don't you think you're a clever one,"  Vick's voice comes from somewhere nearby, though I can not tell from where, "Taking her now won't save her.  What's begun must be finished, and there is nothing you can do to stop it."

Trying to ignore him, I glance down at Azumi, cradled in my arms, //How can she feel so light all of a sudden?//

Turning my eyes to the fog around me, I search for any possible escape.

[[Continue.|HighTaintEndAzumiFinal]]

passages.name: Main4
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>A figure is running down the street, wearing clothes that are clearly too large for them.  When they get closer, I can see that it’s a woman wearing men’s clothing.

Anywhere else, I’d find the scene amusing, but here in Wanton Cove it only serves to leave me feeling troubled.

<<if $Madness gte 3>>My eyes widen at the sight, not because of the woman or how she is dressed, but instead in horror at the shadows I see, dark patches reflecting off the rain rippled puddles that are formed in each place her boot presses into the muddy street.

I want to cry out, to flee, but instead I am rooted to the spot as I wait for black tentacles of shadow to lunge forth to entangle me. 

//It’s not real.//  I try to tell myself, but I know the thought for a lie even if I was somehow able to ignore the sound of the laughing whispers that threaten to deafen me.<<elseif $Madness is 2>>The whispers in my mind seem to coo, clearly amused.  I try to shut them out, with limited success.<<elseif $Madness is 1>>//Is it really a woman though?//  The though sobers my mood.<<else>><<endif>><<else>>As I walk, I can see someone moving down the street, clearly in a hurry.  It seems odd the way they are clutching at their clothes, as if trying to hold them in place.  It reminds me of a child trying to dress in their parent’s clothes.
  
As the figure gets close enough to see clearly, I can see that it’s actually a woman wearing men’s clothing.

I have just enough time to find the scene amusing before I notice the look on the woman’s face.  The self-conscious expression leaves my smile stillborn on my lips.<<endif>>

[[Continue on my way.|Head into the center of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]一個身影正沿著街道奔跑，身上穿著明顯過大的衣物。當對方靠近時，我看清那是一個穿著男裝的女人。

若是在其他地方，我或許會覺得這場景有趣，但在萬頓灣這裡，這只讓我感到不安。

[IF $Madness gte 3]我瞪大了雙眼，並非因為那個女人或她的穿著，而是驚恐地看見那些陰影——每當她的靴子踩進泥濘的街道，雨水漣漪的水窪便映出一塊塊黑暗的斑痕。

我想尖叫、想逃跑，卻像被釘在原地般動彈不得，等待著黑影觸手猛然竄出將我纏繞。

passages.name: commonRuinsEvents
Inn2
passages.content:
Entering the hall that leads to my room, I hear a sound.  //Did that come from //my// room?//  

Before I even complete the thought, my hand is on the handle of my .38 Special as I cautiously move towards my door.  My eyes trace the frame, seeking any sign of forced entry or that the door may be ajar, but I see nothing.

My pistol clears its holster with a soft whisper of steel on leather as my other hand reaches for the doorknob.

Very slowly, I turn the knob until it wont turn any more.  I can still hear the sound from within my room, like talons being pulled lightly across gravel.  Throwing my weight into the door, it slams open, revealing my room, light off, and visibly empty.  

For several seconds, I let my eyes drift over the interior, searching every nook and cranny for any sign of a remaining intruder before I finally reach for the light switch to bathe the room in soft yellow light.

The sound comes again, from near the window.  The window is cracked open, the wind blowing droplets of rain through the gap to spatter on the floor.  //That explains the sound,//  I think uneasily, the realization making me more on edge than before, //But this is the second story, . . . and I'm sure that window was closed when I last left this room.//

Pushing the window the rest of the way open, I look out it for several seconds before closing it completely.  Then I take several minutes searching the room in exagerated detail, finding nothing out of place.

My mood is sour as I glance around the room one last time before concluding that there is no sign of any intruder, assuming that there was one in the first place.

[[Continue.|Your room.]]

passages.content: At 48 years of age, I've served my country through the end of the great war. Afterwards, I joined the force, spent almost twenty-five years trying to make the streets a safer place. Two of that was spent trying to solve a case that couldn't be solved. I turned in my badge when they told me to file the case away and move on. I've lived the two years since at the bottom of a bottle. I was never a particularly large man. Standing at 5' 10" and 180lbs. My square jaw perpetually sports about three days' worth of stubble, just a hint of gray near the temples. My brown hair is thick, but cut short. Above my beak like nose, my gray eyes are sharp and alert. I'm not fat, but I'd be lying if I said there wasn't a hint of belly on me, a bit of fat over what was once a well toned body back in my prime. passages.name: Crawl beneath the covers to huddle against the dark.
passages.content:
Stripping down for the night, I slip beneath the cool blankets of my bed.  Pulling them tightly around myself, pulling them over my head, I leave just enough room near my face that I can peer out at my room.

//Clu, thech scheeaana r'luh tharanak.// The voice whispers to me constantly now.

I try to sleep, but its difficult to do with my eyes open.  They feel gritty from lack of blinking, but I dare not close them for fear that //she// will come.

"k'yarnak 'fhalma uhnn n'gh'tha kadishtu urrh,"

//Shadows, have to watch the shadows.  That's the first sign of her presence.//  With horror, I realize that //her// shadows could blend so easily into the darkened room.  Or worse yet, //she// could slip beneath my blankets without ever being seen until it is far too late.

"Ch'yar ul'nyar shaggornyth."

I spring from the bed, fearful that she may have somehow found her way into my blankets.  Stumbling backwards across the room, refusing to look away from the bed, I finaly find the wall and follow it by touch to the light switch.  Flipping it, the room is bathed in light.

The voice becomes softer, barely a whisper.  But I can still understand the words.

Trembling, I sink to the floor, pulling my knees up tight against my chest.  I fight sleep for as long as I can, watching the blankets on the bed for any sign of movement.  I can clearly see the shadows some of the blankets cast, and I'm vigilant in my observation so I will see the first sign of //her// movement.

As the sky begins to brighten, announcing a new day, [[I unwillingly drift off to sleep.]]
passages.content_zh:
脫下衣服準備就寢，我鑽進冰涼的床單裡。將被子緊緊裹在身上，甚至拉過頭頂，只在臉旁留出一點縫隙，讓我能窺視房間。

克魯，瑟奇亞納·拉爾·塔拉納克。那聲音現在不停地對我低語。

我試圖入睡，但睜著眼睛很難做到。它們因缺乏眨眼而感到乾澀，但我卻不敢閉上，生怕她會來。

「克·雅納克·法爾瑪·恩·格塔·卡迪什圖·烏爾，」

影子，必須注意影子。那是她出現的第一個徵兆。我驚恐地意識到，她的影子可以如此輕易地融入黑暗的房間。或者更糟的是，她可能潛入我的被子底下，直到為時已晚才會被發現。

「奇亞爾·烏爾尼亞爾·沙格諾斯。」

我從床上彈了起來，害怕她可能已經不知怎麼鑽進了我的被子。我踉蹌著退到房間另一頭，眼睛死死盯著床鋪，最後終於摸到牆壁，順著牆摸索到了電燈開關。啪的一聲，房間籠罩在光亮中。

那聲音變得更輕，幾乎成了耳語。但我仍能聽懂那些話語。

我顫抖著癱坐在地板上，將膝蓋緊緊抱在胸前。我盡可能長時間地抗拒睡意，緊盯著床上的被子，尋找任何動靜的跡象。我能清楚地看到一些被子投下的陰影，我保持警覺地觀察著，以便能第一時間察覺她的動作。

當天空開始泛白，宣告新的一天來臨時，[我不情願地沉入了夢鄉。]

passages.name: Park2
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>><<if $Madness gte 3>>I can hear //her// whispering in the back of my mind, asousing me with the sound of her voice.  The language she speaks to me feels alien, however I feel like I am on the cusp of understanding.

Shivering, I begin to mumble to myself, not even noticing that many of the sounds I am making have an eery resemblance to the whispers I am trying to drown out.

<<elseif $Madness is 2>>When I near the fountain, I can hear a soft, feminine voice whisper to me.  In bare moments, I realize that the guttral sounds are echoing within my mind and have no place in the material world.  

I shiver, my thoughts turning momentarily to //her.//

<<elseif $Madness is 1>>There is a soft whisper that I can hear, barely heard over the sound of faling rain.  I tilt my head, listening as I try to figure out where the sound may be coming from.  When I ficus on the sound, it seems to fade however, drifting from my grasp.

<<else>>A sudden shiver goes through me as an icy bead of rain finds its way under the collar of my jacket to race down my spine.  As soon as it ends its descent, I pull my coat a little tighter around myself in the hopes of repeating the experience.

<<endif>><<else>>A chill wind cuts through the park, buffering my jacket.  I try to pull it tighter around myself, shielding myself from the worst of the weather.

Looking around myself, I can see the limp brown grass shift, reppling like a thing alive as the wind passes through it.<<endif>>

[[Continue on your way.|overgrown park]]
