passages.name: I take it.
passages.content:
Two days later, I've flown out to the east coast, and boarded a ferry to an island just off the coast.  My destination is the little fishing village named Wanton Cove.

I find myself standing on the deck, looking out over the choppy waters.  The wind is coming from the south, bringing with it a sweltering heat, my brown leather duster cracking sharply around me as a particularly strong gust of wind catches it.

Ahead, I can see the island, my destination.  From where I'm standing, all I can see is a sea of green trees over a particularly hilly island.  The wide stony beach wraps itself around the island, except for the little cove we're pointed straight at.  

I can see three large docks jutting out into the water, the little town seeming to blend right into the trees behind it.

Above and behind me, the ship's horn sounds, followed by the Captain announcing that we will be arriving shortly.

Casting one last look at the island, [[I head below deck to gather my meager belongings.]]

passages.name: Leave Deep One
passages.content:
Wary, and not wanting to fight a fight that I might not be able to win, I keep my eyes on the creature as I start to slowly back away from the Deep One.

I've taken perhaps a dozen paces before I see the Deep One's hand quicken its pace, stroking itself faster.  Its hips shift suddenly, shaking, then it releases its cock as long stream of off white fluid erupts from the tip of its tapered shaft.

If I hadn't been backing away from the creature, there's no way I would have gotten far enough away to dodge the fluid.  Even so, I quickly move to the side and only narrowly miss being hit at the puddle of fluid splashes the ground to my side.

I glance at the creatures seed, then back towards where the creature just was.  Its alerady gone, nowhere to be seen.  

Wide eyed, I watch all around myself, searching for any sign of where it may have gone.  

Trying to watch in every direction at once in case the thing returns, I begin to walk again.

[[Continue on your way.|the waterfront]]

passages.name: B1B
passages.content:
"Mind telling me why you were out here?"  I ask, watching her eyes.

"My,"  Ms Sherwood pauses so briefly that I almost miss it, "brother, Burt, he left on the fishing boat a little while ago.  I came down to the docks to see him off."  She says, "He's the only family I have."

I glance out at the cove.  Out in the open ocean, barely visible, I can see a fishing boat moving away from Wanton Cove

我望向海灣。在遠闊的海面上，勉強可見一艘漁船正駛離萬頓灣。

passages.name: Storm Coming.
passages.content:
Entering the tavern, I glance towards the wondows that point out towards the cove.  

On the horizon I can see dark foreboding clouds, churning visibly at they roil towards the shore.  

"Looks like a nasty storm,"  A feminine voice says.  I glance towards the person, thinking at first that its a woman, but noticing the adam's apple and thin beard, I quickly realize that its a man, "If its anything like the last one, it will be a week or more before the ferry from the mainland comes back again.

//Well shit.  I might be stuck here for a few more days.//  I think to myself.  Part of me wonders if I should have heeded the warnings and left before now, but all I have to do is think about Peter and his son Tom before I realize I've done the right thing, //Got to bring his boy home.//

For another minute, I watch the clouds.  Occasional flashes light the swirling mass of clouds that seem to be headed straight at me, //Nasty storm indeed.//

[[Continue.|The Barmaids Daughter]]

passages.name: HighTaintEndTanya
passages.content:
I look at Azumi, her glazed expression staring into nothing, and think of Tanya's scream just moments ago.

Internally, I struggle with what to do.  //She's chained to the altar, I can come back for her once I know Tanya is safe.//  "I'll be back for you,"  I promise Azumi, though she shows no indication that she heard my words, //I came to Wanton Cove to find Tanya, Tom,//  I shake my head violently, trying to focus my jumbled thoughts, //She's my first priority.//

Looking one more time at Azumi, I get a sickening feeling that it's the last time I'll ever lay eyes upon her.  When I pull my gaze away, I start in the direction I last heard Tanya's scream, "Tanya!"  I cry out, hoping for any reply.

The swirling fog drifts around me, swallowing me as I walk willingly away from the altar in search of Tanya.

Behind me, Azumi lurches and strains suddenly at the chains, her mouth open in a silent scream that I do not hear.

[[Continue.|HighTaintEndTanyaFinal]]
passages.content_zh:
我看著Azumi，她目光呆滯地凝視著虛無，腦中迴盪著Tanya片刻前的尖叫。

內心掙扎著該怎麼做。她被鎖在祭壇上，等我確定Tanya安全後還能回來找她。「我會回來救你的，」我向Azumi承諾，雖然她毫無反應，似乎沒聽見我的話。我來萬頓灣是為了找Tanya和Tom——我猛力搖頭，試圖理清混亂的思緒——她才是我的首要任務。

最後看了Azumi一眼，一股噁心的預感湧上：這可能是我最後一次見到她了。移開視線後，我朝最後聽見Tanya尖叫的方向走去。「Tanya！」我大喊，期盼任何回應。

漩渦般的迷霧在我周身飄蕩，當我毅然離開祭壇尋找Tanya時，霧氣吞噬了我的身影。

在我身後，Azumi突然猛烈掙動鎖鏈，張嘴發出無聲的尖叫——而我未曾聽見。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Who is SHE?
passages.content:
Hesitantly, I ask, "You keep mentioning //her.//'  I pause, steeling my resolve to continue, "Who exactly is she?"

A look crosses Vick's features, fear, awe, and madness, all in equal measure, "//She// be da mother uh madness."

For several seconds, Vick stares at me, as if daring me to challange his words.  I remain silent hoping that he'll say more, but he does not.

"Can you tell me any more about her?"  I add slowly.

"She be ere un Wannan Cove.  We ah be doomed."  Vick's intinsety leaves me feeling unsettled and I choose not to push the conversation further.

Vick臉上閃過複雜的神情——恐懼、敬畏與瘋狂，各佔三分。「她是瘋狂之母。」

Vick盯著我數秒，像在挑釁我反駁他的話。我保持沉默，希望他多說些，但他沒有。

「能再多告訴我關於她的事嗎？」我緩緩追問。

「她在這兒，在萬頓灣。我們注定完蛋。」Vick的激烈語氣讓我感到不安，我決定不再追問下去。

passages.name: Why did you slap me?
passages.content:
"Why did you slap me like that?"  I ask, a little more heat in my tone than I had intended.

Tanya seems to flinch back slightly at my anger, then meets my gaze.  I can see her own anger looking back at me, "Not willing to listen to reason,"  She hisses, then adds in a playful tone that others around the Barmaid's Daughter can likely hear, "If you want to play with me, you have to pay me."

She bites her lips seductively, giving me a smile that does not quite touch her eyes.

passages.name: Outside Room
passages.content:
Outside of my room, I can hear the soft creak of footsteps, punctuated by the sound of a hard soled shoe striking the wooden floor as someone slowly walks down the hallway.  Slowly, the footsteps come closer to my room's door until they abruptly stop right outside of my door.  

Tensing, I reach for my .38 Special.  The use polished handle feels good in my hand as my fingers slip around it.

For several long heartbeats, I wait, not sure if someone is going to knock, or simply break down the door.

As suddenly as the footsteps stop, I hear the footsteps begin again, walking back the way they came.

My pulse still pounding, I move towards the door, opening it only as far as I need to in order to glance down the hallway, only to find the hallway empty.

Searching the hallway with my eyes, I see no evidence of whoever was in the hallway just moments before.

Concern creasing my features, [[I close the door once more.|Your room.]]
passages.content_zh:
房門外，我聽見輕柔的腳步吱嘎聲，夾雜硬底鞋踏在木地板上的聲響——有人正緩緩走過走廊。腳步聲逐漸靠近我的房門，最終突兀地停在我門外。

我繃緊身體，伸手去抓我的.38特製左輪。握上打磨光滑的槍柄時，手指環繞的觸感令人安心。

漫長如數次心跳的時間裡，我等待著，不確定門外的人會敲門，還是直接破門而入。

正如腳步聲驟然停止那般突然，我又聽見腳步聲再次響起，沿著來時的路徑離去。

心跳仍劇烈鼓動，我走向房門，僅將門拉開一條縫隙窺視走廊——走廊卻空無一人。

目光掃過整條走廊，找不到片刻前還在門外的任何蹤跡。

憂慮皺上眉頭，[我再次關上門。]

passages.name: Watch Deep One Masturbate.
passages.content:
Staying in place, I find myself transfixed by the sight before me.  

I'm not sure if its more curiosity, or more arousal that causes me to watch this vile //thing// stroke itself.  

Seeing no sign that it intends me any harm, I see its bit hand sliding up and down its shaft in increasingly rapid motions.  All the while those blank eyes stare unblinking at me.

Without warning, it makes a deep rumbling sound in its chest, then shifts its hips forward as it releases its cock.  A long stream of off white fluid erupts from the tip of its tapered shaft.

I try to move out of its way, but I'm not quick enough.  Its seed catches me full in the face.  I sputter, instinctively trying, but largely failing to wipe the thick stuff from myself.

The Deep One makes a sound resembling laughter, then slinks into the shadows.  Meanwhile, I gag, wretching as what feels like a sudden sickness washes through me.

[[Continue.|Deep One Change]]

passages.name: SailorMain
passages.content:
A short distance down the street, walking toward me, I see <<if $GooCounter is 0>>a burly sailor, a tuft of hair visible through his shirt where his top button is not done.<<set $GooCounter += 1>><<elseif $GooCounter is 1>>a slightly built, feminine sailor.  At a glance, I could almost mistake him for a woman. <<set $GooCounter += 1>><<elseif $GooCounter gte 2>>a female sailor, her dark hair pulled back into a tight bun.  Her hard eyes meet mine for a second before looking away.  <<set $GooCounter -= 2>><</if>>

In a few more steps, the two of us have closed the distance between us.  Then, in the blink of an eye I've passed the sailor.  

I let my gaze flicker over my shoulder at the receding figure, but all I see is the dull brown raincoat and the drooping  rain hat on the sailor's head.  <<if $Day gte 5>>

All the while, the rain pours from the sky relentlessly.<</if>>

[[Continue on my way.|Head into the center of town.]]

passages.name: Continue into the ruins.
passages.content:
If it wasn't for the danger I know lurks within these ruins, I would marvel at the strange beauty of the buildings.  I'd be transfixed by the colors reflected by the smooth surfaces.  

Instead the memory of the tentacled thing is first and foremost on my mind.  

Alert to possible dangers, I begin to walk down the stone road.  Most of the road looks to be made of simple stone, but occasionally I can see a stone that reflects the light the same way most of the buildings do.  

All around me the buildings that make up the ruins can be seen.  Many of them are overgrown with vines, moss and even trees while others stand in almost pristine beauty.  The smallest buildings seem to rest at the edge of the ruins, while the buildings become larger, many of which pierce the canopy of the forest, the further into the forgotten city I go.

<<ruinslink "Search the Ruins.">>

[[Leave the Ruins.|Turn back toward Vick's place.]]

passages.name: Ruins20
passages.content:
Stepping inside one of the strange buildings, I begin to look around.  I'm not looking for anything specific, but it's not long before my eyes fall upon the large dip in the floor, a pool of sorts.  

Inside of it, I see dozens, perhaps a hundred or more round orbs.  Each orb is brown and brittle looking, shriveled like a raisin.

I move closer, prodding one of the orbs with my boot and cracking it in doing so.  A rancid smell strikes my nostrils with a suddenness that makes me gag.  

Thick black fluid oozes from the cracked orb, chunks of grayish matter accompanied by bits of what might be small bones dot the fluid.

Part of me wants to learn more, to figure out what manner of creature might have laid such eggs, but the smell of the thing is enough to force my retreat from the building.

My thoughts linger on the pool of rotting eggs as I return to exploring the ruins.

[[Continue.|Continue into the ruins.]]

passages.name: Ask Phil about the White Goo.
passages.content:
"I've been seeing this White Goo around town, you know anything about that?"  I ask.

"White Goo?"  Phil's brow creases in thought, "You mean the jellyfish?  The darn things wash up on shore all the time.  Don't go touching them, they can still sting you."<<if $Madness gte 1>>

//Cound he really be so clueless about what is going on around here?//<<endif>>

Ask about:
<<if $TomTanya is "Not Played">>[[Ask Phil about Tom.]]
<</if>>[[Ask Phil about Wanton Cove.]]<<if $PastorErkon is "Played">>
[[Ask Phil about the Pastor.]]<</if>><<if $Taint gte 40>>
[[Ask Phil about your physical changes.|Ask Phil about your transformation.]]<<endif>><<if $DOneSighting is "Played">>
[[Ask Phil about the creatures you've seen in the water.]]<<endif>>
<<if $FountainInvestigated is "Played">>[[Ask Phil about the Ruins.]]

<</if>>
or
[[That is all for now.  Exit the Shipbuilder's Shack.|Go check out the shipbuilder's shack.]]

passages.name: Do you know where Mr Jackobson might have gotten off to?
passages.content:
"He's a fisherman,"  Aaron says, his expression sharpening suddenly, "He probably set out on one of the boats heading out."

He gives a little shrug, "Keep an eye on his place, he'll turn up eventually,"  His tone is dismissive.

Ask about:
<<if $TomTanya is "Not Played">>[[I'm looking for a young man named Tom who might have passed through.]]
<</if>>[[Wanton Cove]]
<<if $FirstStatue is "Played">>[[Church]]
[[Statues]]
<</if>><<if $Day is 2>><<if $Pastor is "Played">>[[Tell me more about the pastor.]]
<</if>><</if>><<if $MotherTalk is "Played">>[[Ask Aaron about the Morichi Family.]]
<</if>><<if $Fountain is "Played">>[[Engravings on the fountain.]]
<</if>><<if $SailorGoo is "Played">>[[White Goo.]]
<</if>><<if $Body1 is "Played">>[[Body on the shore.]]
<</if>><<if $FountainInvestigated is "Played">>
[[Ask Aaron about the Ruins.]]<</if>>or
[[Step away from the Bartender.|The Barmaids Daughter]]
passages.content_zh:
「他是個漁夫，」Aaron 說道，表情突然變得銳利，「他很可能搭上其中一艘出海的船了。」

他微微聳肩，「留意他的住處，他遲早會出現的。」他的語氣帶著敷衍。

詢問關於：
[IF $TomTanya is "Not Played"][我在找一個可能經過這裡、名叫 Tom 的年輕人。]
[/IF][萬頓灣]
[IF $FirstStatue is "Played"][教堂]
[雕像]
[/IF][IF $Day is 2][IF $Pastor is "Played"][告訴我更多關於牧師的事。]
[/IF][/IF][IF $MotherTalk is "Played"][向 Aaron 詢問 Morichi 家族的事。]
[/IF][IF $Fountain is "Played"][噴泉上的刻文。]
[/IF][IF $SailorGoo is "Played"][白色黏液。]
[/IF][IF $Body1 is "Played"][岸邊的屍體。]
[/IF][IF $FountainInvestigated is "Played"]
[向 Aaron 詢問遺跡的事。][/IF]或
[離開酒保身邊。]

passages.name: Into House
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>As I move down the street, I see a woman running through a sudden downpour or rain, aiming for one of the buildings along the way.  Once there, she seems to fumble with the door for a moment before it swings open.  As soon as it does so, she quickly ducks inside to get out of the rain.

In the distance, thunder rumbles like a growling beast.<<else>>A little distance a head of me, I see someone sweeping the sidewalk of wood that stretches along the storefronts that dot the side of the street.  

She pauses, glancing up at me.

I meet her eyes and give a half nod in greeting.  

Instead of returning my gesture, she instead glances one last time at the stretch of sidewalk she had been sweeping, then steps inside the nearest shop.

Once she's out of sight, I think I hear the faint sound of the door's deadbolt sliding home.<</if>>

[[Continue on your way.|Head into the center of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]當我沿街走去，看見一名女子在驟雨中奔跑，衝向路邊其中一棟建築。一到門前，她似乎手忙腳亂地摸索了一會兒門把，門才猛地打開。門一開，她便迅速閃身躲進屋內避雨。

遠處，雷聲轟鳴，如同野獸的低吼。[ELSE]在我前方不遠處，看見有人正在清掃店鋪前延伸的木製人行道。

她停下動作，抬眼瞥向我。

我迎上她的目光，微微點頭致意。

她沒有回應我的示意，反而最後看了一眼剛才清掃的人行道區域，隨即走進最近的店鋪。

她一離開視線，我彷彿聽見門栓輕輕扣上的微弱聲響。[/IF]

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: Shipbuilder Shack
passages.content:
Entering the shipbuilder's shack, my eyes drift over the seemingly random assortment of wood, tools and machinery that fill the shack's interior.  

Following the oil lamps that dimly light the interior through the winding path that leads to the back of the shack, it isnt long before I see Phil, engrossed in his work, towards the back of the shop. 

"Hello!"  I call, giving him some warning that I am coming.

When he glances up from his work, his expression changes slightly, <<if $Mutation gte 5>> visibly off put by my recent transformations.  It takes him a moment to recover before he continues,<<else>>seeming to lighten his mood,<</if>> "Coming by to visit?  Or planning to grill me about your missing friend again?"  His voice holds a hint of humor.

[[Mind if I ask you a few questions?|Shipbuilder QA]]

[[Exit the Shipbuilder's Shack.|Go check out the shipbuilder's shack.]]
passages.content_zh:
走進造船工的小屋，我的目光掃過屋內看似隨意堆放的木料、工具和機械。

沿著油燈昏暗的光線，穿過蜿蜒通往小屋後方的走道，沒多久就看見 Phil 在店鋪後頭專注地工作。

「你好！」我出聲喊道，給他一點我靠近的預警。

他從工作中抬起頭，表情微微變化，[IF $Mutation gte 5]明顯被我近期的變異嚇了一跳。他花了一會兒才恢復鎮定，接著繼續說道，[ELSE]似乎心情變得輕快些，[/IF]「來逛逛？還是打算再拷問我關於你失蹤朋友的事？」他的語氣帶著一絲幽默。

[介意我問幾個問題嗎？]

[離開造船工的小屋。]

passages.name: BluffCarcas
passages.content:
As I near the top of the bluff, I hear the sounds of crows somewhere nearby.  Looking around, I see maybe a dozen crows huddled over a shape in the dieing grass.

When I draw closer, the crows explode into the air all at once, //Caw! Caw!"//  The sounds of their wings flapping violently as they fly towards the treeline.

<<if $Day gte 5>>Squinting into the rain, <</if>>I only watch them fly for a second before returning my attention to the shape in the brown grass.  The sickly sweet smell of rotting flesh hits my nose only a split second before I realize that I'm looking at a dog carcass, half eaten by the crows.

I don't know if its curiosity, or if I think I might actually learn something useful, but I step closer to the carcass, looking at the bare bones, the rain matted fur clinging to rotting flesh.

My lip curls in distaste, stepping back [[away from the carcass.|Bluff]]
passages.content_zh:
接近懸崖頂端時，我聽見附近某處傳來烏鴉的叫聲。環顧四周，看見約十幾隻烏鴉聚在一處枯黃草叢中的形體上。

當我靠得更近，烏鴉群瞬間轟然飛起，「嘎！嘎！」牠們猛烈拍打翅膀的聲音隨著牠們飛向樹林的方向而遠去。

[IF $Day gte 5]我瞇眼望向雨中，[/IF]只看了牠們飛走一秒，便將注意力轉回枯黃草叢中的形體。腐肉的甜膩氣味衝進鼻腔，僅遲半秒我才意識到自己正看著一具狗的屍骸，已被烏鴉啃食了一半。

不知是出於好奇，還是覺得真能發現什麼有用的線索，我朝屍骸又走近一步，盯著裸露的骨頭、被雨水浸濕黏在腐肉上的毛皮。

我厭惡地撇了撇嘴，後退[遠離屍骸。]

passages.name: Dock2
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>From where I am standing, I can see the nearest dock moving up and down as wave after wave crash against it.  Meanwhile, two individuals, both wearing heavy rain coats work on the dock, seemingly untroubled by the way it moves beneath their feet.  After moving several crates from the end of the dock to the shore, both figures retreat to the relative shelter of the warehouse near the docks.  <<else>>A ship moored to the dock is a hive of activity.  Two people, a man and a woman are on the boat’s deck.  Three more people, One obviously male, one female, and the last one is more difficult to tell, are busy working at the boat’s side, as all five people work to unload the ship’s catch.  

//Never realized so many women worked in the fishing industry.//  The stray thought is enough to make me ponder the implications.  <<endif>>

[[Continue on my way.|the waterfront]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]從我站立的位置，能看見最近的碼頭隨著一波波浪潮拍打而上浮下沉。同時，兩個穿著厚重雨衣的人正在碼頭上工作，似乎對腳下晃動的碼頭毫不在意。將幾個板條箱從碼頭末端搬到岸上後，兩人都退到碼頭附近倉庫的相對遮蔽處。[ELSE]一艘停泊在碼頭的船隻正忙得不可開交。兩個人，一男一女，站在甲板上。另外三人，一個明顯是男性，一個是女性，最後一個則較難辨認，正忙著在船舷作業，五人合力卸下船上的漁獲。

從沒意識到這麼多女性從事漁業。這偶然的念頭足以讓我深思其中的含義。[/IF]

[繼續我的路程。]

passages.name: B1F
passages.content:
"Can you think of anyone who might have wanted to hurt anyone here in town?"  I ask.

Ms Sherwood looks almost troubled, as if she's struggling to find an answer, "No, nothing like this, never."  She says softly, pointedly not looking at the body, her expression clearly troubled.

"You're sure?  I probe.

"Yeah,"  Her answer is more sure this time.

Ask about:
[[You have any idea who she was?|B1A]]
[[What are you doing out here on the beach today?|B1B]]
<<if $B1Limp is "Played">>
[[Anyone go missing who had a limp?|B1C]]
<</if>><<if $B1Goo is "Played">>
[[Any idea why there would be White Goo on the body?|B1D]]
<</if>><<if $B1Sex is "Played">>
[[Is there anyone in town who would sexually assault someone?|B1E]]
<</if>>
[[If I have any further questions, where can I find you?]]

or

[[I'm done talking to Ms Sherwood.|Investigate the pale shape amongst the rocks.]]
passages.content_zh:
「你能想到有誰可能想傷害鎮上的任何人嗎？」我問道。

Sherwood女士看起來幾乎有些困擾，彷彿正努力尋找答案，「不，從來沒有發生過這種事。」她輕聲說道，刻意不看向屍體，表情明顯透著不安。

「你確定？」我追問。

「是的。」這次她的回答更肯定些。

詢問：
[你知道她是誰嗎？]
[你今天來海灘做什麼？]
[IF $B1Limp is "Played"]
[有沒有跛腳的人失蹤了？]
[/IF][IF $B1Goo is "Played"]
[知道為什麼屍體上會有白色黏液嗎？]
[/IF][IF $B1Sex is "Played"]
[鎮上有誰會性侵他人嗎？]
[/IF]
[如果我還有其他問題，去哪兒能找到你？]

或

[我問完Sherwood女士了。]

passages.name: Aroused Lady 1
passages.content:
My eyebrows lift slightly when I lay eyes on the brunette lady serving drinks at one of the tavern's tables.

With a tankard in each hand, she's standing still.  There is a man sitting in a chair on one side of her, his hand up her long skirt.  From what I can see of her face, she appears flushed with arousal, biting her lip to stifle her soft moans.

As I watch, a second man steps up behind her, pulling down the front of her dress to expose her ample breasts.

<<if $Depravity gte 5>><<else>>//Scandalous!  That people would do such a thing in public!//  I think in shock.

<</if>>A short while later, the woman sits the two drinks on the table, then pulls away from the two men, smiling and giggling.

As an afterthought, she pulls the top of her dress back in place to cover her bosom before heading back towards the bar.

[[Continue on my way.|The Barmaids Daughter]]
passages.content_zh:
當我看見那位在酒館桌邊服務飲料的棕髮女士時，眉毛微微揚起。

她雙手各拿著一只大啤酒杯，靜止站著。有個男人坐在她身旁的椅子上，手伸進她的長裙裡。從我能看見的臉部判斷，她似乎因興奮而臉頰潮紅，咬著嘴唇壓抑輕柔的呻吟。

正當我注視時，第二個男人從她身後靠近，拉下她連身裙的前襟，露出豐滿的雙乳。

[IF $Depravity gte 5][ELSE]太荒唐了！竟然有人在公共場合做這種事！我震驚地想。

[/IF]過了一會兒，女人將兩杯飲料放在桌上，然後從兩個男人身邊抽身，微笑著咯咯輕笑。

像是事後想起般，她將裙襖拉回原位遮住胸部，才轉身走向吧檯。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: Question Aaron.
passages.content:
"Mind if I ask a few questions?"  I ask, not pausing long enough for him to answer before I ask my first question.

Aaron's eyes flicker to the body, then towards the Barmaid's Daughter before finally settling on me.  

Ask about:
[[You have any idea who she was?]]
[[What are you doing out here on the beach today?]]<<if $B1Limp is "Played">>
[[Anyone go missing who had a limp?]]<</if>><<if $B1Goo is "Played">>
[[Any idea why there would be White Goo on the body?]]<</if>><<if $B1Sex is "Played">>
[[Is there anyone in town who would sexually assault someone?]]<</if>><<if $B1Shoulder is "Played">>
[[Can you think of anyone who might try hurting someone like that?]]<</if>><<if $B1Water is "Played">>
[[Any idea how long she might have been in the water?]]<</if>>
or
[[I'm done talking to Aaron.|Investigate the pale shape amongst the rocks.]]<<set $Body1A to "Played">>
passages.content_zh:
「介意我問幾個問題嗎？」我問道，沒給他回答的時間就提出第一個問題。

Aaron的目光掃向屍體，接著飄向「酒保的女兒」方向，最後落在我身上。

詢問：
[你知道她是誰嗎？]
[你今天來海灘做什麼？][IF $B1Limp is "Played"]
[有沒有跛腳的人失蹤了？][/IF][IF $B1Goo is "Played"]
[知道為什麼屍體上會有白色黏液嗎？][/IF][IF $B1Sex is "Played"]
[鎮上有誰會性侵他人嗎？][/IF][IF $B1Shoulder is "Played"]
[你能想到有誰可能試圖那樣傷害人嗎？][/IF][IF $B1Water is "Played"]
[知道她可能在水裡待多久了嗎？][/IF]
或
[我問完Aaron了。]

passages.name: DogFuck
passages.content:
A feminine grunt pulls my attention to a nearby alley.

In the alley, a woman is kneeling in the mud, a large dog poised over her.

I'm almost instantly in motion, reaching for my .38 Special, when I realize that the woman isn't being attacked by the dog.

I pause, <<if $Depravity lte 7>>disgust evident on my face.<<else>>a hint of arousal washing over me.<</if>>  The woman's skirt is pulled up around her hips, the dog thrusting roughly into her.  Her own thrusts are timed to meet the animal's violently thrusting hips.

The woman's eyes meet my own, a wanton moan escaping her full lips as the dog thrusts forward one last time, burying its knot inside of her.

For several seconds, I stand there, the woman's gaze holding my own.

Shivering, not entirely from the dampness of my jacket, I pull my gaze away and [[leave the alley behind me.|Run down part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
一聲女性的悶哼將我的注意力引向附近的小巷。

巷子裡，一個女人跪在泥濘中，一隻大狗正伏在她身上。

我幾乎瞬間行動，伸手去掏我的.38特製手槍，卻發現那女人並非正遭受狗的攻擊。

我頓住，[IF $Depravity lte 7]臉上寫滿厭惡。[ELSE]一股興奮感掠過全身。[/IF]女人的裙子被掀到臀部上方，狗正粗暴地抽插著她。她自己的擺動節奏與那動物猛烈衝撞的臀部同步。

女人的目光與我相遇，當狗最後一次向前挺進、將牠的根部埋入她體內時，一聲放浪的呻吟從她豐滿的唇間逸出。

好幾秒鐘，我就站在那兒，與女人的視線緊緊相鎖。

我顫抖著，不全然是因為外套的濕氣，移開目光並[將小巷拋在身後。]

passages.name: Ruins17
passages.content:
The shadows seem to dance at the edge of my vision.  A chill goes through me.

//Those aren't normal shadows,// I think, feeling certain deep down that I am right.  The hair on my arms stands on end as I see a shadow barely a couple of paces from me clearly moves independent to the broken pillar that is casting it.

I freeze.  My hand trembles slightly as I reach for my .38 Special, even though I am certain it will do me no good.

My eyes are locked on the shadow, but it moves no more.  The seconds tick into minutes, and I finally will myself to move.  At first I look around, searching for any sign of the shifting shadows, but there is no sign of anything out of the ordinary.

Feeling nearly as uneasy as when the shadows were moving, I move, intent on putting some distance between myself and where I'm currently standing.

[[Continue.|Continue into the ruins.]]
passages.content_zh:
陰影彷彿在我視野邊緣舞動。一陣寒意竄過全身。

那些不是普通的陰影，我心想，內心深處確信自己是對的。當我看見離我僅幾步遠的一道陰影，明顯獨立於投射它的斷柱而移動時，手臂上的寒毛直豎。

我僵住了。手微微顫抖著伸向我的.38特製手槍，即使我確信它派不上用場。

我的目光緊鎖著那道陰影，但它不再移動。秒針滴答走向分針，我終於強迫自己行動。起初我環顧四周，搜尋任何移動陰影的跡象，但沒有任何異常徵兆。

懷著幾乎與陰影移動時同等的不安感，我邁步離開，決意要拉開與當前站立位置的距離。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Trail
passages.content:
The small forest trail is narrow, but well traveled.  As I walk, the branches almost seem to reach out, brushing my shoulders and hair as if seeking to tangle me in their embrace.

Overhead, the forest has a thick canopy of foliage, what little light that makes it through the leaves does little to illuminate the trail.  

The trail winds in such a way that I can rarely see more then five yards ahead of my self at any given time.  The ground at my feet seems to be a random assortment rotting leaves, hard packed earth, and mud filled puddles.  

With little warning, I find myself at a fork in the trail.  In addition to the trail leading back into town, there is also a trail leading to the north, and another leading to the west.

<<slumlink "Head back towards Wanton Cove">>

[[Take the North fork of the trail.]]

or

[[Take the West fork of the trail.]]
passages.content_zh:
這條森林小徑狹窄，但踩踏的痕跡明顯。行走時，枝椏幾乎像要伸出來，拂過我的肩膀與髮絲，彷彿試圖將我纏繞進它們的懷抱。

頭頂上，森林有著茂密的樹冠層，穿透葉片的微光幾乎無法照亮小徑。

小徑蜿蜒曲折，使我很少能看見前方超過五碼的景象。腳下的地面隨機散布著腐葉、硬實的泥土與積水泥窪。

毫無預警地，我發現自己來到了小徑的分岔口。除了返回鎮上的路，還有一條向北的小徑，以及另一條向西的小徑。

[走北向岔路。]

或

[走西向岔路。]

passages.name: Cheat.
passages.content:
[[return|$return]]

passages.name: Ruins3
passages.content:
I hear a sound like voices somewhere in the distance, but drawing closer by the moment.  

Remembering my first encounter with one of those vile tentacled things, I quickly move toward one of the structures that make up the ruins, hiding within as I listen.

Its not long before the tentacled thing comes into sight, its mismatched eyes swiveling in every direction as it moves with an alien grace.  I hold my breath, my body trembling slightly as it moves through the area I was just standing,  //Is it seeking me?  Can it sense where I've been?  Ir is it mere coincidence that it seems to be following my footsteps almost perfectly back the way I came?//

I manage to suppress a shudder until it is out of sight, then I wait until the sound of its mad babbles begins to fade before exiting my hiding place.  

[[Continue.|Continue into the ruins.]]
passages.content_zh:
我聽見遠處傳來像是人聲的響動，而且正逐漸逼近。

想起第一次遭遇那種可憎觸手生物的經歷，我迅速躲進遺跡的某個建築結構內，屏息聆聽。

沒多久那觸手生物就出現了，它不對稱的眼珠四處轉動，以詭異的優雅姿態移動。我屏住呼吸，身體微微顫抖，看著它經過我剛才站立的位置——它在追蹤我嗎？能感知我的行跡嗎？還是純屬巧合，它竟完美地沿著我來時的路徑移動？

我強忍顫慄直到它離開視線，又等到它瘋狂的囈語聲逐漸遠去，才從藏身處出來。

[繼續。]

passages.name: WispyFogTrail
passages.content:
Around me, a wispy fog seems to cling to the ground just off of the trail<<if $Day gte 5>> in spite of the heavy rain<<endif>>.  The thin tendrils of fog seem to move at the edges of my vision, but whenever I look, the fog falls still.  As I continue to walk, I can't help but feel like the fine threads of fog are reaching out towards me like tentacles.

<<if $Fountain is "Played">> For the briefest of seconds, I think I see a tall, pale feminine form standing just at the edge of my vision, the wisps of fog reaching out from her body towards me, becoming shadowy as they stretch towards me.  Turning towards the sight, the figure is gone, but I fail to suppress a shudder as I see several long threads of fog behind me, drifting slowly towards the ground where I had just walked. 

<<endif>>Quickening my pace, [[I continue down the path.|Trail]]
passages.content_zh:
周圍有縷縷薄霧緊貼著步道外的地面[IF $Day gte 5]，即便大雨滂沱也是如此[/IF]。霧的細絲總在我視野邊緣游移，但每當我定睛看去，霧便靜止不動。繼續前行時，我忍不住覺得那些精細的霧絲正像觸手般朝我伸來。

[IF $Fountain is "Played"]有那麼一瞬間，我彷彿看見視野邊緣立著一道蒼白高挑的女性身影，霧絲從她軀體朝我延伸，在伸展過程中逐漸化作暗影。轉身望去，那身影已消失無蹤，但我瞥見身後數道長長的霧絲正緩緩飄向我剛才走過的地面，不禁打了個寒顫。

[/IF]我加快腳步，[沿小徑繼續前行。]

passages.name: Night 8 Wake
passages.content:
I scream as I sit bolt upright in bed.  My entire body is drenched in sweat, though I shiver uncontrolably.

With trembling hands, I reach down to touch my body, finding myself to be mostly unchanged from the night before.

It takes me several minutes to get my breathing back under control, and longer than that before I stop shaking enough that I trust myself to get out of bed.  

I look out the window in the hopeless desire to see the clouds part, for just a hint of sunlight to become visible. 

Instead, I see the same dark clouds that have plagued my existance for the better part of a week now.  I wonder if they are perhaps just a little lighter, though I fear I am merely guilty of wishful thinking.

Reluctantly, and questioning my state of mind, I finally slip out of bed and prepare myself for the day.

[[Continue.|Your room.]]
passages.content_zh:
我尖叫著從床上猛然坐起。全身都被汗水浸透，卻仍無法控制地顫抖。

我用顫抖的手往下觸摸自己的身體，發現自己與昨晚相比並無太大改變。

我花了幾分鐘才讓呼吸恢復平穩，又過了更長的時間，顫抖才終於停止到讓我敢於下床。

我望向窗外，絕望地期盼雲層能散開，哪怕只透出一絲陽光。

然而，我看見的仍是那團烏雲——它們已纏繞我大半週的生存。我懷疑雲色是否稍淡了些，卻又害怕這只是自己一廂情願的妄想。

我終於不情願地溜下床，一邊質疑自己的精神狀態，一邊為這一天做準備。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Stop to talk with the old sailor.
passages.content:
I barely take notice as I reach the end of the dock, as the sound of my boot steps against the wooden dock are replaced by the sound of my hard soles striking the stone waterfront.

I meet the man's eyes, and he shoots back a look I've seen a thousand times before.  That look that says he knows why I'm here, but he's has no intention of telling me anything useful.

"Hey,"  I call non-committaly as I close the rest of the distance between us.

"Hey."  He replies flatly, his voice holding a tiny hint of femininity, "If you're looking for a room, check the Barmaid's Daughter at the end of the street."  His tone is dismissing, as if he doesn't want to talk any further.  My eyes follow where he points, guess I was right about the tavern.

[[Continue trying to talk with the old sailor.]]
or
[[Head into the center of town.|getTownLink()]]
passages.content_zh:
我幾乎沒注意到自己已走到碼頭盡頭，靴子踏在木製碼頭上的聲響，已被硬鞋底敲擊石砌水岸的聲音取代。

我迎上那男人的目光，他回以一種我見過無數次的眼神——那種「我知道你為何而來，但我沒打算告訴你任何有用資訊」的眼神。

「嘿。」我走近時隨意地打了聲招呼。

「嘿。」他平淡地回應，嗓音帶著一絲陰柔，「如果你要找房間，去街尾的『酒保的女兒』看看。」他的語氣帶著打發意味，彷彿不想多談。我順著他指的方向望去，看來我對那間酒館的猜測沒錯。

[繼續嘗試與老水手交談。]
或
[前往鎮中心。]

passages.name: TownSun
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>A crack of thunder like a gunshot rings out.  I flinch and half reach for my .38 Special in reflex. 

I quickly move towards the closest cover I can see, the shelter of a doorway, and stand there for about a minute while my heartrate returns to normal.  

Glancing at the sky, and seeing no sign of the storm letting up, I resign myself to leaving the meager shelter I had found.  <<else>>For a brief moment, there is a small break in the clouds overhead, a ray of sunshine illuminating the area where I'm standing.

My eyes turn upward in the hopes of catching sight of the sun for the first time since arriving in Wanton Cove, but by the time I can look up, the clouds above me have already closed over the sun like a snuffer draped over a candle to put it out.<</if>>

[[Continue on your way.|Head into the center of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]一聲如槍響的雷鳴驟然爆開。我嚇得一縮，反射性地半伸手去摸我的.38特製手槍。

我迅速衝向視線內最近的掩護——一處門廊的遮蔽下，站在那裡約一分鐘，直到心跳恢復正常。

瞥了眼天空，不見風雨稍歇的跡象，我只得認命離開這勉強找到的避難處。[ELSE]短暫片刻，頭頂雲層裂開一道細縫，一縷陽光照亮了我所站的位置。

我抬頭望去，期盼能看見自來到萬頓灣後的第一道陽光，但當我抬眼時，雲層早已如燭罩般覆蓋了太陽，將其熄滅。[/IF]

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: Any idea how long she might have been in the water?
passages.content:
"Any idea how long the body might have been in the water?"  I ask

"Its hard to say for sure,"  Aaron says, "Not long though, maybe a day or two at most?"  

My eyes narrow slightly, as I file away the information.

"Some of what washes up on shore is pretty old,"  Aaron's lip curls with clear disgust.

我微微瞇起眼，將這資訊記下。

passages.name: Solitary table
passages.content:
In the crowded tavern, the noise a steady din around me, I take in my surroundings.

Towards the middle of the tavern, I see a table with only a single person sitting at it.  The man's features are feminine enough that I'd mistake him for a woman if it wasn't for the thin beard on his chin.  His long brown hair is loose, falling around his face in a way that shrouds his eyes, but from his posture, I get the feeling that he is watching me.

Slowly, I make my way across the tavern, considering the possibility if sitting at the table with the man in the hopes of some small talk.  About half way to the table, the man reaches up, pulling the hair back from his face just far enough to glare at me.

//Guess he doesn't want company then.//  I think darkly.

Stopping my advance, [[I take in my surroundings again.|The Barmaids Daughter]]
passages.content_zh:
在這擁擠的酒館裡，周遭喧囂持續不斷，我打量著環境。

酒館中央有張桌子，只坐著一個人。那男人的五官陰柔得足以讓我誤認為女性——若不是他下巴那撮稀疏的鬍鬚。他鬆散的棕色長髮垂落臉旁，遮住了眼睛，但從他的姿態，我感覺他正注視著我。

我緩緩穿過酒館，考慮是否該坐到那男人的桌旁搭個話。走到半途時，他抬手將頭髮從臉上撥開些許，正好足以對我投來瞪視。

看來他不想要伴。我陰鬱地想。

停下腳步，[我再次環顧四周。]

passages.name: NG1
passages.content:
At 48 years of age, I've served my country through the end of the great war.  Afterwards, I joined the force, spent almost twenty-five years trying to make the streets a safer place.  Two of that was spent trying to solve a case that couldn't be solved.  I turned in my badge when they told me to file the case away and move on.

I've lived the two years since at the bottom of a bottle.

I was never a particularly large man.  Standing at 5' 10" and 180lbs. 

My square jaw perpetually sports about three days' worth of stubble, just a hint of gray near the temples.  My brown hair is thick, but cut short.

Above my beak like nose, my gray eyes are sharp and alert. 

I'm not fat, but I'd be lying if I said there wasn't a hint of belly on me, a bit of fat over what was once a well toned body back in my prime.

[[Continue.|NG2]]
passages.content_zh:
四十八歲的我，曾為國家效力直至大戰結束。之後，我加入了警隊，花了將近二十五年時間試圖讓街頭變得更安全。其中有兩年，我耗在一個無法破解的案子上。當上級命令我歸檔此案並繼續前進時，我交出了警徽。

這兩年來，我活在酒瓶底部。

我從來不是特別高大的人。身高五呎十吋，體重一百八十磅。

我方正的下巴總是留著約三天份的鬍渣，兩鬢僅有些許灰白。我的棕髮濃密，但剪得很短。

在我鷹勾鼻的上方，灰色的雙眼銳利而警覺。

我不算胖，但如果說身上沒有一絲小腹，那是在說謊——那曾經在我壯年時精實的身軀上，如今覆上了一層薄薄的脂肪。

[繼續。]

passages.name: LostBook
passages.content:
I'm barely aware of my jacket being pulled open, of my body being searched.  Its not until several minutes later when I can finally breathe again that I start to really become aware of my surroundings again.

Soaked to the bone, my jacket spread wide around me, the rain pummels where I lay on the sodden ground.  I barely stifle a cry when I try to sit up.  Its only as I pull my jacket around myself that I become aware of the book's absence.  My movements are slow and painful as I search my immediate surroundings for my attacker, but she is nowhere to be seen.

When I finally get back to my feet, I stumble around for a moment before finding my .38 Special again.  Holstering it, I wince in pain at the motion, //Pretty sure I've got a couple of cracked ribs.//<<set $CharHP to 1>><<set $PastorBook to "Gone">>

[[Continue.|Bluff]]
passages.content_zh:
我幾乎沒意識到外套被扯開，身體被搜尋。直到幾分鐘後，當我終於能再次呼吸時，才開始真正恢復對周遭環境的感知。

渾身濕透，外套在我身下攤開，雨水重重打在我躺臥的濕地上。試圖坐起身時，我勉強壓下一聲痛呼。直到我將外套拉攏，才驚覺那本書不見了。我的動作緩慢而痛苦，搜尋著周圍攻擊者的蹤跡，但她已無影無蹤。

當我終於站起來時，踉蹌了一會兒才找回我的.38特製手槍。將槍收回槍套的動作讓我痛得皺眉，很確定有幾根肋骨裂了。

[繼續。]

passages.name: TapRoom
passages.content:
//Tap!//  The sound comes from my window, drawing my attention that direction.  For several long seconds, I watch the window, searching for the source of the sound.  All I see outside the window is the roof of the building across the alley.

I barely turn my head away from the window before I hear it again, //Tap!//

This time, I step up to the window, looking for the sound's source.  //Tap! Tap!//  My eyes flicker about the muddy alley below, //Tap!//

My eyes finally settle on a loose shutter on the building across the alley.  As I watch, I see the wind catch it again, swinging it away from the window it was made to protect, then slamming closed again with a loud //Tap!//

Taking a deep breath and letting it out slowly, I watch the alley for several more seconds before [[stepping away from the window again.|Your room.]]
passages.content_zh:
叩！聲音從窗戶傳來，將我的注意力引向那邊。我盯著窗戶好幾秒，尋找聲音來源。窗外只看見巷子對面建築的屋頂。

我剛把頭轉開，又聽見了，叩！

這次，我走到窗邊，尋找聲音的源頭。叩！叩！我的目光掃過下方泥濘的巷子，叩！

我的視線終於落在巷子對面建築一扇鬆脫的百葉窗上。正看著時，風又抓住了它，將它從本應保護的窗戶吹開，然後又砰一聲關上，發出響亮的叩！

我深吸一口氣，緩緩吐出，又注視了巷子幾秒鐘，然後[再次從窗邊退開。]

passages.name: Rich2
passages.content:
As I am passing a house, I stop as a flash of color in this otherwise drab town attracts my attention.  

Beside a two story white house, only slightly in need or a fresh coat of paint and some minor shingle work, is a single rose bush.  Perhaps five foot tall and about half again as wide.  

The poor plant looks to be barely clinging to life from the sickly dark green of the leaves and the yellowing of the stems, but scattered across it is perhaps a dozen small red roses.  Each rose appears to be nearly perfect, just starting to open.

//Makes me think of this island, something completely unexpected and totally out of place.//

I remain there for a few seconds longer, wondering if I might find some deeper meaning.  When no revelations come, I turn away from the rose bush.

[[Continue on my way.|Nice part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
經過一棟房子時，一抹色彩在這個原本單調的小鎮中吸引了我的目光，我停下腳步。

一棟兩層樓的白色房屋旁——僅需稍微粉刷和修補屋瓦——有一叢孤零零的玫瑰。大約五呎高，寬度則約是高度的一半。

這可憐的植物看起來奄奄一息，葉片呈病態的深綠色，莖部泛黃，但上面卻散落著約十幾朵小巧的紅玫瑰。每朵玫瑰都近乎完美，正開始綻放。

讓我想起這座島，某種完全出乎意料且格格不入的存在。

我在那裡多停留了幾秒，思索是否能找到更深層的意義。當沒有靈感湧現時，我轉身離開了玫瑰叢。

[繼續我的路。]

passages.name: Tanya back from job
passages.content:
<<if $Prostitute is "Gone">>My eyes drift over the interior of the Barmaid's Daughter, searching for any sign of Tanya.  She's nowhere to be seen.

//Shouldn't surprise me.  After stealing the book, she's not going to make it easy to find her.//<<else>><<if $Prostitute is "Played">>I can see Tanya stepping through a door at the back of the tavern.  <<else>>I can see the redheaded girl stepping through a door at the back of the tavern.  <</if>>  She visibly adjusts her clothes back into place, then wipes a hint of something liquid and white from the corner of her mouth with the back of her hand.

A second later, a man comes through the same door, his hands working at his belt as he fastens his pants back in place.

//Guess she was with a customer.// I think idly.<</if>>

[[Continue on my way.|The Barmaids Daughter]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Prostitute is "Gone"]我的目光掃過「酒保的女兒」內部，尋找Tanya的任何蹤跡。她無影無蹤。

這不該讓我驚訝。偷走書之後，她不會讓我輕易找到她。[ELSE][IF $Prostitute is "Played"]我看見Tanya正從酒館後方的一扇門走出來。[ELSE]我看見那名紅髮女孩正從酒館後方的一扇門走出來。[/IF]她明顯地將衣服重新整理好，然後用手背抹去嘴角一點液態的白色痕跡。

片刻後，一個男人從同一扇門出來，雙手忙著繫好皮帶，將褲子穿妥。

看來她剛才在接待客人。我漫不經心地想著。[/IF]

[繼續我的路。]

passages.name: You dont know where Mr Jackobson got off to, do you?
passages.content:
"He's gone?"  Nadia sounds surprised, "He's either at home, at the Barmaid's Daughter, or out fishing,"  She shrugs, "And he hasn't done much fishing the last couple of years,"  

She gives you a sympathetic look, "Sorry I cant be more help than that."

"That's ok, thanks anyway,"  I reply.

With a little smile and a wink, "Anytime,"  Nadia replies.<<set $Lie to "Played">>

[[Visit with Nadia for a minute.]]

<<if $TomTanya is "Not Played">>[[Ask about Tom.]]<</if>><<if $Jackobson is "Played">>

[[Ask about Pastor Erkon]]<</if>><<if $Taint gte 40>>[[Ask about your physical changes.|Ask Nadia about your transformation.]]<</if>><<if $FountainInvestigated is "Played">>

[[Ask Nadia about the Ruins.]]<</if>>

[[Buy something.|See her wares.]]

or 

[[Return to looking around the store.|General Store]]
passages.content_zh:
「他走了？」Nadia聽起來很驚訝，「他要不是在家，就是在『酒保的女兒』，或是出去釣魚。」她聳聳肩，「而且他這幾年不太釣魚了。」

她給你一個同情的眼神，「抱歉我只能幫到這麼多。」

「沒關係，還是謝謝你。」我回答。

帶著一絲微笑和眨眼，「隨時歡迎。」Nadia回應。

[和Nadia聊一會兒。]

[IF $TomTanya is "Not Played"][詢問關於Tom的事。][/IF][IF $Jackobson is "Played"]
[詢問關於Erkon牧師的事。][/IF][IF $Taint gte 40][詢問關於你身體的變化。][/IF][IF $FountainInvestigated is "Played"]
[詢問Nadia關於遺跡的事。][/IF]

[買點東西。]

或

[回到店裡繼續看看。]

passages.name: ParkWatcher
passages.content:
Inside of the park, I look back towards the main street running through Wanton Cove.  

Standing on the far side of the street, away from where I'm standing, a figure wearing a heavy black raincoat is standing in front of a small store.  The cap on the figure's head droops, water dripping from its edges as the cap serves to cloak the figure's features from my view.

I can't help but think that the figure is looking at me as they stand there for several long heartbeats.

In the time it takes me to blink, the figure is in motion, walking down the street towards the <<if $GooCounter lte 1>>waterfront, <<else>>Barmaid's Daughter, <<endif>>their pace full of purpose.

I watch the figure go until they disappear behind one of the buildings that line the street.

[[Return my attention to the park.|overgrown park]]
passages.content_zh:
在公園裡，我回頭望向貫穿萬頓灣的主要街道。

街道對面遠離我站立之處，有個穿著厚重黑色雨衣的身影站在一家小店鋪前。那人頭上的帽簷低垂，雨水正從邊緣滴落，帽子遮住了面容使我無法看清。

我不禁覺得那身影正注視著我，佇立在那裡足足好幾個心跳的時間。

就在我眨眼的瞬間，那人開始移動，沿著街道朝[IF $GooCounter lte 1]碼頭方向[ELSE]「酒保的女兒」酒吧[/IF]走去，步伐充滿目的性。

我目送那身影離去，直到他消失在街邊其中一棟建築後方。

[將注意力轉回公園。]

passages.name: Brood Mother
passages.content:
A small orgasm makes me shudder as each baseball sized egg slips from my well used cunt into a transparent sack. With a little squeeze, a final egg slips from my hole, connected to me by mucousy strands as it falls into the bag.

Its a large clutch this time, almost fifty eggs in total.  I can't help but feel pleased knowing that as many as half a dozen might grow to adulthood.  //Only the strong survive, and the strong consume the weak.//

Moving the clutch of eggs to the side where it joins several others, I make a sound that carries through the water.  Answering my summons, a male enters my chamber in less than a minute.  

[img[images/DeepEnd2.png]]

I'm pleased to see that he's already erect.  One hand rubbing my belly, missing the fullness I feel when its full of eggs, I beckon him closer.

END
passages.content_zh:
一顆顆棒球大小的卵從我飽經使用的陰戶滑入透明囊袋時，輕微的高潮令我顫慄。稍一擠壓，最後一顆卵從穴口滑出，黏稠的絲線將它與我相連，墜入袋中。

這次產量很大，總共將近五十顆卵。想到其中可能有半打能成長至成年期，我不禁感到滿足。唯有強者能生存，而強者吞噬弱者。

我將這批卵移到一旁與其他幾批放在一起，發出一陣穿透水流的聲音。不到一分鐘，一名雄性回應我的召喚進入巢室。

見他已呈勃起狀態，我甚感愉悅。一手揉著腹部，懷念著滿懷卵時的充盈感，我示意他靠近。

END

passages.name: TrailChimes
passages.content:
Through the branches, I hear what sounds almost like wooden wind chimes.  I pause, looking in the direction of the sound in the hopes of seeing what is making the sounds.

My eyes fall on a series of bones, mostly rib bones, but many smaller bones as well.  

Stepping closer, I see what looks like fishing line tied to each bone, hanging them from a dead tree like a macabre wind chime.  

A hint of a breeze through the forest brushes past the bones once more, sending them spinning and swaying, clicking and clacking against each other once more.

For several seconds, I watch the bones.  Then I look upward towards where the bones are tied to the tree.  Perched on the branch is a deer skull, or at least the top half of one.

Letting my gaze linger only a moment longer, [[I return to the trail.|Trail]]
passages.content_zh:
透過枝椏，我聽見近乎木製風鈴的聲響。我停下腳步，朝聲音來源望去，希望能看見是什麼發出這聲響。

目光落在一排骨頭上，主要是肋骨，但也有許多更細小的骨頭。

走近些，我看見每根骨頭都繫著釣魚線，像一組陰森的風鈴懸掛在枯樹上。

林間微風再次拂過骨頭，使它們旋轉搖擺，彼此碰撞發出喀噠聲響。

我注視這些骨頭數秒，然後抬頭望向骨頭繫在樹上的位置。枝頭棲著一具鹿頭骨——至少是上半部分。

讓目光多停留片刻後，[我回到小徑上。]

passages.name: TrailCloaked
passages.content:
A short distance a head of me, I see a hooded figure through the trees.  For several minutes I follow the figure, curious as to what they might be doing out here in the woods.

I'm not sure what I did to draw the figure's attention, but they stop suddenly, tilting their head slightly as if listening for something.  After a brief pause, the figure turns most of the way towards me.

I can't see anything under the figure's hood at this distance, but the moment they see me, they turn and run.  Instinctively, I take off after the figure, trying to catch up.  Unfortunately, I quickly loose the figure down the trail.

Pausing in the trail, I look back the way I came, wondering if the figure slipped down some side trail that I had missed, or if they had simply out paced me [[down the forest path.|Trail]]
passages.content_zh:
前方不遠處，我透過樹林看見一個戴兜帽的身影。我跟隨那人好幾分鐘，好奇他為何出現在這片森林裡。

不確定是什麼引起了對方的注意，但他突然停下，微微側頭彷彿在聆聽什麼。短暫停頓後，那人幾乎完全轉向我這個方向。

這個距離我看不清兜帽下的面容，但就在他看見我的瞬間，轉身就跑。我本能地追了上去，試圖趕上。可惜，我很快就在小徑上失去了對方的蹤影。

我在小徑上停步，回頭望向來時路，疑惑那人是否溜進了我沒注意到的岔路，還是單純在[森林小徑上]跑得比我快。

passages.name: Into HouseRich
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>There's a flicker of light from distant lightning as I walk through the better part of Wanton Cove.  

A few seconds later, I can hear the answering rumble of thunder roll over me.  <<else>>Up ahead, I see a woman standing on the porch of a house, looking absently out towards the ocean.  From where I am, I can see one of her hands cupping her breast through her dress, massaging the round globe of flesh.

Her other hand begins to stray downward, between her legs.  I'm too far away to see much, but it's enough to cause the stirrings of arousal within me.  

As if sensing my presence, she looks towards me suddenly.  I can see her blush even from this distance.

Quickly, she turns towards the house and disappears inside.<</if>>

[[Continue on your way.|Nice part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]當我走過萬頓灣較富裕的區域時，遠處閃電劃過一道微光。

幾秒後，雷鳴的轟隆聲回應般滾過頭頂。[ELSE]前方，我看見一名女子站在房屋門廊上，心不在焉地眺望海洋。從我的位置，能看見她一手隔著連衣裙托住乳房，揉捏著那團圓潤的肉體。

她的另一隻手開始向下游移，探向雙腿之間。距離太遠看不清楚，但已足以在我體內撩起情慾的騷動。

彷彿感知到我的存在，她突然朝我望來。即使隔著這段距離，我仍能看見她臉紅了。

她迅速轉身進屋，消失在門內。[/IF]

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: DockSun
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>I don't see the flash of light, but the roar of thunder seems to carry on for several long seconds.

I glance up just in time to see lightning flicker along the clouds like a chain but never reaching the ground.  //One-onethousand, two-onethousand, three-onethousand.//  A second rumbling of thunder reaches my ears and seems to drag on once more.

<<else>>For a brief moment, there is a small break in the clouds overhead, a ray of sunshine illuminating the area where I'm standing.

My eyes turn upward in the hopes of catching sight of the sun for the first time since arriving in Wanton Cove, but by the time I can look up, the clouds above me have already closed over the sun like a snuffer draped over a candle to put it out.<</if>>

[[Continue on your way.|the waterfront]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]我沒看見閃光，但雷鳴的咆哮似乎持續了漫長數秒。

我抬頭瞥見閃電如鎖鏈沿雲層竄動，卻始終未觸及地面。一秒、兩秒、三秒。第二陣雷聲傳入耳中，彷彿再度拖曳著尾音。

[ELSE]短暫片刻，頭頂雲層裂開一道縫隙，一縷陽光照亮我所在的區域。

我仰頭期盼能看見抵達萬頓灣後的第一道陽光，但當我抬眼時，雲層早已如燭罩般覆蓋太陽，將其熄滅。[/IF]

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: Cave Events
Body on the shore.
passages.content:
"You remember anything else about the girl on the waterfront?"  I ask.

Aaron grimaces, "Sorry, nothing."

Ask about:
<<if $TomTanya is "Not Played">>[[I'm looking for a young man named Tom who might have passed through.]]
<</if>><<if $FirstStatue is "Played">>[[Church]]
[[Statues]]
<</if>><<if $Pastor is "Played">>[[Tell me more about the pastor.]]
<</if>><<if $MotherTalk is "Played">>[[Ask Aaron about the Morichi Family.]]
<</if>><<if $Fountain is "Played">>[[Engravings on the fountain.]]
<</if>><<if $SailorGoo is "Played">>[[White Goo.]]
<</if>><<if $JackobsonBluff is 3>>[[Do you know where Mr Jackobson might have gotten off to?]]<</if>><<if $FountainInvestigated is "Played">>
[[Ask Aaron about the Ruins.]]<</if>>
or
[[Step away from the Bartender.|The Barmaids Daughter]]

passages.name: just outside of the room.
passages.content:
I bolt upright in bed, sweat dripping from my body and my sheets matted to my skin.  A loud rumble of thunder is only just now starting to fade.  //That one must have been close.//

My heart is racing, my pulse loud in my ears.  I turn my eyes towards the door of my room, but there is no sign of Tom, or that thing that he had been replaced with.  

Rattled, I shake my head in a futile attempt to clear it, then glance out the window.  

//Storm's still going strong.//  I think as another flash of lightline lights the sky.  Less than a second later, the roll of thunder follows.

I can tell that its still really early, but I also know I won't be able to get any more sleep after the dream I just woke from.

Reluctantly rolling out of bed, I start [[preparing for my day.|Your room.]]

passages.name: Ruins7
ChurchDrip
passages.content:
As I make my way inside the Church, I feel a sudden sharp chill on my neck, like a frozen knife slipping through my flesh.

I freeze in place, the chill slipping down my spine, my breath caught in my throat.  Carefully, I draw a breath, my hand going slowly to the nape of my neck.  Only to find a hint of wentess.  Almost as soon as I touch the wetness, I realize what happened; a drop of watter had fallen from the doorframe of the Church, striking me just inside the colar of my coat. <<if $Day gte 5>>

Listening, I can hear the rumble of heavy rain hitting the old roof.<</if>>

Taking a deep breath to calm myself, //boy, this place really has me on edge,// I think to myself.

Adjusting my collar, I slip [[inside the little Church.|stepping carefully inside.]]

passages.name: Decline the offer.
passages.content:
<<if $Depravity lte 5>>"Uh,"  I fidget, "I think I'll pass."  I step back, starting to close the door, "Have fun."  I hastily add, closing the door then making my way to [[my own room.|Your room.]]

<<elseif $Depravity lte 9>>I give a little half smile, part of me wanting to stay in spite of myself.  "I think I'll pass."  I say simply before closing the door behind me.  

My thoughts still on what I had just witnessed, [[I return to my own room.|Your room.]]

<<elseif $Depravity gte 10>>I feel my arousal spike at the offer, and its only with a conscious effort that I decide to pass on their offer, "Maybe some other time?"

"Absolutely!"  The man replies with a smile.

Leaving the door ajar behind me, [[I make my way to my own room.|Your room.]]<<endif>>

passages.name: Ruins8
passages.content:
The rain falls hard, I can hear the raindrops thundering against the leafy canopy far above.  

Remarkably though, I realize that very little of the rain is actually reaching the ground where I am standing.

I glance about, noticing the way that water seems to run down the buildings, following every little contour as the water makes its way toward the ground.  But when the water reaches the base of the buildings, it quickly vanishes between the cracks in the old road.  

//Is that by design?// I have to wonder.

Turning my eyes to the ground at my feet, I realize that the paving stones appear completely dry still.

Not sure what to think about what I am seeing, I force my attention back to the ruins as a whole.

[[Continue.|Continue into the ruins.]]

passages.name: Dead Cat
passages.content:
From an old dead branch, I see a shape dangling.  The sickly sweet smell of rotting flesh is matched by the buzzing of insects around the carcas.  At first, I mistake the shape for a racoon, but as I step closer, I see otherwise.  From the branch hangs a cat, its filthy pelt is matted and wet.  The way the cat's skin droops, it looks almost as if the pelt could slide right off the bone beneath at any moment.

The skin around the cat's mouth is pulled tight, in a death's grin that shows its bleached white teeth, the inside of its mouth a mass of flies and maggots.  

But perhaps most disterbing is the missing eyes, leaving perfect, yet hauntingly empty, dark sockets staring back at me.

Giving it a wide berth, [[I continue on down the path.|Trail]]
passages.content_zh:
從一根枯死的舊樹枝上，我看見一個懸垂的形體。腐肉那股病態的甜膩氣味，與環繞屍體的昆蟲嗡嗡聲相互呼應。起初，我誤以為那是隻浣熊，但當我走近些，才發現並非如此。樹枝上吊著一隻貓，牠骯髒的皮毛糾結濕黏。貓皮鬆垂的樣子，看起來幾乎隨時會從底下的骨架上滑脫。

貓嘴周圍的皮膚緊繃，咧出死者的獰笑，露出漂白的牙齒，口腔內則擠滿蒼蠅與蛆蟲。

但最令人不安的，或許是那雙缺失的眼睛——留下完美卻令人毛骨悚然的空洞黑暗眼窩，直直回望著我。

我遠遠繞開它，[繼續沿小徑前行。]

passages.name: Talk to Ms. Sherwood
passages.content:
For a few seconds, I consider what I should ask.

[[Did you think of anything you could add about the waterfront?]]

[[What about the man with the limp you mentioned before?]]

[[You said your brother was leaving on the fishing boat?]]

[[Tell me a little about yourself?]]

[[You seemed a little intimidated by Aaron?]]<<if $PastorErkon is "Played">>

[[Ask about Pastor Erkon|Sherwood Pastor Talk]]<</if>><<if $SherwoodSex is "Played">>

[[Maybe I can itch that scratch for you again?|Sherwood Sex]]<<if $PastorBook is "Taken">>

[[Ask about the book from the Church basement.]]<</if>>

<</if>><<if $MotherTalk is "Played">>[[Ask Ms Sherwood what she knows about Azumi.]]

<</if>>or

[[Done asking questions for now.|Ms Sherwood's House]]
passages.content_zh:
有幾秒鐘，我思索著該問些什麼。

[關於濱水區，你有想到什麼可以補充的嗎？]

[你之前提到的那個跛腳男人呢？]

[你說你哥哥要搭漁船離開？]

[跟我聊聊你自己？]

[你似乎有點怕Aaron？][IF $PastorErkon is "Played"]

[詢問關於Pastor Erkon的事。][/IF][IF $SherwoodSex is "Played"]

[或許我可以再幫你止止癢？][IF $PastorBook is "Taken"]

[詢問關於教堂地下室那本書的事。][/IF]

[/IF][IF $MotherTalk is "Played"][詢問Sherwood女士對Azumi知道些什麼。]

[/IF]或

[目前先問到這裡。]

passages.name: Ruins22
passages.content:
I tense as I near something.  The sound of falling stone, or whatever these strange structures are made of, being knocked to the ground by something unseen.

My hand slips beneath my long jacket in search of my .38 Special as my eyes scan my surroundings.

The last few stones from the small rock slide settle to the ground just a few paces from where I'm standing.

I see no sign of anything that could have caused the disturbance, though I increasingly have the sensation of being watched.

Uneasy, and not feeling terribly inclined to discover what made the sound, I scan my immediate vicinity one more time then start to put some distance between myself and whatever might have caused the rock slide.

[[Continue.|Continue into the ruins.]]

我的手滑進長外套內，摸索我的.38特製手槍，同時雙眼掃視四周。

小規模落石的最後幾塊石頭，在離我站立處僅幾步之遙的地方落定。

我沒看到任何可能造成這騷動的跡象，儘管我愈發強烈地感到被注視著。

感到不安，且毫無興致去探究聲音的來源，我再次掃視了緊鄰的周遭，然後開始拉開自己與可能造成落石之物間的距離。

[繼續。]

passages.name: SlumFog
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>Even as the rain falls, I can see thin whisps of fog still clinging to the ground.

My eyes linger on the strange phenomenon as I walk, wondering how the fog can persist in the face of all this rain.

[[Continue through the rain.|Run down part of town.]]  <<else>>I feel a slight chill go up my spine as I walk.  I can see a thin fog, seemingly clinging to the cracks in the road, to the gutters, and to the drooping, half dead plants eking out an existence among the soggy earth.

For a moment, I pause, looking at the fog.  The fog seems to move slightly, but always at the corner of my vision, never where I can see it clearly.

Feeling uneasy, I begin to walk again.

[[Continue on my way.|Run down part of town.]]<</if>>

[繼續我的路。][/IF]

passages.name: Another Shopper Leaving
passages.content:
Reaching the door to the general store, I start to step inside.

With almost no warning, someone in a heavy brown raincoat pushes roughly through the doorway, knocking me out of the way in the process.

I half turn to confront the figure, only to see them splashing across the street towards another figure.  The second figure, their features hidden in the shadows created by the hood of their rain coat.

As soon as the first figure finishes crossing the street, the two exchange a few words, their movements animated, but from where I'm standing, I can't hear any of what they are saying.

Letting my gaze linger on the pair for a few seconds longer, I then turn my attention back towards the [[General Store]].

我多注視了那對人影幾秒，然後將注意力轉回[雜貨店]。

passages.name: Shop Chimes
passages.content:
Entering the store, the breeze from outside is enough to stir some of the items hanging from the rafters overhead.

A soft //clu-cluuk, cluuk, cluuk-clu-cluuk// draws my attention to a wind chime hanging almost directly above my head.  At first glance, it would be easy to mistake the wind chime as being made of bits of drift wood, but on closer inspection, I can tell that its made of bits of bone instead.  

For several seconds, I watch the bones shift, tapping the large central bone in the middle, //clu-clu-cluuk, clu-cluuk, clu-clu// until the chime finally settles to silence once more.

My morbid fascination with the macabre item waning, I turn my attention to the rest of [[the store.|General Store]]
passages.content_zh:

一陣輕柔的「喀嚕—喀嚕克，喀嚕克，喀嚕克—喀—嚕克」聲將我的注意力引向幾乎正上方的風鈴。乍看會以為這風鈴是用浮木碎片製成，但仔細觀察便能辨出它其實由骨塊組成。

有好幾秒鐘，我看著骨塊晃動，敲擊著中央那根大骨頭，發出「喀—嚕—嚕克，喀—嚕克，喀—嚕」的聲響，直到風鈴最終歸於沉寂。

Instead, I take a few steps towards the figure shrouded in the downpour, but in the time it takes for me to do so, I can no longer see any sign of them. <<else>>Walking through the park, I notice a single crisp boot print in the muddy ground.

passages.name: B1Exit

As I step back, Aaron says, "I'll send someone down to get the body,"  His tone is reserved, "We'll send word to the mainland on the next ship headed that way."

With that, he turns and heads into town, presumably to the Barmaid's Daughter.

Ms Sherwood stays a little longer, just looking at the body for a couple of minutes before turning to me, "Is it ok if I do too?"  She asks, her tone timid.

"Yeah, if I need you for anything else, I know where to find you,"  I pause, then add, "I'll be sure to swing by later to make sure you're ok."

She gives a half hearted, but appreciative smile, "Thank you,"  She says softly before leaving.

passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]暴雨在我四周傾盆而下，陣陣狂風將雨水從側面狠狠砸向我。

一滴冰涼的雨水滑進我後頸，鑽進外套底下，我忍不住打了個冷顫。[ELSE]行走間，我感到一陣輕微的寒意爬上脊背。我能看見一層薄霧，彷彿緊貼著路面的裂縫、排水溝，以及那些在濕軟泥土中勉強生存、低垂枯萎的半死植物。

我停下片刻，注視著霧氣。霧似乎微微移動著，但總是在視線邊緣，從未讓我清晰看見。

感到不安，我再度邁步前行。[/IF]

[繼續趕路。]

passages.name: Bar Rivulets
passages.content: <<if $Day gte 5>>Looking at the window that points out towards town, I can see rain hitting the window in sheets, giving a blurred and distorted view of the world outside.  A flash of lightning lights a small corner of the window for a fraction of a second.  I can see a steady stream of rain running down the window, broken by the drops of rain hitting the glass.  <<else>>Glancing towards a window at the front of the Barmaid's Daughter, I can see raindrops hitting the glass.  The drops lazily run down the glass like little rivers.  As drops meet, their descent becomes faster until they seem to race towards the bottom of the window.<</if>>\n\n[[Continue on my way.|The Barmaids Daughter]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]望向朝鎮外的那扇窗，我看見雨水成片打在玻璃上，使外面的世界顯得模糊而扭曲。一道閃電瞬間照亮了窗戶的一小角。我能看見雨水沿著窗戶穩定流下，又被新落下的雨滴打碎。[ELSE]瞥向「酒保的女兒」酒吧前窗，我看見雨滴打在玻璃上。水滴像小溪般慵懶地沿著玻璃滑落。當雨滴匯合，它們下落的速度變快，彷彿競相衝向窗戶底端。[/IF]

[繼續趕路。]

passages.name: Body Not Played
passages.content:
Making my way down the stairs into the Barmaid's Daughter, I hear a pair of sailors speaking.

"-that mess on the waterfront yesterday?" I catch from the first man.

The second, feminine man replies, "Yeah, her body was all bloated like she had been in the water for a while."

The first man notices me, closing his mouth and leaning back in his seat.

"What you guys talking about?"  I inquire.

"Nothing much,"  The feminine man answers me, not bothering to even look my way.

//If these guys are not interested in sharing, maybe Aaron can shead some light on things.//

Looking towards the bar, I see Aaron wiping the counter.

[[Go talk to Aaron.]]<<set $Body1 to "Played">>
passages.content_zh:
我走下樓梯進入「酒保的女兒」酒吧，聽到兩名水手正在交談。

「——昨天碼頭邊那團亂子？」我聽到第一個人說。

第二個聲音陰柔的男人回答：「是啊，她的屍體整個腫脹，好像在水裡泡了一段時間。」

第一個男人注意到我，閉上嘴向後靠回座位。

「你們在聊什麼？」我問道。

「沒什麼要緊的。」那個陰柔的男人回答我，甚至懶得朝我這邊看。

如果這些傢伙不想分享，也許Aaron能透露點什麼。

望向吧檯，我看見Aaron正在擦拭檯面。

[去找Aaron談話。]

passages.name: Force2
passages.content:
I size up the door, take a couple of steps back, and get a running start.  I hit the door with bone jarring force, peppering myself with the paint flakes that are knocked loose from the door, but not having broken the door open.

Glaring at the door, I reach up and massage my now-sore shoulder for a couple of seconds before turning my attention to my surroundings.

If anyone is out and about, I don't see them.  //At least I can be thankful no one saw that.//  I think humorlessly to myself.

Turning my attention back to the door, //Door's a lot more solid than I had thought, I'd be a fool to try that again.//

[[Sighing inwardly, you step back from the door.|little church]]
passages.content_zh:
我估量了一下門，後退幾步，助跑衝撞。我用足以震碎骨頭的力道撞上門，自己也被門上震落的油漆碎片濺了一身，但門並沒有被撞開。

我瞪著門，抬手按摩了幾秒現在痠痛的肩膀，然後將注意力轉向周圍環境。

如果外面有人走動，我也沒看見。至少可以慶幸沒人目睹剛才那一幕。我毫無幽默感地暗自想著。

注意力回到門上。這門比我想像的結實多了，再試一次就是傻子。

[內心嘆了口氣，你從門前退開。]

passages.name: nextstreet
passages.content:
Breathing heavily from exertion after the fight, I look up and down the street, seeing no sign of another person anywhere.  

I take a deep breath to calm myself.

<<if $random is 1>><<else>><<if $EnemyFlee is "true">>  <<else>><<if $weaponChance lte 5>>
Taking a moment to search the body:

I found <<print $AmmoLoot>> rounds of ammunition.<<set $Ammo = $Ammo + $AmmoLoot>>

I found $<<print $MoneyLoot>>.<<set $Money = $Money + $MoneyLoot>>
<<else>>Taking a moment to search the body:

I found $<<print $MoneyLoot>>.<<set $Money = $Money + $MoneyLoot>><</if>><</if>><</if>>

[[Continue.|Head into the center of town.]]<<if $CharHP lte 1>><<set $CharHP = 1>><<endif>>
passages.content_zh:
經過戰鬥的激烈消耗後，我氣喘吁吁地環顧街道上下，完全看不到任何人的蹤影。

我深吸一口氣讓自己鎮定下來。

[IF $random is 1][ELSE][IF $EnemyFlee is "true"]  [ELSE][IF $weaponChance lte 5]
我花點時間搜查了屍體：

我找到了 $AmmoLoot 發子彈。

我找到了 $$MoneyLoot。
[ELSE]我花點時間搜查了屍體：

我找到了 $$MoneyLoot。[/IF][/IF][/IF]

[繼續。][IF $CharHP lte 1][/IF]

passages.name: SlumSlowRain
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>Light occasionally dances across the sky, punctuated by the rumble of thunder.  

Glancing up at the sky, I can see heavy, dark clouds roiling as rain falls heavily all around me.

[[Continue through the rain.|Run down part of town.]] <<else>>Slow and steady, the rain continues to fall as if the clouds hold an endless supply of moisture.  

As I walk, I can see where the rain hits the puddles, creating little rings in the water before being swallowed by the ripple created by the next drop to strike the water.

I absently pull my jacket tighter around myself to ward off the worst of the weather.

[[Continue on my way.|Run down part of town.]]<</if>>
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]偶爾有閃電劃過天際，伴隨著雷鳴的轟隆聲。

我抬頭望向天空，看見厚重烏黑的雲層翻滾湧動，暴雨正猛烈地傾瀉在我四周。

[冒雨前進。] [ELSE]雨水緩慢而持續地落下，彷彿雲層蘊含著無盡的水氣。

行走時，我看見雨滴打在水窪上，在水面形成一圈圈漣漪，隨即被下一滴落下的雨珠所激起的波紋吞沒。

我下意識地拉緊外套裹住自己，以抵擋這惡劣的天氣。

[繼續趕路。][/IF]

passages.name: Ruins2
passages.content:
I begin to feel disoriented, whether it's from the way this place is laid out or something else, I am not sure.  I close my eyes, taking a deep breath of the cool salty air.

When I open my eyes again, movement at the edge of my vision draws my attention.  I whirl toward the shape but even as I do so it moves deeper into the shadows.  Whatever it is makes a shrill chittering sound, then rustling in the undergrowth announces its retreat.

I stand in place for several seconds, debating on if I really want to follow whatever it was, //Probably just some animal.  If its not going to bother me though, I should probably leave it be.//

[[Continue.|Continue into the ruins.]]
passages.content_zh:
我開始感到暈頭轉向，不確定是因為此地的佈局還是其他什麼原因。我閉上眼睛，深深吸了一口涼爽帶鹹味的空氣。

當我再次睜開眼睛時，視野邊緣的動靜吸引了我的注意。我猛地轉身朝向那個形體，但就在我動作的同時，它已更深地隱入陰影之中。那東西發出尖銳的吱喳聲，接著灌木叢中的窸窣聲宣告了它的撤退。

我在原地站了好幾秒，猶豫著是否真要追蹤那東西。大概只是某種動物吧。既然它不打算打擾我，我或許也該讓它去。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Shop Empty
passages.content:
Inside of the shop, there's an almost unnatural stillness in the air.  I hold my breath, tilting my head slightly as I listen.  <<if $Day gte 5>>Behind me, the roar or falling rain fills my ears.  Somewhere in the distance, the roar of thunder is barely audible.  <<else>>Even the ever present, damnable rain, seems to have eased itself to a soft weeping outside of the store.<</if>>

"You planning to stand in my doorway all day?  Or are you going to come inside to see my //wares?//"<<if $Nadia is "Played">> Nadia purrs from further inside of the store. <<else>> a feminine voice purrs from further inside of the store.<</if>>

[[I go further into the store.|General Store]]
passages.content_zh:
店鋪內部瀰漫著一種近乎不自然的寂靜。我屏住呼吸，微微側頭傾聽。[IF $Day gte 5]身後，暴雨的咆哮充斥耳際。遠處某地，雷鳴的怒吼隱約可聞。[ELSE]就連那無處不在、該死的雨聲，似乎在店外也減弱成了輕柔的啜泣。[/IF]

「你打算在我門口站一整天嗎？還是要進來看看我的貨品？」[IF $Nadia is "Played"]Nadia 從店內更深處傳來慵懶的嗓音。[ELSE]一個女性的聲音從店內更深處慵懶地傳來。[/IF]

[我往店內走去。]

passages.name: nextslum
passages.content:
Breathing heavily from exertion after the fight, I look up and down the street, seeing no sign of another person anywhere.  

I take a deep breath to calm myself.

<<if $random is 1>><<else>><<if $EnemyFlee is "true">>  <<else>><<if $weaponChance lte 5>>
Taking a moment to search the body:

I found <<print $AmmoLoot>> rounds of ammunition.<<set $Ammo = $Ammo + $AmmoLoot>>

I found $<<print $MoneyLoot>>.<<set $Money = $Money + $MoneyLoot>>
<<else>>Taking a moment to search the body:

I found $<<print $MoneyLoot>>.<<set $Money = $Money + $MoneyLoot>><</if>><</if>><</if>>

[[Continue.|Run down part of town.]]<<if $CharHP lte 1>><<set $CharHP = 1>><<endif>>
passages.content_zh:
經過戰鬥的激烈消耗後，我氣喘吁吁地環顧街道上下，完全看不到任何人的蹤影。

我深吸一口氣讓自己鎮定下來。

[IF $random is 1][ELSE][IF $EnemyFlee is "true"]  [ELSE][IF $weaponChance lte 5]
我花點時間搜查了屍體：

我找到了 $AmmoLoot 發子彈。

我找到了 $$MoneyLoot。
[ELSE]我花點時間搜查了屍體：

我找到了 $$MoneyLoot。[/IF][/IF][/IF]

[繼續。][IF $CharHP lte 1][/IF]

passages.name: Leave.
passages.content:
<<if $PastorBook is "Taken">>Glancing around the room, I find a piece of cloth large enough to wrap the book in.  Its not a perfect way to transport the book, but it will keep most of the weather off of it.

//I'll have to work on translating this when I have a moment.  Not sure if it has anything to do with the pastor's death, but it never hurts to follow all of your leads.//  I think as I tuck the book beneath my heavy coat.

With one last glance around the room, I turn back to the ladder and climb back up to the Church.

<<else>>With one last glance around the room, I turn back to the ladder and climb back up to the Church.

<</if>><<churchlink "Church.">>
passages.content_zh:
[IF $PastorBook is "Taken"]我環顧房間四周，找到一塊足夠大的布將書本包裹起來。這不是運送書本最理想的方式，但至少能讓它免於大部分風雨侵襲。

我得找時間翻譯這本書。雖然不確定它是否與牧師的死有關，但追查所有線索總沒壞處。我一邊想著，一邊將書塞進厚重的外套底下。

最後再掃視房間一眼，我轉身走向梯子，爬回教堂。

[ELSE]最後再掃視房間一眼，我轉身走向梯子，爬回教堂。

[/IF]

passages.name: Ruins16
passages.content:
Walking along the ancient road, I discover my path blocked by a massive fallen pillar.  

I stop where I am standing, looking at the long pillar, its surface having a slight curl to it.  My eyes follow it from the broken end down its considerable length to the pointed tip, //Almost like a massive long seashell.//  

Turning slightly, I look up.  It only takes me a few seconds to realize that this pillar is actually the pointed spire from one of the nearby buildings, broken off and fallen to the ground.  From the looks of the vegetation growing around it, I suspect that the spire has been laying here for a great many years.

[[Continue.|Continue into the ruins.]]
passages.content_zh:
沿著古老的道路前行，我發現去路被一根巨大的倒塌石柱擋住了。

我停在原地，注視著這根長柱，它的表面帶有輕微的捲曲。我的目光從斷裂的一端沿著它可觀的長度，一直看到尖銳的頂端——幾乎像一枚巨大的長海螺。

我微微轉身，向上望去。只花了幾秒鐘，我就意識到這根柱子其實是附近某棟建築的尖頂，斷裂後墜落至此。從周圍生長的植被判斷，我猜這尖頂已經在這裡躺了許多年。

[繼續。]

passages.name: There seems to be a lot more ladies in town than men.  Why is that?
passages.content:
"I've noticed that there seems to be a disproportionate number of women in this town,"  I say softly.

"I thought that was strange at first too.  But no one around here seems to think anything of it,"  A faint smile touches her lips, "But oh, my, god, some of the men in town, they have the biggest cocks you've ever seen."  Arousal is clear in her voice as she says it.

Lifting my eyebrows at the comment, I try to put it from my mind.

<<if $TomTanya is "Next">><<elseif $TomTanya is "Revealed">><<else>>[[Inquire about Tom again.]]

<<endif>>

<<if $TWarning is "Played">>[[Why did you slap me?]]

<</if>>or

[[That's all for now.|The Barmaids Daughter]]
passages.content_zh:
「我注意到這個鎮上的女性數量似乎不成比例地多，」我輕聲說道。

「我一開始也覺得很奇怪。但這裡的人似乎都不以為意，」她唇邊掠過一抹淡淡的笑意，「不過，哦，天啊，鎮上有些男人，他們擁有你這輩子見過最大的陽具。」她說這話時，聲音裡明顯帶著情慾。

聽到這番評論，我揚起眉毛，試著將它拋諸腦後。

[IF $TomTanya is "Next"][ELSEIF $TomTanya is "Revealed"][ELSE][再次詢問關於 Tom 的事。]

[/IF]

[IF $TWarning is "Played"][你為什麼打我耳光？]

[/IF]或

[目前就這樣吧。]

passages.name: Shop5
passages.content:
Upon entering the store, I can see a woman standing near the front counter.  Between her and the shop owner is a tall stack of fabrics in an assortment of colors and patterns.

Accompanying the fabrics is several spools of string and what appears to be a set of needles.  //Must be some kind of seamstress.  That's enough fabric to make quite a few dresses.//  I muse.

At that moment, the woman wraps the smaller items in a bit of cloth, picks up the pile, and turns toward me.

For a second she pauses, regarding me through thick round glasses glasses before making a dismissive sound and stepping around me on her way toward the exit.

[[Continue.|General Store]]
passages.content_zh:
一走進店裡，我就看見一名女子站在前台附近。她與店主之間堆著一疊高高的布料，顏色與花樣琳瑯滿目。

旁邊還放著幾卷線軸和一套看似針組的工具。大概是裁縫師吧。這些布料足夠做好幾件裙子了。我暗自思忖。

就在這時，女子將較小的物品用布包好，抱起整疊布料，轉身面向我。

她頓了一下，透過厚重的圓框眼鏡打量我，隨即發出不屑的聲響，繞過我朝出口走去。

[繼續。]

passages.name: DockSlowRain
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>> I look up at the sky, squinting against the rain.  //Is this ever going to let up?  It was wet here when I arrived, but now it seems like its endless.  I think I'm starting to know how Noah felt when the great flood began.//  I muse.<<else>>Slow and steady, the rain continues to fall as if the clouds hold an endless supply of moisture.  <</if>>

As I walk, I can see where the rain hits the puddles, creating little rings in the water before being swallowed by the ripple created by the next drop to strike the water.

I absently pull my jacket tighter around myself to ward off the worst of the weather.

[[Continue on your way.|the waterfront]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]我抬頭望天，瞇眼抵擋雨水。這雨到底會不會停？我剛到這裡時就濕漉漉的，現在簡直像永無止境。我想我開始體會到大洪水開始時諾亞的感受了。我暗自想著。[ELSE]雨勢緩慢而持續，彷彿雲層蘊藏著無盡的水氣。[/IF]

行走時，我看見雨滴落在水窪中，在水面漾起一圈圈漣漪，隨即被下一滴落下的雨珠所激起的波紋吞沒。

我下意識地拉緊外套，試圖抵擋這惡劣的天氣。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: RichDamp
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>For just a few seconds, the storm seems to let up.  Instead of large heavy raindrops pummeling me, smaller raindrops fall from the sky.  

Looking up, I see a slightly lighter patch of sky directly above me, but it's quickly swallowed by the more ominous black clouds around it.  

At almost that same moment, the heavier rain begins again.

Pulling my jacket tighter around myself, I hunch over to ward off the worst of the rain.  <<else>>The moisture in the air is so thick that it makes the air actually smell //wet//.  

I take a deep breath, filling my lungs with the cool, damp air.<</if>>

[[Continue on your way.|Nice part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]短短幾秒間，暴風雨似乎稍歇。不再是沉重的大雨點砸落，較細的雨絲從天空飄下。

抬頭望去，正上方有一小片稍亮的天空，但很快就被周圍更不祥的烏雲吞噬。

幾乎同時，滂沱大雨再度降臨。

我拉緊外套，蜷縮身子以抵擋最猛烈的雨勢。[ELSE]空氣中的濕氣濃重得讓空氣聞起來都是濕的。

我深吸一口氣，讓清涼潮濕的空氣充滿肺葉。[/IF]

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: commonRoomEvents
SunPark
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>Heavy rain falls all around me, pelting my heavy coat with drops of rain I can feel through my jacket.  The sound of it hitting the leather is loud in my ears.

[[Continue through the rain.|overgrown park]]  <<else>>For a brief moment, there is a small break in the clouds overhead, a ray of sunshine illuminating the area where I'm standing.

My eyes turn upward in the hopes of catching sight of the sun for the first time since arriving in Wanton Cove, but by the time I can look up, the clouds above me have already closed over the sun like a snuffer draped over a candle to put it out.

[[Continue on your way.|overgrown park]]<</if>>
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]暴雨在我四周傾瀉，雨點穿透外套打在我的厚大衣上。雨滴擊中皮革的聲響在耳中格外清晰。

[冒雨前進。][ELSE]短暫片刻，頭頂雲層裂開一道縫隙，一縷陽光照亮了我所站的區域。

我抬頭望去，期盼能看見來到萬頓灣後的第一道陽光，但當我抬眼時，雲層早已如燭罩般覆蓋太陽，將其熄滅。

[繼續前行。][/IF]

passages.name: ChurchSpider
passages.content:
Stepping through the doorway, I step face first into a spider's web.  

I cry out softly in disgust, cringing back as I try to wipe the web from my face.  I've nearly finished clearing the web from my hair and skin when I feel something along my jaw line.  Swatting at it in a near panic, I feel my hand make contact with the web's owner, flinging the quarter sized spider several feet away from myself.

I start to take a step, to stomp on the little creature, but it moves faster, running across the floor to dissappear beneath the nearest pew.

Fighting back a little shudder, I turn my attention to [[my surroundings.|stepping carefully inside.]]
passages.content_zh:
踏進門口的瞬間，我迎面撞上一張蜘蛛網。

我厭惡地低呼一聲，向後瑟縮，試圖抹去臉上的蛛網。就在快要清理完頭髮和皮膚上的蛛絲時，我感到下頜邊有東西。近乎恐慌地拍打過去，手掌擊中了網的主人，將一枚硬幣大小的蜘蛛甩到幾英尺外。

我抬腳想踩死那小生物，但它動作更快，竄過地板消失在最近的長椅下。

強忍一陣輕顫，我將注意力轉向[周圍環境。]

passages.name: nextPassage
passages.content:
In the wake of the sudden violence, the sounds of the waves breaking on the shoreline makes a surreal backdrop to the roaring of my pulse in my ears.

<<if $random is 1>><<else>><<if $EnemyFlee is "true">>  <<else>><<if $weaponChance lte 5>>

passages.name: Ruins21
passages.content:
I choose a building at random to explore.  When I near it, I pause to listen for any signs of trouble, then enter through the oval portal a few paces away from where I am.

Inside, I let my eyes drift over the interior, taking in the smooth, featureless walls.  With the exception of a noticeable dip in one part of the floor, I see nothing worth note in the building.  

Perplexed, I wonder what these structures might have been used for.  //Was their use simply too alien for me to understand?  Have the furnishings simply rotted away?  Or am I simply not making a connection as to what their purpose was?//

[[Continue.|Continue into the ruins.]]
passages.content_zh:
我隨意選了棟建築探索。靠近時，我停下腳步聆聽是否有危險跡象，接著從幾步外的橢圓形入口進入。

室內，我目光掃過平滑無特徵的牆壁。除了地面某處明顯凹陷外，建築裡沒什麼值得注意的。

我困惑地想著這些結構的用途。是它們的用途太過陌生難以理解？還是陳設早已腐朽殆盡？抑或我只是沒能領會它們的功能？

[繼續。]

passages.name: BluffSeagulls
passages.content: When I near the bluff, I can see several seagulls catching the updraft near the cliff<<if $Day gte 5>>, seemingly oblivious to the heavy rain<</if>>.  One of the birds screeches at me, wheeling towards me to stare me down from the air, well out of my reach.  The bird's cry draws the attention of others, and within seconds, several more have joined the first as the birds circle me.\n\nBetween the birds circling and the stout breeze, it almost feels like I'm standing at the center of a whirlwind.  A few seconds later, the tableau breaks, the seagulls backing off, catching the updraft near the cliff as they move a short distance [[out to sea.|Bluff]]

鳥群環繞與強風吹拂間，我幾乎感覺自己站在旋風中心。片刻後，景象驟散，海鷗們向後退去，乘著峭壁的上升氣流朝[海上]飛出一段距離。

passages.name: Light Rain Rich

passages.name: DockFog
passages.content:
I feel a slight chill go up my spine as I walk.  <<if $Day gte 5>>//There's no way that fog should be sticking around in this damned rain.//  My eyes linger on the fog  that seems to defy the heavy rain that is falling<<else>>I can see a thin fog<</if>>, seemingly clinging to the cracks in the road, to the gutters, and to the drooping, half dead plants eking out an existence among the soggy earth.

For a moment, I pause, and look at the fog.  The fog seems to move slightly, but always at the corner of my vision, never where I can see it clearly.

Feeling uneasy, I begin to walk again.

[[Continue on your way.|the waterfront]]
passages.content_zh:
行走時，我感到一陣輕微的寒意竄上脊樑。[IF $Day gte 5]這種鬼天氣下，霧氣根本不可能持續不散。我的目光停留在那似乎無視傾盆大雨的霧氣上[ELSE]我能看見一層薄霧[/IF]，它彷彿緊貼著道路的裂縫、排水溝，以及那些在濕軟泥土中勉強生存、低垂半枯的植物。

我停下腳步片刻，注視著霧氣。霧似乎微微移動，但總是在我視線邊緣，從不讓我清楚看見。

passages.name: Trail3

<<if $Day gte 5>>Over the roar of heavy rain pummeling the canopy above, I hear a loud crack that draws my attention overhead.  I have just enough time to see a large black bird moving from branch to branch before I loose sight of it.<<else>>A soft sound overhead draws my attention.  There, in the branches above is a large black bird looking down at me.  

Unsettled by the beady black eyes staring so intently at me, I continue on my way.  About twenty paces further down the trail, I glance back, but there is no sign of the big bird.

//Didn't even hear it take off.//  I think, feeling unsettled.<<endif>>

passages.name: Park6
passages.content:
When I begin to enter the park, I can see a figure standing within.  It's clear that the person is female just from her figure.  

I walk close in silence, wondering what she might be doing here.

Like a deep startled, her head snaps up and toward me.  I can see her eyes widen slightly when she sees me walking toward her.

I start to raise my hand in greeting, but that seems to be what spurs her to motion.  She quickly turns and walks away from me at a brisk pace.  

Part of me wants to follow her, but I can think of no good reason to do so.  Instead, I stop where I am and watch her go.

像是受到驚嚇般，她猛地抬頭轉向我。當她看見我朝她走去時，我能看見她的眼睛微微睜大。

我內心有一部分想跟隨她，但我想不出任何合理的理由這麼做。於是，我停在原地，目送她離開。

[繼續。]

passages.name: May I see Azumi again?

Mr Morichi makes a sour face, much like I expect my own expression was when I first tried his bitter tea.

With a heavy sigh, he reaches into a pocket and extends a key towards me, "I will not be held responsible for her behavior, or anything that might happen to you.  You will lock the door behind yourself when you are finished //speaking// with her, and under no circumstances will you let her out of her room.  When you are done, you may return the key to me."

With a nod, I accept the key.  When it becomes clear that Mr Morichi will not be accompanying me, I make my exit and make my way to [[Azumi's room.]]

Morichi先生做了個苦澀的表情，就像我初次嚐到他那苦茶時預期自己會露出的表情一樣。

他重重嘆了口氣，伸手從口袋裡掏出一把鑰匙遞給我：「我不會為她的行為負責，也不會為你可能遭遇的任何事負責。你和她談完後，必須從外面上鎖。無論在任何情況下，都不得讓她離開房間。結束後，你可以把鑰匙還給我。」

我點頭接過鑰匙。當清楚Morichi先生不會陪同我前往時，我便告退，動身前往[Azumi的房間]。
