passages.name: BluffDownpour
passages.content:
Without much warning, the light rain I had been walking in turns into a full blown downpour.  Within seconds, my already damp clothes are soaked through, chilling me with the cold rain.  With nothing nearby that I can use for shelter, I instead turn my attention towards the mansion.  

Breaking into a run, I try to reach the shelter of the mansion's eves, but before I'm more than half way to the shelter it would provide, the rain lets up to almost nothing.

My eyes turn upward, looking at the suddenly lighter clouds overhead.  Shaking my head in disbelief, [[I return to a walk once more.|Bluff]]
passages.content_zh:
幾乎毫無預警地，原本漫步其中的細雨驟然轉為傾盆大雨。幾秒鐘內，我本就微濕的衣服徹底濕透，冰冷的雨水讓我渾身發寒。附近沒有任何可避雨的地方，我只好將注意力轉向那座宅邸。

我拔腿奔跑，試圖衝到宅邸的屋簷下躲避，但還沒跑到一半能提供遮蔽的距離，雨勢就減弱到幾乎停止。

我抬眼望向突然轉亮的天際雲層，難以置信地搖搖頭，[再度恢復步行。]

passages.name: Group Playing Cards
passages.content:
I scan the interior of the Barmaid's Daughter slowly, taking in the details.

Amongst the conversation and drinking I would expect, I see a group of four people sitting around a round table.  The table sits at a barely perceivable tilt, but the four around it seem ignorant of that fact.  

I see one of the people tap the table, "Hit me,"  the soft featured man says.  

The woman across from him, the dealer slides another playing card across the table to him.

//Blackjack.  Wonder if they'd deal me in some time?//  I wonder to myself.

[[Continue on my way.|The Barmaids Daughter]]
passages.content_zh:
我緩緩掃視「酒保的女兒」內部，仔細觀察細節。

在預期中的談話與飲酒喧鬧中，我看見四個人圍坐在一張圓桌旁。桌子有著幾乎難以察覺的傾斜，但圍坐的四人似乎渾然不覺。

我看見其中一人輕敲桌面，「發牌給我，」那名面容柔和的男子說道。

對面的女子——莊家——將另一張撲克牌滑過桌面遞給他。

二十一點。不知道他們會不會讓我加入玩幾把？我暗自思忖。

[繼續我的路程。]

passages.name: TownFog
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>In spite of the rain that is falling, there seems to be a slight fog clinging to the ground, <<else>>I feel a slight chill go up my spine as I walk.  I can see a thin fog,<</if>> seemingly clinging to the cracks in the road, to the gutters, and to the drooping, half dead plants eking out an existence among the soggy earth.

For a moment, I pause, looking at the fog.  The fog seems to move slightly, but always at the corner of my vision, never where I can see it clearly.

Feeling uneasy, I begin to walk again.

[[Continue on your way.|Head into the center of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]儘管雨正下著，地面上卻似乎籠罩著一層薄霧，[ELSE]行走時，我感到一陣輕微的寒意竄上脊背。我能看見一層薄霧，[/IF]彷彿緊貼著道路的裂縫、排水溝，以及那些在濕軟泥土中勉強存活的低垂半枯植物。

我停下腳步片刻，注視著霧氣。霧似乎微微移動，但總是在視線邊緣，從不在我能清楚看見的地方。

感到不安的我，再度開始行走。

[繼續你的路程。]

passages.name: BoatOut
passages.content:
I'm almost to the docks when I hear a shout, "Cast off!"  The voice calls clearly<<if $Day gte 5>> over the sound of the rain<</if>>.

My attention turns to the call.  

I see a fishing boat at the dock, half a dozen sailors, at least half of them female working to free the ship from the dock.

As the sailors work, I can hear the big diesel engine roar, the ship starting to move sluggishly backwards.

The sailors barely have time to free the last rope holding the boat to the dock before it starts to pull towards the cove's outlet.

[[Continue on your way.|the waterfront]]
passages.content_zh:
我快到碼頭時，聽見一聲呼喊：「解纜！」聲音清晰地傳來[IF $Day gte 5]，壓過了雨聲[/IF]。

我的注意力轉向那聲呼喊。

我看到碼頭邊停著一艘漁船，六名水手——至少一半是女性——正忙著將船隻從碼頭解開。

水手們作業時，我能聽見大型柴油引擎的轟鳴，船隻開始遲緩地向後移動。

在水手們勉強解開最後一條繫住船隻與碼頭的繩索時，船已開始朝著海灣出口方向駛離。

[繼續你的路程。]

passages.name: White Goo Park
passages.content:
Nearing the fountain, I can see a faint glow.

I step forward, looking into the water where the glow is coming from.

At first, I think it's a jellyfish of some kind, but I know that doesn't make any sense.

<<if $SailorGoo is "Played">>Looking closer, I realize that it is instead a glob of White Goo, slowly settling towards the bottom of the pool of water.<<else>>Looking closer, I see a glob of something white, thick and luminescent, slowly settling towards the bottom of the pool of water.<<set $SailorGoo to "Played">><<endif>>

[[Continue on your way.|overgrown park]]

passages.name: Light Rain Town
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>I pause to marvel as the heavy rain lets up suddenly, becoming a weeping rain for several seconds.  //Maybe the storm is going to let up?//  I have time to winder before the sky opens up with a renewed torrent of heavy rain.  <<else>>As I walk, a light drizzle begins.

All around me, it's as if the air simply became //so// saturated with moisture that it can no longer hold it all, but is reluctant to release the water it holds.

Reluctantly, I pull my long coat a little tighter around myself.<</if>>

[[Continue on your way.|Head into the center of town.]]

passages.name: Shop1
passages.content:
Stepping inside, I glance up at the little bell that announced my presence.  Looking towards the far side of the room, I can see its owner helping a customer.  When she sees you, she gives a little smile before reutrning her attention to the woman directly across from her.  The two talk for a few more moments, then the woman picks up a small wooden box with a few food goods in it and starts walking your way.

Instinctively, you reach out to open the door for her.  She gives you a soft smile, and a mumbled 'thank you' on her way out the door.

[[Continue.|General Store]]

passages.name: Prostitute
Cave10
passages.content:
Upon entering the cave, I can hear a low, mournful moan coming from somewhere deep within.  My eyes narrow and I quicken my pace, ready for anything.

The moan comes again, sounding human and full of anguish.  Then with a startling suddenness, the sound becomes an animalistic screech of pain, after which I hear only the sound of rain falling outside of the cave.

//Must have been some kind of animal,//  I think, passing my flashlight over the interior of the cave in search of what might have made the noise and seeing no obvious source.

[[Continue.|Enter the cave.]]

passages.name: Group Drinking at Bar
passages.content:
Over at the bar, I see two people sitting near each other on tall stools.  Each person has a half full drink in their hand, sipping at them quietly.

One of the two people catch my eyes in the mirror behind the bar for a long moment.  

About the same time I begin growing suspicious that the individual is watching me for some reason, I see their gaze shift away from me again.

I stand where I am for several more seconds, watching for them to look my way again, but they don't.

//Must have been my imagination.//

[[Continue on my way.|The Barmaids Daughter]]

passages.name: Turn back toward Vick's place.
passages.content:
It does not take me long to find the trail back toward Vicks place, and my sense of unease seems to drive me from the ruins as fast as my feet can propel me through the thick mud without actually breaking into a run.

When I near the clearing around Vick's cabin, the sense of unease fades and I allow myself a moment's reprieve.  With my hands on my knees I breathe heavily, trying to catch my breath after the laborious trek back from the ruins.

[[Go visit with Vick.|Continue towards the Log Cabin.]]

[[Head back toward town.|Take the West fork of the trail.]]

passages.name: Group Drinking at table
passages.content:
A roaring cheer goes up across the tavern from me.  My eyes go that direction.

Around a table, I see half a dozen people, one of them pouring a bottle of something into shot glasses. 

Once all the shot glasses are filled, each person at the table takes one, counts loudly to three as a group, then throws their drinks back together before smalling their shot glasses down on the table and letting out another roaring cheer.

I shake my head with a half grin, then return my attention to the rest of the tavern.

[[Continue on my way.|The Barmaids Daughter]]

passages.name: Church Events
Main7
passages.content:
There are two ladies walking along the main street.  Both are walking close to one another, the older looking one has her arm around her clearly pregnant counterpart.

The younger woman is so pregnant that she more waddles than actually walks, and it's fairly obvious that the older woman is there to help.  

Hooked over her shoulder, the older woman carries a large satchel at her side.  When she notices me, she casts a hard glare my direction but never slows as she walks with the younger woman.

[[Continue on my way.|Head into the center of town.]]

passages.name: Next
passages.content:
//Fifteen minutes later.

Out of the alley once again, I'm not proud of the fact, but I'm happy I didn't eat before work tonight.

"What do we know?"  My voice isn't as unsteady as I had expected it to be.

Captain Steiner meets my gaze, and I'm sure that I look every bit as shaken as he does, "The guy who found it had a psychotic break or something.  He said it was standing in the alley and that it talked to him.  Said something about 'Wanton Cove,' [[whatever that's supposed to mean.]]" 

<<set $WantonCove = "Played">>
<<set $Tom = "Played">>

passages.name: Happy End 5
passages.content_zh:
我絕望地搖搖頭，試圖將那些影像從腦海中甩開，目光與Peters的視線對上。

看來這場噩夢永無止境。

從他眼神裡我能看出，他知道自己已將我牢牢掌握，徹底上鉤。

我朝他走了幾步。這一次，當他遞出那個信封時，我接了過來。

你知道嗎，這封信似乎很重要，但我為什麼不花更多時間仔細看看呢？我瞥了一眼信紙，隨手將它扔到附近的桌子上，或者更準確地說，扔到了散落桌面的啤酒瓶堆上。

[繼續。]

passages.name: nexttavern1
passages.content:
My body aching, I manage to pry my eyes open.

I find myself laying against the wall, where someone pushed me to get me out of the way.  The tenderness of my bruised ribs attest to the //tender care// they gave me when I was moved.  I can't help but think of the boot shaped bruise I expect to find the next time I take my shirt off.

With a little groan, I get back to my feet.  The people in the Barmaid's Daughter only casting casual looks my way as I recompose myself.

[[Continue.|The Barmaids Daughter]]<<set $Taint += 1>><<set $CharHP = 1>>
passages.content_zh:
渾身疼痛中，我勉強睜開雙眼。

發現自己正靠牆躺著，顯然是被人推到一旁以免礙事。肋骨瘀傷處的疼痛，證明了他們移動我時有多麼「溫柔體貼」。我忍不住想到，下次脫下襯衫時，胸口大概會出現靴子形狀的瘀青。

低哼一聲，我掙扎著站起來。酒保的女兒裡的人們只是隨意瞥了我幾眼，看我重新整理好自己。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Slum 5
passages.content:
Slogging through the mud, I can see a woman walking along the street.  Her long hair hands limply around her face and her head is downcast, presumably to shelter her face from the rain.

She wears a cloak that's pulled tightly around herself, accentuating the bulge of her tummy that is a clear indicator of her pregnancy.

When she sees me, her tired expression hardens into something else.  Her pace quickens and she alters her course so she can cross the street, clearly not wanting to walk past me.

[[Continue on my way.|Run down part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
在泥濘中艱難前行時，我看見一名女子沿街走著。她的長髮無力地垂在臉旁，低著頭，大概是為了讓臉避開雨水。

她緊緊裹著一件斗篷，這更凸顯了她腹部的隆起——那是她懷孕的明確標誌。

當她看見我時，疲憊的神情驟然變得僵硬。她加快腳步，改變路線穿過街道，顯然不想從我身邊走過。

[繼續趕路。]

passages.name: Script: taintLink
Shop3
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>Entering the shop, I can hear a distant rumble of thunder from somewhere far away heralding my arrival.

//I wonder how long this storm is going to last,// I think idly as my gaze begins to absently drift over the interior of the little shop.

<<else>>There's a soft pitter patter of rain from behind me as the door closes in my wake.  

I pause to listen, realizing that the soft sound of rain outside has simply been replaced by a softer sound of rain hitting the ceiling overhead.

<</if>>[[Continue.|General Store]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]走進店鋪時，我聽見遠處傳來隱約的雷鳴，彷彿預告著我的到來。

我漫不經心地想著這場暴風雨還會持續多久，目光開始隨意掃視這間小店內部。

[ELSE]身後的門關上時，傳來細微的淅瀝雨聲。

我停下腳步傾聽，意識到外面柔和的雨聲，只不過被頭頂雨滴敲打天花板的更輕柔聲響所取代。

[/IF][繼續。]

passages.name: Trail6
passages.content:
Through the trees, I can see something looming in the shadows.  I pause to take a look.  

Some kind of stone pillar, overgrown over countless years with moss and small plants.  It is hard to tell for sure, and it would likely take hours of pulling at the plants clinging to it to be sure, but I doubt that the formation is a natural one.

<<if $Geography is "Played">>//Maybe it's some bit of those ruins that are supposed to be here on the island?//<<else>>//Maybe its a part of some old building?<</if>>

[[Continue on my way.|Trail]]
passages.content_zh:
透過樹木間隙，我看見陰影中有個龐然大物隱約矗立。我停下腳步仔細察看。

某種石柱，經過無數年的歲月，表面爬滿青苔和小型植物。很難確切辨認，而且大概得花上好幾個小時清理附著的植物才能確定，但我懷疑這構造並非天然形成。

[IF $Geography is "Played"]也許這是島上傳說中那些遺跡的一部分？[ELSE]//或許是某座古老建築的殘骸？[/IF]

[繼續趕路。]

passages.name: Adult content
passages.content:
<<back>>

This game contains Adult Content.  

First off, it should be noted that this game //features// slow Male-to-Female transformation.

Within this game, you can also expect to see:
-Oral Sex
-Vaginal Sex
-Anal Sex
-Non-Consensual (Rape) sex
-M/F Sex
-F/F Sex
-Prostitution
-Tentacle Sex
-Supernatural Sex
-Bestiality
-Masturbation
-Threesomes
-Orgies

All of these things have the potential to appear in the game at one point or another.  Additional items may be added to this list as needed.

<<back>>
passages.content_zh:
本遊戲包含成人內容。

首先請注意，本遊戲包含緩慢的男性轉變為女性的過程。

在本遊戲中，您可能還會看到：
-口交
-陰道性交
-肛交
-非自願性（強暴）性行為
-男/女性行為
-女/女性行為
-賣淫
-觸手性行為
-超自然性行為
-獸交
-自慰
-三人性行為
-群交

以上內容均有可能在遊戲中不同階段出現。此清單可能視需要增加其他項目。

passages.name: TownRain
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>There't a lull in the storm, letting the rain fall less violently for a short time.  <<else>>Slow and steady, the rain continues to fall as if the clouds hold an endless supply of moisture. <</if>> 

As I walk, I can see where the rain hits the puddles, creating little rings in the water before being swallowed by the ripple created by the next drop to strike the water.

I absently pull my jacket tighter around myself to ward off the worst of the weather.

[[Continue on your way.|Head into the center of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]暴風雨暫歇片刻，讓雨勢在短時間內變得稍緩。[ELSE]雨水緩慢而持續地落下，彷彿雲層蘊含著無盡的水氣。[/IF]

行走時，我看見雨滴擊中水窪，在水面形成一圈圈漣漪，隨即被下一滴雨激起的波紋吞沒。

我下意識地將外套拉得更緊，以抵擋最惡劣的天氣。

[繼續趕路。]

passages.name: Light Rain Slum
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>Heavy drops of rain fall from the sky in a steady rhythm.  I can feel every individual drop strike my heavy coat as it hits me.

[[Continue through the rain.|Run down part of town.]]  <<else>>As I walk, a light drizzle begins.

All around me, it's as if the air simply became //so// saturated with moisture that it can no longer hold it all, but is reluctant to release the water it holds.

Reluctantly, I pull my long coat a little tighter around myself.

[[Continue on your way.|Run down part of town.]]<</if>>
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]沉重的雨滴以穩定的節奏從天空落下。每一滴雨水打在我的厚外套上時，我都能清晰感受到撞擊。

[冒雨繼續前行。][ELSE]行走間，開始飄起細雨。

周遭彷彿空氣中的水氣已飽和到無法再容納，卻又遲遲不願釋放所有水分。

我不情願地將長外套拉得更緊些。

[繼續趕路。][/IF]

passages.name: Path
passages.content:
Hefting the Machete I purchased from Nadia, I take a couple of quick swings.  I cant help but feel a bit of satisfaction at how easily it slices through the brush blocking my way.

It proves to be a long project, and by the time I'm done, I'm sweating profusely.  Through maybe ten yards of dense forest, the trail opens once more to reveal the continuing trail.

//Well worn trail, but overgrown like that?  Never seen anything like that before.//

But my attention is quickly distracted by the [[scene before me.|Cave Entrance]]
passages.content_zh:
我舉起從Nadia那裡買來的砍刀，快速揮砍了幾下。看著它輕易劈開擋路的灌木，我不禁感到一陣滿足。

這證明是項漫長的工程，完成時我已大汗淋漓。穿過約十碼茂密的森林後，小徑再次開闊，展現出延續的路徑。

明明是經常有人走的路，卻荒廢成這樣？我從未見過這種情況。

但我的注意力很快被[眼前的景象]吸引過去。

passages.name: Not Enough Money
passages.content:
"I'm going to guess that <<print $Money>> bucks isn't going to get me very far with you?"  I ask.  I'm pretty sure I already know the answer.

She gives you a sad little smile, "Sorry hun.  Maybe another time?"  <<if $Mutation gte 4>>I can tell from her tone that her heart just isn't in it when she says the words.  

//Have I really become to grotesque to look at?//<<else>>

"Can't blame a guy for trying,"  I say lightly.<</if>>

[[Continue talking with Tanya.|Tanya]]
or
[[Step away from Tanya.|The Barmaids Daughter]]
passages.content_zh:
「我猜 $Money 塊錢在你這兒大概買不到什麼吧？」我問道。其實心裡早就有底了。

她對你露出一抹帶著歉意的小小微笑，「抱歉啦，親愛的。或許下次？」[IF $Mutation gte 4]從她的語氣裡，我聽得出她說這話時根本心不在焉。

難道我真的已經變得如此畸形，讓人連看都不想看了嗎？[ELSE]

「試試總不犯法嘛。」我故作輕鬆地說。[/IF]

[繼續和 Tanya 交談。]
或
[離開 Tanya 身邊。]

passages.name: Rich1
passages.content:
As I walk along the street, I see a bit of motion from a nearby house.  When I turn my attention that direction, I can see a woman holding the drapes to one side, watching me from the house's darkened interior.

Not sure what else to do, I raise my hand to give a little wave.  I'm rewarded with a small smile from the woman, then a brief but entergetic wave in return.  

A moment later, she lets the drape fall back in place, leaving me alone in the street once more.

[[Continue on your way.|Head into the center of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
我沿著街道走著，瞥見旁邊一棟房子裡有些動靜。轉頭望去，只見一個女人將窗簾掀開一角，從昏暗的室內正盯著我看。

不知該作何反應，我抬手輕輕揮了揮。那女人回以一個淺淺的微笑，接著短促卻用力地朝我揮了揮手。

片刻後，她鬆手讓窗簾落下，街道上又只剩我一人。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: Cave11
passages.content:
I am just entering the darker region of the cave when I see my flashlight reflect off of something.  Two golden eyes reflect back at me from a pitch black area of the cave.  

As I watch, the eyes vanish for a heartbeat, before returning.  For several more seconds the eyes stay focused on me, though I can hot make out any detail of whatever is there beyond the eyes.  

Suddenly, the eyes slift, then vanish again before I can hear the sound of something scurring off into the deeper darkness.

[[Continue.|Enter the cave.]]
passages.content_zh:
剛踏入洞穴更深的陰暗處，我的手電筒光突然照到了什麼東西。一雙金色的眼睛在漆黑的岩壁間反射著光芒。

我緊盯著，那雙眼睛消失了一瞬，隨即又出現。接下來好幾秒，那對眼睛始終鎖定著我，但我完全看不清眼睛之外究竟是什麼形體。

突然間，眼睛一斜，再度消失——緊接著我聽見某種東西窸窣竄入更深黑暗中的聲音。

[繼續前進。]

passages.name: Dock4
passages.content:
I pause, my eyes turning to the ocean.  For several seconds I let my gaze linger, watching the waves crashing against the shore and the swells upon the horizon.  

My thoughts drift, thinking about all that water, the sheer power of it as it pounds relentlessly against the shore, and wondering what dark secrets might be hidden just beneath the waves.

Shaking the thought before I can let such dark things darken my mood further, I return my attention to what I was doing before.

[[Continue on your way.|the waterfront]]
passages.content_zh:
我停下腳步，目光轉向海洋。凝望了好一會兒，看著浪濤拍打岸邊，地平線上湧動的波瀾。

思緒飄遠，想著這無盡的海水，它持續不斷衝擊海岸的龐大力量，也好奇波浪之下究竟隱藏著何等黑暗的秘密。

趁這些陰暗念頭還沒進一步侵蝕心情，我甩開思緒，將注意力拉回手邊的事。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: Rich3
passages.content:
I spot a woman standing in a window of a nearby house.  She had an unhappy look about her as she watches me, one hand resting lightly on her swollen belly.

My pace falters and I come to a halt in the middle of the street.  I make no secret of the fact that I am looking right back at her.  After a moment, she lifts her hand off of her belly and reaches out, taking hold of the curtains and pulling them closed between us.

//What the hell was that about?//  I wonder darkly.

[[Continue on my way.|Nice part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
我注意到附近一棟房子的窗邊站著一個女人。她望著我的神情顯得不太愉快，一隻手輕輕搭在隆起的腹部上。

我的腳步遲疑下來，最終停在街道中央。我毫不掩飾地直視回去。片刻後，她將手從腹部移開，伸向前握住窗簾，唰地拉上，隔絕了彼此的視線。

這他媽到底是怎麼回事？我陰鬱地想著。

[繼續往前走。]

passages.name: Happy End 4
passages.content:
//Fifteen minutes later.

Out of the alley once again, I'm not proud of the fact, but I'm happy I didn't eat before work tonight.

"What do we know?"  My voice isn't as unsteady as I had expected it to be.

Captain Steiner meets my gaze, and I'm sure that I look every bit as shaken as he does, "The guy who found it had a psychotic break or something.  He said it was standing in the alley and that it talked to him.  Said something about 'Wanton Cove,' whatever that's supposed to mean." 

[[Continue.|Happy End 5]]
passages.content_zh:
//十五分鐘後。

再次走出巷子，說實話這並不光彩，但我很慶幸今晚上班前沒吃東西。

「目前知道什麼？」我的聲音比預期中要穩定。

Steiner 隊長迎上我的視線，我看得出他和我一樣驚魂未定，「發現現場的那傢伙精神崩潰了，胡言亂語。他說那東西當時就站在巷子裡，還對他說話。提到了什麼『萬頓灣』，天知道那是什麼意思。」

[繼續。]

passages.name: Tavern7
passages.content:
The unmistakable sound of sex assails me as I enter the Barmaid's Daughter's tavern.  Wet slapping sounds accompanied by shameless moans fill the stale air.

I turn my attention toward the sound, discovering several people grouped near a corner of the room.  On the grounds that half of the people are naked, there's little doubt as to what is happening.


<<if $Depravity gte 3>>[[Move closer for a better look.|TavernProperOrgy]]
<</if>>[[Try to ignore what is happening and continue about your business.]]
passages.content_zh:
一走進「酒保的女兒」酒館，撲面而來的就是再明顯不過的性愛聲響。濕黏的拍擊聲夾雜著毫無羞恥的呻吟，充斥在沉悶的空氣中。

我朝聲音來源望去，發現有好幾個人聚在房間角落。光看那群人裡有一半赤身裸體，就完全清楚正在發生什麼事。

[IF $Depravity gte 3][靠近點看個仔細。]
[/IF][試著不理會，繼續做自己的事。]

passages.name: Hybrid1
passages.content:
I stand there for nearly a minute, looking down at the body as I try to make sense of what I am seeing.

//It looks human, but its obvious that its not.//  I shudder lightly, //It looks like some kind of sea monster crossed with a human.//

I'm hesitant as I move closer to the creature, rolling it onto its back.  I look at its oddly webbed fingers, its too large eyes.  

Another shiver goes through me.  My legs feel weak as I step away from the creature.

[[Continue.|Run down part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
我站在那兒將近一分鐘，低頭盯著那具軀體，試圖理解眼前所見。

它看起來像人，但顯然不是。我輕輕打了個冷顫——這東西像是某種海怪與人類的混合體。

我遲疑地靠近這生物，將它翻成仰躺。注視著它帶蹼的怪異手指、過大的眼睛。

又一股顫慄掠過全身。從這生物身旁退開時，我的雙腿陣陣發軟。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Another Shopper
passages.content:
Upon entering the store, I quickly realize that I am not alone.  Over to one side of the store, I can see a <<if $GooCounter is 0>>young woman <<else>>man <</if>>shopping, their arms filled with an assortment of items.

The <<if $GooCounter is 0>>woman <<else>>man <</if>> looks my way for only a split second before turning their attention back to the shelf before them.

Turning my attention away from the <<if $GooCounter is 0>>woman, <<else>>man, <</if>>I begin to browse [[the store|General Store]]
passages.content_zh:
一走進店裡，我立刻意識到自己不是獨自一人。商店另一側，我看到一個[IF $GooCounter is 0]年輕女子[ELSE]男人[/IF]正在購物，懷裡抱著各式各樣的商品。

那[IF $GooCounter is 0]女子[ELSE]男人[/IF]只朝我這兒瞥了一瞬，便又回頭專注於面前的貨架。

我將目光從[IF $GooCounter is 0]女子[ELSE]男人[/IF]身上移開，開始瀏覽[店內商品]。

passages.name: Main1
passages.content:
At first, you think its a feminine man coming down the street towards you, but as she gets closer, you can see the unmistakable swell of breasts beneath the men's clothing she is wearing.  

You pause, momentarily struck by the strangeness of what you are seeing<<if $Taint gte 64>> though you suppose your own changes make for a similar site,<<endif>> before she's past you, still walking and having not so much as cast a glance your direction.

[[Continue on your way.|Head into the center of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
起初，你以為是個陰柔的男人沿街朝你走來，但隨著她靠近，你能清楚看見她身上那件男性衣物底下，有著不容錯認的胸部隆起曲線。

你停下腳步，眼前這幕怪異景象讓你一時怔住[IF $Taint gte 64]——雖說你猜想自己身上的變化大概也構成類似光景[/IF]，而她已從你身旁走過，繼續前行，連瞥都沒往你這邊瞥一眼。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: Deep Puddle
passages.content:
My footsteps echo softly between the nearby dilapidated houses as I walk down the muddy street.

Not watching close enough to where I'm walking, I step in a deep puddle, plunging my shoe into the cold and muddy water.

I curse softly as I feel the water pour over the top of my boot to soak my sock, and foot inside.

Taking an experimental step, I can feel my now wet foot squelch in my boot.

Unhappy, I say a few choice words under my breath.

[[Continue on your way.|Run down part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
我沿著泥濘的街道走著，腳步聲在附近破敗的屋舍間輕輕迴盪。

沒仔細看路，我一腳踩進個深水坑，整隻鞋陷進冰冷泥水裡。

我低聲咒罵，感覺泥水漫過靴口浸濕了襪子，還有裡頭的腳。

試探性地踏出一步，能感覺到濕透的腳在靴子裡發出噗嘰聲響。

心情不悅，我從牙縫裡擠出幾句精選的髒話。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: Shipbuilder
passages.content:
When I reach the waterfront, I glance down towards the shipbuilder's workshop.

I can see a thin wisp of smoke coming from the building's chimney<<if $Day gte 5>> though the rain seems to keep it to a minimum<<endif>>.

For a moment, I see someone moving amongst the small boats around the building, apparently the shipbuilder who lives there.  A moment later, I loose sight of the shipbuilder amongst the boats and equipment scattered around the building.

[[Continue on your way.|the waterfront]]
passages.content_zh:
走到濱水區時，我朝造船匠的工作坊瞥了一眼。

能看見建築物的煙囪飄出一縷細細的煙[IF $Day gte 5]，雖然雨水似乎讓煙減到最少[/IF]。

有那麼一瞬間，我看見有人在建築周圍的小船間移動，顯然是住在那兒的造船匠。片刻後，造船匠的身影就消失在散落建築周圍的船隻與器材之間了。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: Talk to Vick.
passages.content:
[[What's your story?]]

[[What can you tell me about Wanton Cove?]]<<if $RuinsOpen is "Played">>

[[Ask Vick about the Ruins.]]<</if>>

[[Who is SHE?]]

[[Do you know anything about a guy named Tom?]]<<if $Pastor is "Played">>

[[Ask Vick about the Pastor.]]<</if>><<if $Taint gte 95>>  

[[Ask Vick about your transformation.]]<</if>><<if $VickSex is "Played">><<if $Mutation lte 7>>

[[Have sex with Vick|getVickLink()]]<</if>><</if>>

or
[[Done talking to Vick.|Enter the Log Cabin.]]
passages.content_zh:
[你有什麼故事？]

[關於萬頓灣，你能告訴我什麼？][IF $RuinsOpen is "Played"]

[向Vick詢問關於遺跡的事。][/IF]

[她是誰？]

[你認識一個叫Tom的人嗎？][IF $Pastor is "Played"]

[向Vick詢問關於牧師的事。][/IF][IF $Taint gte 95]

[向Vick詢問關於你變異的事。][/IF][IF $VickSex is "Played"][IF $Mutation lte 7]

[與Vick發生性關係][/IF][/IF]

或
[結束與Vick的對話。]

passages.name: SlumDamp
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>Rain thunders down around me, so heavy that it obscures my vision.  

I try to look through the heavy dulge of rain, but I'm barely able to even make out the shapes of buildings around me.

[[Continue through the rain.|Run down part of town.]]  <<else>>The moisture in the air is so thick that it makes the air actually smell //wet//.  

I take a deep breath, filling my lungs with the cool, damp air.

[[Continue on my way.|Run down part of town.]]<</if>>
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]暴雨在我周圍轟然傾瀉，雨勢猛烈到遮蔽了我的視線。

我試圖透過厚重的雨幕望去，卻連周圍建築的輪廓都幾乎看不清。

[冒雨繼續前進。][ELSE]空氣中的濕氣濃重到讓空氣聞起來真的像濕的一樣。

我深吸一口氣，讓冰涼潮濕的空氣充滿肺腑。

[繼續前行。][/IF]

passages.name: Light Rain Dock
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>The sound of the rain hitting the ocean fills my ears as I look out over the water.  The clouds on the distance seem to roil ominously.  <<else>>As I walk, a light drizzle begins.

All around me, it's as if the air simply became //so// saturated with moisture that it can no longer hold it all, but is reluctant to release the water it holds.

Reluctantly, I pull my long coat a little tighter around myself.<<endif>>

[[Continue on my way.|the waterfront]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]當我望向海面時，雨水擊打海洋的聲音充斥耳際。遠處的雲層彷彿不祥地翻騰著。[ELSE]走著走著，開始飄起細雨。

四周彷彿空氣中的水氣飽和到再也承載不住，卻又不願輕易釋放所蘊含的水分。

我不情願地將長外套拉緊了些。[/IF]

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: TownDamp
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>There's lour roar that carries through the air clearly, the sound of heavy raindrops hitting the roofs of nearby buildings.  

Its the kind of weather that makes you wish you were somewhere dry, preferably sitting hear a nice warm fire.<<else>>The moisture in the air is so thick that it makes the air actually smell //wet//.  

I take a deep breath, filling my lungs with the cool, damp air.<</if>>

[[Continue on your way.|Head into the center of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]空氣中清晰傳來低沉的轟鳴，那是沉重雨滴敲打附近建築屋頂的聲響。

這種天氣會讓你渴望身處乾燥之地，最好能坐在溫暖舒適的爐火邊。[ELSE]空氣中的濕氣濃重到讓空氣聞起來真的像濕的一樣。

我深吸一口氣，讓冰涼潮濕的空氣充滿肺腑。[/IF]

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: Into HouseSlum
passages.content:
A little distance a head of me, I see someone hanging laundry on a drooping clothesline.

She pauses, glancing up at me.

I meet her eyes and give a half nod in greeting.  

Instead of returning my gesture, she instead glances one last time at her laundry, picks up her basked of clothes, then steps inside the nearby house.

Once she's out of sight, I think I hear the faint sound of the door's deadbolt sliding home.

[[Continue on your way.|Run down part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
在我前方不遠處，看見有人在垂垮的曬衣繩上晾衣服。

她停下手，抬眼瞥向我。

我迎上她的目光，微微點頭致意。

她沒有回應我的示意，反而最後看了一眼她的衣物，拎起裝衣服的籃子，便走進旁邊的房子裡。

她一消失蹤影，我彷彿聽見門栓輕輕滑上的微弱聲響。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: BluffGust
passages.content:
Nearing the top of the bluff, the light breeze pulls lightly at my coat<<if $Day gte 5>> as the rain falls relentlessly from the sky<</if>>.  Walking into the wind, the ocean's salt is heavy on the air.

Without warning, a heavy gust of wind knocks me off balance, causing me to stumble.

Regaining my footing, the wind returns to its previous light breeze.

Feeling the sudden need to stay just a little further away from the cliff edge, [[I continue to walk.|Bluff]]
passages.content_zh:
接近懸崖頂端時，微風輕輕拉扯我的外套[IF $Day gte 5]，雨水則無情地從天空落下[/IF]。迎風而行，空氣中滿是濃重的海鹽味。

毫無預警地，一陣強風讓我失去平衡，踉蹌了幾步。

重新站穩後，風勢又恢復成原先的微風。

突然覺得有必要離懸崖邊緣再遠一些，[我繼續往前走。]

passages.name: Battle Test
passages.content:
Generic:
Docks: [[Combat A]]
Docks 2: [[Docks Combat 2]]
Bad Part of Town: [[Combat Slum]]
Barmaid's Daughter: [[Tavern Combat]]
Main Street: [[Street Combat]]
Forest: [[Forest Combat]]
Ruins (Deep One): [[Ruins Fight 1]]
Ruins (Female Deep One): [[RuinsFightFemaleDeepOne]]
Ruins (Tentacled Thing): [[Ruins Fight 2]]

Unique Combat Scenes:
Hybrid Fight: [[He does nothing of the sort.]]
Deep One Fight:  [[DeepOneFight]]
Female Hybrid Fight: [[Book Fight]]

passages.name: TrailTrap
passages.content:
The squelching of my boots is punctuated by the sound of raindrops dripping lazily between the leaves overhead.  

Barely visible in the bushes beside the trail, I see a small snare, placed in the hopes of trapping a small animal.  Looking closer, I see that the trap is empty, at least for now.

//Seems that someone is trapping in the area.  Probably squirls given the size of the snare.//

Turning my attention back to the trail, [[I continue on my way.|Trail]]
passages.content_zh:
靴子的噗嘰聲，夾雜著雨滴懶洋洋地從頭頂葉片間滴落的聲響。

在小徑旁的灌木叢裡，勉強能看見一個小型套索，擺放著希望能捕捉小動物。仔細一看，套索是空的，至少目前如此。

看來有人在這一帶設陷阱。從套索尺寸判斷，大概是抓松鼠用的。

將注意力轉回小徑上，[我繼續前行。]

passages.name: Park3
passages.content:
//Glu-glurk!//  The sudden sound pulls my attention towards the old fountain.  As I watch, it makes another low thick sound.  

From the top of the fountain I can see a bit of blackish green sludge ooze from the top of the fountain.

After a while, when the sound does not repeat itself, I lean closer for a better look at whatever came out of the fountain, seeing a kind of slime, most likely some form of algae.  

[[Continue on your way.|overgrown park]]
passages.content_zh:
咕嚕——咕嚕！突如其來的聲響將我的注意力拉向那座舊噴泉。我注視著它，又傳來一陣低沉濃稠的聲音。

從噴泉頂端，我能看見一點黑綠色的黏稠物從泉口滲出。

過了一會兒，當聲響不再重複，我湊近些想看清楚噴泉裡究竟冒出了什麼——看起來像是某種黏液，很可能是某種藻類。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: Inn3
passages.content:
In the hallways between my room and the stairs leading to the tavern on the floor below, I can hear a giggle come from one of the rooms I pass.

Pausing, I listen for the sound again.  The giggle returns, but I also notice the sound of a squeaking bed frame.  

A small thrill goes through me as I realize I am eavesdropping such an intimate, and carnal moment.

There is an amused smile upon my face as I begin to walk again.

[[Continue.|Your room.]]
passages.content_zh:
在我房間與通往樓下酒館的樓梯之間的走廊上，我聽見經過的某個房間傳來一陣輕笑。

我停下腳步，側耳傾聽。笑聲再次響起，但這次我還注意到床架吱呀作響的聲音。

一股微妙的刺激感竄過全身，我意識到自己正在偷聽如此親密而肉慾的時刻。

臉上浮現一抹玩味的微笑，我再度邁開腳步。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Play the game.
passages.content:
<<set $random to random(1,5)>><<if $random is 1>>[img[images/Title.jpg]]<<else>>[img[images/Allure island title B.png]]<</if>>

I spent nearly twenty-five years on the force. 

In that time, I had convinced myself that mankind was at the root of all this world's evil.  The things a person is capable of doing to another human being are truly horrible.  I'd seen the worst this world had to offer, or so I thought.

[[Tell us a little about yourself.]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $random is 1][ELSE][/IF]

我在警隊待了將近二十五年。

那段時間裡，我曾說服自己：人類就是這世上一切罪惡的根源。一個人能對另一個人做出的事，實在可怕至極。我見識過這世界最醜陋的一面——至少我曾經這麼以為。

[跟我們談談你自己吧。]

passages.name: Resist the urge.
passages.content:
Taking a deep breath, my nostrils are filled with a salty sweet smell.  The closest thing I have to compare it to is semen, only this leaves me feeling aroused.

Feeling uncertain, I stand back up.  I turn my attention to my surroundings again, searching for anything else that appears out of place.

Still feeling shaken from the experience, I take a deep calming breath.

<<townlink "Head into the center of town.">><<set $Fountain to "Played">>
passages.content_zh:
我深吸一口氣，鼻腔充滿一股鹹甜的氣味。最接近的比喻是精液，但這氣味卻讓我感到興奮。

帶著不安，我重新站直身子。再次將注意力轉向周遭，搜尋任何其他不尋常的事物。

經歷剛才的事仍心有餘悸，我深深吸了一口氣讓自己鎮定下來。

passages.name: Ruins4
passages.content:
I come to a stop as I hear something.  The sound it faint, like a mass of people trying to talk over the top of each other somewhere in the distance.  

A chill goes through me when I think of the tentacled thing.

Remaining still, I listen, trying to determine if it might be coming closer.  Thankfully the sound fades slowly into the unnatural silence that seems to be the norm in these strange ruins.

[[Continue.|Continue into the ruins.]]
passages.content_zh:
我停下腳步，因為聽見了某種聲音。那聲音很微弱，像是遠處有一大群人爭相搶話的嘈雜聲。

一想到那觸手怪物，寒意便竄過脊背。

我保持靜止，仔細聆聽，試圖判斷聲音是否正在靠近。幸好，聲響逐漸消逝於這片異常的寂靜中——而這寂靜似乎是這些詭異遺址的常態。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Wake
passages.content:
The sound of heavy rain hitting my window wakes me while strong wind rattles the building.  The force of the wind and rain is so much that I can see water leaking into the room around the window that graces my wall.

A flash of light fills the room followed less than a second later by a deep rolling thunder that seems to drag on forever.

Closing my eyes, I take a deep breath, letting it out slowly before [[crawling out of bed.|Your room.]]
passages.content_zh:
暴雨敲打窗戶的聲音將我驚醒，強風搖撼著建築。風雨如此猛烈，我甚至能看到雨水從牆上的窗框周圍滲入房間。

一道閃光照亮房間，不到一秒後，傳來深沉綿延的雷鳴，彷彿永無止境。

我閉上眼，深吸一口氣，緩緩吐出，然後[爬下床。]

passages.name: ChurchOld
passages.content: From within the darkened depths of the Church, I can hear a soft creak, followed by the building groaning.  A faint whistle comes from somewhere to my left where the wind filters through a cracked window.\n\nFor a moment, I stand there, wondering just how safe the old building is.  I finally decide that if the Church has stood for this long, its unlikely that its going to simply fall down in [[the next few minutes.|stepping carefully inside.]]
passages.content_zh:
從教堂幽暗的深處，我聽見輕微的吱嘎聲，接著是建築結構的呻吟。左側某處，風從破裂的窗戶縫隙鑽入，發出微弱的呼嘯聲。

我佇立片刻，懷疑這棟老建築究竟安不安全。最終我認定，既然教堂已屹立這麼久，[接下來幾分鐘內]應該不至於突然倒塌。

passages.name: Trail1
passages.content:
I look to the side as I hear something moving in the undergrowth nearby.  

Moving a step off of the trail to investigate, the movement suddenly stops, replaced by something that sounds like a cross between a hiss and a growl.  

//Something doesn't like me being here,// I think with a little smirk.  Stepping back to the trail, I start to walk again, keep half an eye on the place the movement and sound had come from.

[[Continue.|Trail]]
passages.content_zh:
我聽見附近灌木叢傳來動靜，便轉頭望去。

我踏離小徑一步想去查看，那動靜卻驟然停止，取而代之的是一種介於嘶聲與低吼之間的聲響。

有什麼東西不喜歡我待在這裡呢——我帶著一絲冷笑心想。我退回小徑，繼續前進，同時分神留意聲音與動靜傳來的方向。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Cave13
passages.content:
Shining my fleshlight upwards, I look at the large stalactites hanging from the celing.  Like the random assortment of mismatched teeth from some varnivorous creature, they hang above my head.

I feel terribly uneasy as the thought of this room closing like a giant mouth crosses my mind.

Turning my attention to the rest of the room, I can't help but feel the room is just a little smaller than before.

[[Continue.|Enter the cave.]]
passages.content_zh:
我將手電筒向上照，看著從洞頂垂下的巨大鐘乳石。它們懸在我頭頂，就像某種食肉動物口中參差不齊的獠牙。

一想到這個洞穴可能像巨口般閉合，我就感到極度不安。

將注意力轉向洞穴其他部分，我忍不住覺得空間似乎比剛才小了一點。

[繼續。]

passages.name: A dreamless sleep consumes me.
passages.content:
I struggle to fall asleep for an hour or more.  Struggling to come to grips with everything that I learned today.  

//Tom,//  The thought is surreal, //I found him.//  

I turn on my bed, my eyes opening up just wide enough to see the narrow band of light creeping under my door before closing them again.  //But now what?//

That's the thought that dominates my mind as I finally drift off to a fitful sleep.

[[Wake.|Your room.]]
passages.content_zh:
我掙扎了一個多小時才入睡，努力消化今天得知的一切。

Tom……這念頭如此不真實——我找到他了。

我在床上翻身，眼睛睜開一條縫，瞥見門底縫隙透進的狹長光帶，隨即又閉上眼。但現在該怎麼辦？

這個念頭盤踞腦海，直到我終於陷入斷斷續續的淺眠。

[醒來。]

passages.name: Anne Home
passages.content:
<<set $random to random(1,4)>>The moment that my boot touches the bottom step of her deck, I see a very faint smile touch her lips.  Though what is most startling about that smile is the fact that it appears real.  

It is gone almost as quickly as it appeared.

//Why do I feel like an animal being led to the slaughter.//  I think as she turns to open the door to her house, motioning me inside.

[[I step inside.|Anne Interior]]
passages.content_zh:
當我的靴子踏上她家門廊台階最底層的瞬間，我看見一抹極淡的微笑掠過她的唇邊。而最令人驚訝的是，那笑容看起來是真心的。

但它消失得和出現時一樣快。

為什麼我覺得自己像隻被引向屠宰場的動物？當她轉身打開家門，示意我進去時，我這麼想著。

[我踏進屋內。]

passages.name: SoftTrailRain
passages.content:
I can hear <<if $Day gte 5>>heavy<<else>>soft<<endif>> raindrops striking the forest canopy overhead, all around me is the soft whisper of raindrops striking leaves and dripping through the branches over my head.

I glance up at the greenery above, idly taking note of the fact that <<if $Day gte 5>>little<<else>>none<<endif>> of the rain is actually reaching the ground.

Suppressing a soft smile, [[I continue down the path.|Trail]]
passages.content_zh:
我能聽見[IF $Day gte 5]沉重[ELSE]輕柔[/IF]的雨滴敲擊著頭頂上方的森林樹冠，四周盡是雨點打在葉片上、從我頭頂枝椏間滴落的輕柔細語。

我抬頭瞥向上方的綠意，漫不經心地注意到一個事實：[IF $Day gte 5]幾乎沒有[ELSE]完全沒有[/IF]雨水真正落到地面。

壓下一抹淺笑，[我沿著小徑繼續前行。]

passages.name: Jimmy1
passages.content:
Inspecting the door, I take note of the style of lock.

//Cheap doorknob, break that and I can slide the lock mechanism.//  I think confidently.

It takes only a moment to find a heavy rock in the mud.  With a firm swing, I knock the cheap doorknob loose.

Pulling the broken doorknob free, I look at the lock mechanism inside.  With a half smile, I easily flip the lock, the door swings open <<churchlink "at a gentle push.">>
passages.content_zh:
檢查著門，我留意到鎖的樣式。

廉價的門把，砸壞它我就能滑開鎖的機關。我自信地想著。

只花了一會兒工夫，我就在泥濘中找到一塊沉重的石頭。用力一揮，我敲鬆了那個廉價的門把。

將壞掉的門把扯下，我看向內部的鎖定機關。帶著一絲笑意，我輕鬆地撥開鎖，門隨即敞開。

passages.name: TownTorrent
passages.content:
With no warning, the sky opens up a torrent of water, a virtual deluge of water that falls from the sky with pummeling force.  

I try to flip up the collar of my jacket to ward off the worst of it, but its of no use.  Within seconds, I'm soaked to the bone, the cold rain leaving me feeling clammy.

I shiver, pulling my almost useless jacket tighter around myself.

[[Continue on your way.|Head into the center of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
毫無預警地，天空傾瀉下如注的暴雨，彷彿一道虛擬的洪流以重擊般的力量從天而降。

我試著翻起夾克領子抵擋最猛烈的雨勢，但毫無用處。幾秒之內，我便濕透至骨，冰冷的雨水讓我感到濕黏難受。

我打了個冷顫，將幾乎無用的夾克拉得更緊些。

[繼續你的路。]

passages.name: BluffMansion
passages.content_zh:
我的腳步將我帶往懸崖方向。我望向那座宅邸，一絲動靜將我的目光引向[IF $Day gte 5]被雨水打濕的[/IF]二樓窗戶，但在我看清之前，那吸引我注意的東西便已消失。[IF $MorichiDaughter gte 3]

不知道那是不是Azumi？我心想。[/IF]

有好幾秒鐘，我讓目光停留在那扇窗戶上，但[再無任何活動的跡象。]

passages.name: Lebron Exit.
passages.content:
"Whoa,"  I say, stepping back from them.  

The expression on both girls' faces fall in unison, realizing that I'm looking for an out.  

Glancing over my shoulder toward the door, I take a couple of steps toward it.

"Maybe another time,"  I say quickly.

"Another time,"  The two say together.  

Not wanting to tempt fate by staying any longer, I open the door and make my exit.

[[Leave.|Run down part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
「哇喔，」我說著，從她們面前退開一步。

兩個女孩臉上的表情同時垮了下來，意識到我在找藉口脫身。

我瞥了一眼肩後的門，朝它走了幾步。

「也許改天吧，」我迅速說道。

「改天，」兩人齊聲說。

不想再待下去試探命運，我打開門離開了。

[離開。]

passages.name: Main2
passages.content:
A single woman, wrapped tightly in a rain coat makes her way down the street, her pace hurried.  Walks only a few paces from where you are standing, only bothering to glance in your direction for the briefest moment before she's past. 

You half turn to watch her go, but at the end of the block she takes the corner and dissappears from sight between two buildings.

[[Continue on your way.|Head into the center of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
一名女子，緊緊裹著雨衣，沿街道匆匆前行。她從你站立處僅幾步之遙走過，只在你方向投來最短暫的一瞥便已走遠。

你半轉過身看著她離去，但在街區盡頭，她轉過拐角，消失在兩棟建築之間。

[繼續你的路。]

passages.name: SlumFuck1
passages.content:
Deciding to join the woman, I approach slowly.  I can feel my cock hardening at the sight of her.

As I close the distance between us, she licks her lips, her eyes firmly glued to my crotch.

By the time I reach her, she is reaching out for me, taking hold of my pants, unbuckling my belt and working to free my cock from its confines.

[[Push her to her knees.|SlumSuck1]]
or
[[Bend her over and fuck her.|SlumPussy1]]
passages.content_zh:
決定加入那名女子，我緩緩靠近。看著她，我能感覺到自己的陰莖正在硬挺。

當我縮短我們之間的距離時，她舔了舔嘴唇，目光緊緊盯著我的胯下。

當我走到她面前時，她已伸手向我，抓住我的褲子，解開皮帶，忙著將我的陰莖從束縛中釋放出來。

[將她推跪在地。]
或
[讓她彎腰並幹她。]

passages.name: BluffSting
passages.content: Reaching the top of the bluff, the heavy wind is blowing the rain straight at me, the heavy raindrops stinging my face with the force they are striking my skin.\n\nI hold one arm in front of my face in an effort to shield myself from the worst of the wind propelled rain.  But the the effort barely has any of the desired effect.  Grimacing, I lower my head to keep the stinging rain [[out of my eyes at the very least.|Bluff]]
passages.content_zh:
抵達懸崖頂端，強風將雨水直吹向我，沉重的雨滴以擊打皮膚的力道刺痛我的臉。

我舉起一隻手臂擋在臉前，試圖抵擋最猛烈的風驅雨勢。但這努力幾乎沒什麼效果。我苦笑著低下頭，至少讓刺痛的雨水[遠離我的眼睛。]

passages.name: TrailSquirl
passages.content:
My attention is drawn to a sound from the branches overhead.

When I look, I see a squirrel perched on a branch, watching me.  The squirrel makes angry sounds, its tail twitching with every noise it makes.<<if $Day gte 5>>

Somehow, against all odds, a single drop of rain makes its way through the heavy forest canpoy to strike me in the forehead.<</if>>

With a little smirk, I continue [[down the forest path.|Trail]]
passages.content_zh:
我的注意力被頭頂枝椏傳來的一陣聲響吸引。

抬頭望去，我看見一隻松鼠停在一根樹枝上，正注視著我。松鼠發出憤怒的叫聲，尾巴隨著每聲叫喚而抽動。[IF $Day gte 5]

不知怎地，儘管機率渺茫，一滴雨水竟穿過濃密的森林樹冠，打在我的額頭上。[/IF]

帶著一絲冷笑，我繼續[沿著森林小徑前行。]

passages.name: Ruins10
passages.content:
When a heavy raindrop strikes my head, I glance up toward the forest canopy high above, curious to see if there is a break in the canopy.

Instead my eyes are drawn to the slowly spiraling buildings to each side of me.  For several seconds I allow my eyes to linger on the smooth and glistening pillars raising up into the air, piercing the leafy shelter provided by the trees.

[[Continue.|Continue into the ruins.]]
passages.content_zh:
當一滴沉重的雨點打中我的頭時，我抬頭望向高處的森林樹冠，好奇是否樹冠有破口。

然而，我的目光卻被兩側緩緩螺旋上升的建築所吸引。有好幾秒鐘，我任由目光流連在那些光滑閃亮、直插天際、刺穿樹木提供的葉狀遮蔽的柱子上。

[繼續。]

passages.name: ChurchRat
passages.content:
Closing the Churches door behind myself, the sound of movement draws my attention further into the Church.

As my eyes adjust to the dark interior of the Church, I notice a small, dark shape along the far wall, the dim light from outside causing its eyes to glitter in the shadows.  //Rat,//  I think.

A second later, the rat scurries along the wall, [[vanishing into a gap in the wall.|stepping carefully inside.]]
passages.content_zh:
隨手關上教堂的門，一陣移動的聲響將我的注意力引向教堂更深處。

當我的眼睛適應教堂昏暗的內部時，我注意到遠處牆邊有個小小的、深色的形體，室外微弱的光線使其眼睛在陰影中閃爍。是老鼠，我想。

下一秒，那隻老鼠沿著牆壁急竄，[消失在牆壁的一道縫隙中。]

passages.name: SlumTorrent
passages.content:
With no warning, the sky opens up a torrent of water, a virtual deluge of water that falls from the sky with pummeling force.  

I try to flip up the collar of my jacket to ward off the worst of it, but its of no use.  Within seconds, I'm soaked to the bone, the cold rain leaving me feeling clammy.

I shiver, pulling my almost useless jacket tighter around myself.

[[Continue on my way.|Run down part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
毫無預警地，天空傾瀉下如注的暴雨，彷彿一道虛擬的洪流以重擊般的力量從天而降。

我試著翻起夾克領子抵擋最猛烈的雨勢，但毫無用處。幾秒之內，我便濕透至骨，冰冷的雨水讓我感到濕黏難受。

我打了個冷顫，將幾乎無用的夾克拉得更緊些。

[繼續我的路。]

passages.name: RichTorrent
passages.content:
With no warning, the sky opens up a torrent of water, a virtual deluge of water that falls from the sky with pummeling force.  

I try to flip up the collar of my jacket to ward off the worst of it, but its of no use.  Within seconds, I'm soaked to the bone, the cold rain leaving me feeling clammy.

I shiver, pulling my almost useless jacket tighter around myself.

[[Continue on your way.|Nice part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
毫無預警地，天空驟然傾瀉下狂暴的雨瀑，彷彿天河決堤，雨水以重擊之勢從天而降。

我試著翻起外套衣領抵擋最猛烈的雨勢，但毫無用處。不出幾秒，我便渾身濕透，冰冷的雨水讓我感到黏膩難受。

我打了個冷顫，將幾乎無用的外套更緊地裹在身上。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: BluffAir
passages.content: <<if $Day gte 5>>Rain falls heavily, making the plants look like they are trying to melt into the ground.  //How can anything so sickly not die?//\n\nTaking a deep breath, I feel the cool <<else>>A soft breeze rustles the sickly brown grass at the top of the bluff, bringing with it a lung full of salty ocean air.  I half close my eyes as I take a deep breath, savoring the cool <</if>>[[air filling my lungs.|Bluff]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]暴雨猛烈落下，讓植物看起來像是要融化進地裡。如此病態的東西怎麼還不死去？

我深吸一口氣，感受涼爽的[ELSE]一陣微風吹拂懸崖頂上病懨懨的褐草，帶來滿肺鹹澀的海空氣。我半閉著眼深吸一口氣，享受那沁涼的[/IF][空氣充滿我的肺葉。]

passages.name: BarRainRoof
passages.content:
I can hear the rain coming down again, harder than usual this time.  From above, I can hear the roar of large drops of rain pummeling the roof of the building.

Glancing out a window at the front of the Barmaid's Daughter, I can see the rain, falling so hard that I can barely see out the window.

I can't help but be a little thankful to not be outside right now.

[[Continue on my way.|The Barmaids Daughter]]
passages.content_zh:
我又聽見雨聲落下，這次比往常更猛烈。頭頂傳來大顆雨點重擊建築屋頂的轟鳴。

從「酒保的女兒」前方的窗戶瞥去，只見雨勢滂沱，幾乎看不清窗外景象。

此刻我不禁有些慶幸自己不在室外。

[繼續我的路程。]

passages.name: ParkDamp
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>I can see a flash of light as lightning arcs from cloud to cloud in the distance.  A moment later, I hear a soft rumble of thunder reach me.

[[Continue through the rain.|overgrown park]]  <<else>>The moisture in the air is so thick that it makes the air actually smell //wet//.  

I take a deep breath, filling my lungs with the cool, damp air.

[[Continue on your way.|overgrown park]]<</if>>
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]我看見一道閃光劃過，遠處雲層間電弧躍動。片刻後，一聲低沉的雷鳴傳入耳中。

[冒雨前進。][ELSE]空氣中的濕氣濃重得讓空氣聞起來彷彿都是濕的。

我深吸一口氣，讓冰涼潮濕的空氣充滿肺葉。

[繼續前行。][/IF]

passages.name: Force1
passages.content:
Taking a step back, I kick out with all the force I can muster, striking the door solidly just beneath the doorknob.  

In a shower of splintered wood and flakes of old paint, the door flies inward, slamming against the wall inside and creaking half way closed again as it rebounds.

With the door open, I peer into the shadowy interior for several seconds before <<churchlink "stepping carefully inside.">>
passages.content_zh:
我後退一步，用盡全力踹出，結實地踢中門板下方、門把正下方的位置。

隨著木屑與舊漆碎片如雨迸散，門板猛然向內飛開，重重撞上內牆，又在反彈時吱呀作響地半掩回去。

門既已開，我凝視陰暗的室內數秒，然後

passages.name: Torrent Park
passages.content:
With no warning, the sky opens up a torrent of water, a virtual deluge of water that falls from the sky with pummeling force.  

I try to flip up the collar of my jacket to ward off the worst of it, but its of no use.  Within seconds, I'm soaked to the bone, the cold rain leaving me feeling clammy.

I shiver, pulling my almost useless jacket tighter around myself.

[[Continue on your way.|overgrown park]]
passages.content_zh:
毫無預警地，天空驟然傾瀉下狂暴的雨瀑，彷彿天河決堤，雨水以重擊之勢從天而降。

我試著翻起外套衣領抵擋最猛烈的雨勢，但毫無用處。不出幾秒，我便渾身濕透，冰冷的雨水讓我感到黏膩難受。

我打了個冷顫，將幾乎無用的外套更緊地裹在身上。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: DockTorrent
passages.content:
With no warning, the sky opens up a torrent of water, a virtual deluge of water that falls from the sky with pummeling force.  

I try to flip up the collar of my jacket to ward off the worst of it, but its of no use.  Within seconds, I'm soaked to the bone, the cold rain leaving me feeling clammy.

I shiver, pulling my almost useless jacket tighter around myself.

[[Continue on your way.|the waterfront]]
passages.content_zh:
毫無預警地，天空驟然傾瀉下狂暴的雨瀑，彷彿天河決堤，雨水以重擊之勢從天而降。

我試著翻起外套衣領抵擋最猛烈的雨勢，但毫無用處。不出幾秒，我便渾身濕透，冰冷的雨水讓我感到黏膩難受。

我打了個冷顫，將幾乎無用的外套更緊地裹在身上。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: Rich Puddle
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>Heavy rain seems to fall in waves, the wind blowing so hard that every raindrop that strikes my exposed face stings a little.

I do my best to ignore the miserable weather.  <<else>>My footsteps echo softly between the nearby buildings as I walk down the street.<</if>>  

Absently, I step around a puddle that looks deeper than most.

[[Continue on your way.|Head into the center of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]暴雨彷彿一波波襲來，風勢猛烈，每一滴打在我裸露臉龐的雨點都帶著刺痛。

我盡力忽略這糟糕的天氣。[ELSE]我沿街行走，腳步聲在附近建築間輕輕迴盪。[/IF]

我心不在焉地繞過一個看起來比平常更深的水窪。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: RichSlowRain
passages.content:
Slow and steady, the rain continues to fall as if the clouds hold an endless supply of moisture.  

As I walk, I can see where the rain hits the puddles, creating little rings in the water before being swallowed by the ripple created by the next drop to strike the water.

I absently pull my jacket tighter around myself to ward off the worst of the weather.

[[Continue on your way.|Nice part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
雨緩慢而持續地下著，彷彿雲層蘊藏著無盡的水氣。

行走時，我看見雨點擊中水窪，在水面形成一圈圈小圓環，隨即被下一滴落水激起的漣漪吞沒。

我下意識將外套拉得更緊，以抵擋最惡劣的天氣。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: Ruins1
passages.content:
All around me the buildings of the ruins jut high into the sky, piercing the canopy overhead.  What light makes it through the foliage above reflects off of the strange material, creating a faint prism effect that fills the air with color.  //Beautiful,//  I allow myself to think of the place.  

But even with that thought in my mind, my unease does not lessen.

[[Continue.|Continue into the ruins.]]
passages.content_zh:
環繞四周的遺跡建築高聳入天，刺穿頭頂的樹冠。勉強穿透上方葉隙的光線，在奇異材質上反射，產生微弱的稜鏡效應，讓空氣中漾滿色彩。真美——我允許自己這麼形容此地。

但即便心存此念，我的不安卻未減分毫。

[繼續。]

passages.name: TanyaEvents
Trail4
passages.content:
The sound of branches moving is momentarily louder than the falling rain.  I look up quickly, shielding my eyes from the water making its way through the canopy above.  

Several branches are moving, clearly having been disterbed by something overhead, but no matter how hard I look, I am unable to find the source.  

Uneasy, and feeling like something is watching me, [[I begin to walk again.|Trail]]
passages.content_zh:
樹枝搖曳聲一時壓過了雨聲。我迅速抬頭，遮擋從上方樹冠滴落的水珠。

好幾根樹枝正在晃動，顯然被上方的某物驚擾，但無論我如何凝視，都找不到源頭。

心神不寧，且感覺有東西正注視著我，[我再度邁步前行。]

passages.name: BluffStill
passages.content:
The heavy breeze on the bluff stops suddenly<<if $Day gte 5>> leaving behind only the heavy rain<</if>>.  I pause, my eyes searching my surroundings, the sudden still in the air making the hair on the back of my neck stand on end.

Slowly, a light breeze begins again, building over several seconds until its the same heavy breeze as before the still.

Uneasy, [[I start to walk again.|Bluff]]
passages.content_zh:
懸崖上的強風驟然止息[IF $Day gte 5]，只餘下滂沱雨聲[/IF]。我停下腳步，雙眼掃視周遭——空氣突然的凝滯讓我頸後寒毛直豎。

慢慢地，微風再度颳起，數秒內逐漸增強，直至恢復靜止前那般強勁的風勢。

懷著不安，[我重新開始行走。]

passages.name: DockDamp
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>A flash of light, followed a bare second later by the roar of thunder sounds out over the waters.  By the time I look out over the ocean, I see nothing but falling rain.<<else>>The moisture in the air is so thick that it makes the air actually smell //wet//.  

I take a deep breath, filling my lungs with the cool, damp air.<<endif>>

[[Continue on your way.|the waterfront]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]一道閃光劃過，緊接著雷鳴的轟隆聲在水面上炸開。當我望向海面時，眼前只剩下傾盆而下的雨幕。[ELSE]空氣中的濕氣濃重得讓空氣聞起來都帶著一股潮味。

我深深吸了一口氣，讓清涼潮濕的空氣充滿肺部。[/IF]

[繼續前進。]

passages.name: Tavern3
passages.content:
"Ohhhhhh shit,"  A man sitting at a nearby table groans.  His breath is ragged and I can see him tense in his seat.  

I look at him, unsure of what exactly is happening until I notice a young woman kneeling under his table, her head in his lap.

My eyebrows rise in surprise and after letting my gaze linger for another second, I look away.

[[Continue on my way.|The Barmaids Daughter]]
passages.content_zh:
「喔──該死，」坐在附近桌旁的一名男子呻吟道。他的呼吸粗重，我能看見他在座位上繃緊了身子。

我看向他，起初不確定究竟發生了什麼，直到我注意到一名年輕女子跪在他的桌下，頭埋在他的大腿間。

我驚訝地挑起眉毛，讓視線多停留了一秒後，便移開了目光。

[繼續走我的路。]

passages.name: Slum1
passages.content:
Watching the houses along the street, I see a woman looking my direction from a rain streaked window.  

I try to give her a little wave, but she takes a half step to the side in response.  After which, I can barely see her face at the edge of the window.  

Not sure what to think of the woman's behavior, [[I shrug the encounter off and continue down the street.|Run down part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
沿著街道觀察兩旁的房屋，我看見一個女人從雨水斑駁的窗戶朝我的方向望來。

我試著對她輕輕揮了揮手，但她卻往側邊退了半步作為回應。之後，我只能勉強在窗戶邊緣瞥見她的臉。

不確定該如何理解這女人的舉動，[我聳聳肩，將這次偶遇拋諸腦後，繼續沿街走下去。]

passages.name: DeadSquirl
passages.content:
The squelching of my boots is punctuated by the sound of raindrops dripping lazily between the leaves overhead.  

Barely visible in the bushes beside the trail, I see a small snare, a dead squirrel handing from a noose, its fur matted with rain.  //Wonder how long its been hanging in that trap?// I think idly.

Turning my attention back to the trail, [[I continue on my way.|Trail]]
passages.content_zh:
我靴子踩在泥濘中的噗哧聲，與雨水從頭頂樹葉間懶洋洋滴落的聲響交錯。

在小徑旁的灌木叢中，勉強可見一個小型套索，一隻死去的松鼠吊在繩圈裡，皮毛被雨水浸濕打結。不知道它在這個陷阱裡吊了多久？我漫不經心地想著。

將注意力轉回小徑上，[我繼續前行。]

passages.name: Chill Wind
passages.content:
Stepping into the park, I feel a chill wind as if from nowhere wash over me.  

My skin breaks out in goosebumps like a rash and I involuntarily shiver and pull my long coat tighter around myself.<<if $Day gte 5>>

Somewhere in the distance, I can hear thunder rumble.  I shiver as I feel an icy drop of water slip down my back.<<endif>>

[[Continue on your way.|overgrown park]]
passages.content_zh:
一走進公園，我便感到一陣彷彿憑空出現的寒風襲遍全身。

我的皮膚瞬間起滿雞皮疙瘩，不由自主地打了個冷顫，將身上的長外套拉得更緊。[IF $Day gte 5]

遠處某處傳來雷聲隆隆。當我感到一滴冰冷的水珠滑下背脊時，我又是一顫。[/IF]

[繼續前進。]

passages.name: Cave12
passages.content:
With fleshlight in hand, I make my way into the cave deep enough that I can barely see a hint of the light outside.  I stop, pausing to listen.

Somewhere in the distance, I can hear a sound, roughly every twelve seconds, "bloit!" that seems to echo through the enormous chamber.

I quickly conclude that the sound is that of dripping water.

[[Continue.|Enter the cave.]]
passages.content_zh:
手握著手電筒，我深入洞穴，直到幾乎看不見外頭一絲光線。我停下腳步，駐足聆聽。

遠處某處，我聽見一個聲音，大約每十二秒一次，「噗通！」彷彿在這巨大的洞室中迴盪。

我很快斷定那是水滴落的聲音。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Jimmy2
passages.content:
I begin my inspection by checking the doorknob and lock.  Seeing no weakness there I turn my attention to the door frame.

For several minutes, I search the door for any sign of weakness that I can exploit.  In spite of my best efforts, I see no sign of weakness from the door, or way to circumvent the lock.

Discouraged, [[I step back from the door.|little church]]
passages.content_zh:
我從檢查門把和門鎖開始進行探查。發現那裡沒有弱點後，我將注意力轉向門框。

有好幾分鐘的時間，我仔細搜尋門上任何可供利用的弱點跡象。儘管盡了最大努力，我仍看不出這扇門有任何弱點，也找不到任何繞過門鎖的方法。

感到氣餒，[我從門前退開。]

passages.name: Cave5
passages.content:
I can hear a sound from somewhere deeper in the shadows of the cave.  Not sure if its the sound of a rock falling, a shoe scuffing the ground, or something else.  I pause to listen.  

After more than a minute, the sound does not repeat itself.  When I start to move again, I'm considerably more watchful than I had been previously.

[[Continue.|Enter the cave.]]
passages.content_zh:
我聽見洞穴深處陰影中傳來某種聲響。不確定那是石頭滾落、鞋子摩擦地面，還是其他什麼聲音。我停下來聆聽。

超過一分鐘過去，那聲音沒有再次出現。當我重新開始移動時，我變得比先前警覺得多。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Curtains
passages.content:
A flicker of movement catches my eye nearby.  

Looking that direction, I see a window in one of the storefronts, the curtain pulled back slightly.  

For a split second, I think I can see someone watching me<<if $Day gte 5>> through the rain streaked glass<</if>> before the curtain falls back in place.

[[Continue on your way.|Head into the center of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
附近一絲晃動的動靜吸引了我的目光。

朝那個方向看去，我看見一間店面的窗戶，窗簾被微微拉開。

有那麼一瞬間，我以為自己看見有人在注視著我[IF $Day gte 5]，透過那雨水斑駁的玻璃[/IF]，隨後窗簾便落回原位。

[繼續前進。]

passages.name: Money Fix
Tavern1
passages.content:
A startled //eep!// comes from across the Barmaid's Daughter from where I am standing.  When I look towards the source, there is a serving girl, rubbing her bottom, but with an unmistakable smile on her face.  

She tries to cast a dirty look at the person who punched her backside, but it comes off as more playful.

[[Continue on my way.|The Barmaids Daughter]]
passages.content_zh:
一聲受驚的輕呼從「酒保的女兒」另一端傳來，離我站的地方有些距離。我望向聲音來源，看見一名女服務生正揉著臀部，但臉上卻帶著一抹無可否認的笑意。

她試圖對那個拍了她屁股的人投去一個責備的眼神，但那眼神看起來更像是打情罵俏。

[繼續走我的路。]

passages.name: TrailHeavyRain
passages.content: The forest canopy roars as heavy raindrops pummel the leaves over head. It only takes a few second before the heavy rain starts to make it to the ground, the leaves dipping to pour the rain to the ground in little streams of chilly water.\n\nPulling my jacket tighter around myself to ward off the worst of the downpour, [[I continue walking down the path.|Trail]]
passages.content_zh:
沉重的雨點擊打著頭頂的樹葉，讓整片森林樹冠發出轟鳴般的聲響。不過幾秒鐘，大雨便開始落到地面，樹葉低垂，將雨水匯成一道道冰涼的小溪傾瀉而下。

我將外套拉得更緊以抵擋最猛烈的雨勢，[繼續沿著小徑前行。]

passages.name: Skill Nerf
passages.content:
You should have just subtracted 1 point from all skills.

[[return|$return]]
<<set $PlayerBrawling -= 1>>
<<set $PlayerEttiquette -= 1>>
<<set $PlayerFirearms -= 1>>
<<set $PlayerIntimidation -= 1>>
<<set $PlayerInvestigation -= 1>>
<<set $PlayerOccult -= 1>>
<<set $PlayerPerception -= 1>>
<<set $PlayerSecurity -= 1>>
<<set $PlayerStreetwise -= 1>>

passages.name: SoggyBluff
passages.content: Walking towards the bluff, the soggy ground seems to pull at my boots.  A <<if $Day gte 5>>heavt and persistant<<else>>slow but steady<</if>> rain has the ground saturated, the runoff turning the trail into a small creek running down the hill.\n\nStepping to the side of the trail and resolving myself to walk up the hill [[through the long wet grass.|Bluff]]
passages.content_zh:
走向懸崖時，濕軟的地面彷彿在拉扯我的靴子。[IF $Day gte 5]一場沉重而持續的[ELSE]緩慢但穩定的[/IF]雨水已讓地面完全飽和，徑流將小徑變成了一條順著山坡而下的小溪。

我走到小徑旁側，決心[穿過那長長的濕草地]走上山坡。

passages.name: Skill Bonus
passages.content:
You should have just added 1 point to all skills.

[[return|$return]]

<<set $PlayerBrawling += 1>>
<<set $PlayerEttiquette += 1>>
<<set $PlayerFirearms += 1>>
<<set $PlayerIntimidation += 1>>
<<set $PlayerInvestigation += 1>>
<<set $PlayerOccult += 1>>
<<set $PlayerPerception += 1>>
<<set $PlayerSecurity += 1>>
<<set $PlayerStreetwise += 1>>

passages.name: CurtainsRich
passages.content:
A flicker of movement catches my eye nearby.  

Looking that direction, I see a large window in one of the houses, the curtain pulled back slightly.  

For a split second, I think I can see someone watching me <<if $Day gte 5>>through the rain slicked window <</if>>before the curtain falls back in place.

[[Continue on your way.|Nice part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
附近一絲晃動的動靜吸引了我的目光。

朝那個方向看去，我看見其中一棟房子有一扇大窗戶，窗簾被微微拉開。

有那麼一瞬間，我以為自己看見有人在注視著我[IF $Day gte 5]，透過那雨水淋濕的窗戶[/IF]，隨後窗簾便落回原位。

[繼續前進。]

passages.name: nexttavern
passages.content:
As I regain my composure, the noise around me begins to die down as people return to their hushed conversations and their drinks.

I can't help but notice the way that people seem to avoid looking my way as I begin to move through the Barmaid's Daughter again.

[[Continue.|The Barmaids Daughter]]<<if $CharHP lte 1>><<set $CharHP = 1>><<endif>>
passages.content_zh:
當我恢復鎮定時，周遭的喧鬧聲逐漸平息，人們又回到低聲交談與飲酒之中。

我忍不住注意到，當我再次穿行於「酒保的女兒」時，人們似乎都刻意避開我的視線。

[繼續。][IF $CharHP lte 1][/IF]

passages.name: Rain Roof Shop
passages.content:
I can hear the rain coming down again, harder than usual this time.  From the roof, I can hear the roar of large drops of rain pummeling the roof of the building.

Glancing out a shop's window, I can see the rain, falling so hard that I can barely see through it.

I can't help but be a little [[thankful to not be outside right now.|General Store]]
passages.content_zh:
我又聽見雨聲落下，這次比往常更猛烈。從屋頂傳來大雨點重擊建築屋頂的轟鳴。

瞥向商店窗外，只見雨勢滂沱，幾乎看不清外頭景象。

我不禁暗自[慶幸此刻不在室外。]

passages.name: BoatIn
passages.content:
Approaching the waterfront, I see several sailors working around the fishing boat at the dock.  

I'm a little surprised to see more ladies than men working around the boat as they unload their catch<<if $Day gte 5>>, especially in such hard rain<</if>>.

I pause for only a moment to watch the sailors.

[[Continue on your way.|the waterfront]]
passages.content_zh:
走近水濱，我看見幾名水手在碼頭的漁船旁忙碌。

有點意外的是，圍繞船隻卸載漁獲的人員中，女性竟比男性還多[IF $Day gte 5]，尤其是在如此暴雨中[/IF]。

我駐足片刻，望著那些水手。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: Rain Room
passages.content:
I can hear the rain coming down again, harder than usual this time.  From the roof, I can hear the roar of large drops of rain pummeling the roof of the building.

Glancing out a window, I can see the rain, falling so hard that I can barely see out the window.

I can't help but be a little [[thankful to not be outside right now.|Your room.]]
passages.content_zh:
我又聽見雨聲落下，這次比往常更猛烈。從屋頂傳來大雨點重擊建築屋頂的轟鳴。

瞥向窗外，只見雨勢滂沱，幾乎看不清窗外景象。

我不禁暗自[慶幸此刻不在室外。]

passages.name: TrailMud
passages.content:
Walking down the forest path, the thick mud that makes up the trail clings to my boots, making my movements sluggish and my boots feel heavy.

Grimacing, I pause long enough to kick the worst of the mud loose of my boots, then start walking again.  I've barely taken half a dozen steps before my boots are [[caked with mud once more.|Trail]]
passages.content_zh:
走在森林小徑上，濃厚的泥濘緊黏著我的靴子，使步伐遲滯、雙足沉重。

我皺著臉停下，用力踢掉靴上最厚重的泥塊，然後再度前行。才踏出不到六步，靴子又[裹滿了泥濘。]

passages.name: Azumi Escape
passages.content: When I close the door behind myself, I double check that its locked before moving quietly through the halls.  Every step of the way I  worry that I will be seen, but somehow I make it to the back door without being spotted.  \n\nAt the back door, I lock it quickly behind myself, my thoughts lingering on Azumi as [[I make my escape.|Bluff]]
passages.content_zh:
關上身後的門，我反覆確認門已上鎖，才悄聲穿過走廊。每一步都提心吊膽，生怕被人發現，但不知怎地，我竟順利抵達後門而未遭察覺。

在後門處，我迅速落鎖，思緒仍縈繞在Azumi身上，[同時抽身逃離。]

passages.name: TrailDrip
passages.content: As I make my way down the path, I can hear the rain striking the leaves overhead.  For several minutes, I can hear the rain, dripping through the canopy on its way towards the ground, before the first drops start to strike ground level.\n\nI pull my jacket tighter around myself in an attempt to ward off the [[worst of the rain.|Trail]]
passages.content_zh:
沿小徑前行時，我聽見雨滴敲打頭頂葉片的聲響。有好幾分鐘，雨水淅瀝穿過樹冠層滴落，而後才開始擊打地面。

我將外套拉得更緊，試圖[抵擋最強的雨勢。]

passages.name: Town Puddle
passages.content:
<<if $Day gte 5>>I can barely hear the sound of my own footsteps over the heavy rain as I walk down the street.<<else>>My footsteps echo softly between the nearby buildings as I walk down the street.<</if>>

Absently, I step around a puddle that looks deeper than most.

[[Continue on your way.|Head into the center of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
[IF $Day gte 5]走在街上，滂沱雨聲幾乎淹沒了我的腳步聲。[ELSE]走在街上，腳步聲在附近建築間輕輕迴盪。[/IF]

我心不在焉地繞過一處看似特別深的水窪。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: Tavern2
passages.content: A cheer goes up from somewhere else in the tavern.  By the time I find the source, I can see several sailors grinning as a serving girl pulls her top back in place to cover her exposed bosom.  The grin on her face suggests that whatever happened, she was a willing participant.\n\n[[Continue on my way.|The Barmaids Daughter]]
passages.content_zh:
酒館某處響起一陣歡呼。我循聲望去，看見幾名水手咧嘴笑著，一名女侍正將上衣拉回原位，遮住裸露的胸脯。她臉上的笑意表明，無論發生什麼，她都是心甘情願參與的。

[繼續我的路。]

passages.name: Window Rivulets Room
passages.content: Glancing towards a window, I can see raindrops hitting the glass.  The drops lazily run down the glass like little rivers.  As drops meet, their decent becomes faster until the drops of rain seem to race towards the bottom.\n\nPulling my attention away from the window, [[I continue about my business.|Your room.]]
passages.content_zh:
瞥向窗戶，我看見雨點打在玻璃上。水珠如細小河川般慵懶地滑下玻璃。當雨滴匯合，下滑速度便加快，彷彿競相奔向窗底。

我將注意力從窗戶移開，[繼續處理自己的事。]

passages.name: CurtainsSlum
passages.content:
A flicker of movement catches my eye nearby.  

Looking that direction, I see a small window in one of the houses, the curtain pulled back slightly.  

For a split second, I think I can see someone watching me before the curtain falls back in place.

[[Continue on your way.|Run down part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
近處一道晃動的影子抓住了我的目光。

朝那方向望去，我看見其中一棟房屋有扇小窗，窗簾被微微拉開。

有那麼一瞬間，我以為看見有人在窺視我，隨後窗簾便恢復了原狀。

[繼續前行。]

passages.name: Church2
passages.content:
Walking through the old church, I step on a board that makes an alarmingly loud creak.  The sound echoing through the rafters overhead in the otherwise silent place.

Stopping, I take a moment to inspect the warped board on the floor, but see nothing unusual.

[[Continue.|stepping carefully inside.]]
passages.content_zh:
走過老教堂時，我踩上一塊木板，發出驚人的嘎吱巨響。在這片寂靜中，回聲盪過頭頂的椽架。

我停下腳步，仔細檢查地板上那塊彎曲的木板，但未見異狀。

[繼續。]

passages.name: TavernSuck1
passages.content:
Scooting myself up to the table does me little good.  With a playful smile, she slips under the table.  Its only a moment before I feel her hands touch my thighs, drifting towards my crotch.

[[Let her continue.|TavernSuck1a]]
or
Get up and try to [[disappear into the crowd.|The Barmaids Daughter]]
passages.content_zh:
我挪近桌邊也無濟於事。她帶著頑皮的笑容滑入桌底。不過片刻，我便感覺她的手觸上我的大腿，緩緩移向胯下。

[任由她繼續。]
或
起身試圖[隱入人群。]

passages.name: ChurchRain
passages.content: I make it inside the Church just in time.  I've barely cleared the threshold before the sky looses a torrent of rain, as if every Angel in Heaven burst into tears at that very moment.  Above my head, the heavy rain sounds like thunder against the [[old roof of the Church.|stepping carefully inside.]]
passages.content_zh: 我及時趕進教堂。剛跨過門檻，天空便傾瀉下暴雨，彷彿天堂所有天使都在那一瞬間潸然淚下。頭頂上，暴雨擊打[教堂老舊屋頂]的聲音猶如雷鳴。

passages.name: TrailHat
passages.content: Ahead of me on the path, I see someone walking.  The figure is wearing a long, dull brown jacket and a wide brimmed hat.  Whoever it is, doesn't seem to notice me.\n\nQuietly, I try to start closing the distance between us, but I barely take a dozen steps before [[I lose sight on the figure.|Trail]]
passages.content_zh:
前方小徑上有個人影正在行走。那人穿著暗褐色的長外套，戴著寬邊帽。無論是誰，似乎都沒注意到我。

我悄然試圖縮短我們之間的距離，但才走了十幾步，[便失去了那人的蹤影。]

passages.name: whatever that's supposed to mean.
passages.content:
I shake my head in a hopeless attempt to shake the images from my mind, my eyes meeting Peters'.

I can tell from the look in his eyes, he knows he has me, hook line and sinker.

I take a few steps towards him.  This time, when he offers me the envelope, [[I take it.]]<<set $Letter to "Played">>
passages.content_zh:
我絕望地搖搖頭，試圖將腦海中的影像甩開，目光與 Peters 對上。

從他的眼神我能看出，他知道我已經徹底上鉤了。

我朝他走了幾步。這一次，當他遞出那個信封時，[我接了過來。]

passages.name: New Game Plus.
passages.content:
So, you have delved into the darkest depths of our tale, and still wish to see more?  

My, aren't you a brave one.

We have but one little question before we begin our tale anew:

[[Do you wish to play the game with enhanced stats?]]

or

[[Do you long for a Happy Ending?]]
passages.content_zh:
所以，你已深入我們故事最黑暗的深淵，卻仍想看到更多？

哎呀，你還真是個勇敢的傢伙。

在我們重新開始故事之前，我們只有一個小問題：

[你希望以增強後的屬性進行遊戲嗎？]

或是

[你渴望一個快樂結局嗎？]

passages.name: JackobsonLeave
passages.content:
Having nothing more to ask at this time, I politely excuse myself.  

Mr Jackobson mumbles something resembling a crude goodbye in my wake.
<<if $JackobsonHouse gte 2>><<else>><<set $JackobsonHouse +=1>><</if>><<set $JackobsonBluff to 1>>
<<slumlink "Exit Mr Jackobson's home.">>
passages.content_zh:
目前沒有更多問題要問，我禮貌地告退。

Jackobson 先生在我身後咕噥了幾句，像是某種粗魯的道別。
[IF $JackobsonHouse gte 2][ELSE][/IF]

passages.name: Boat
passages.content:
Nearing the waterfront, I look out over the water<<if $Day gte 5>> through the rain<<endif>>.

Just past the cove, I see a fishing boat sailing past Wanton Cove, seagulls cawing and flying around the ship as it glides through the water.

[[Continue on your way.|the waterfront]]
passages.content_zh:
靠近水邊，我望向水面[IF $Day gte 5]，透過雨幕[/IF]。

就在海灣過去一點，我看到一艘漁船正駛過萬頓灣，海鷗鳴叫著，圍繞著滑過水面的船隻飛翔。

[繼續你的路。]

passages.name: Ruins13
passages.content: I take a deep breath of the cool wet air, pausing as I do so.  While I listen, I can hear a soft sound, like a  hushed whisper.  It takes me a few moments to realize that I'm hearing the rain hitting the forest canopy far above my head.\n\n[[Continue.|Continue into the ruins.]]
passages.content_zh:
我深深吸了一口涼爽潮濕的空氣，同時停下腳步。聆聽之際，我能聽到一種柔和的聲音，像是壓低的耳語。過了一會兒我才意識到，那是我頭頂上方遠處雨水打在森林樹冠上的聲音。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Menu Return
StoryCaption
passages.content:
<<if $CharacterConfirmed is "Confirmed">>
Day: <<print $Day>>
[[Character Details|You]]
[[Current Tasks]]
[[Case Notes]]
[[Items]]
Madness: <<print $Madness>>
Taint: <<print $Taint>>
Mutation: <<print $Mutation>>
Depravity: <<print $Depravity>>

<<endif>>

passages.name: Ignore the sound and continue down the trail.
passages.content_zh:
聽起來像是私密的時刻，我心想，只短暫地好奇誰會在這片不祥的樹林裡進行肉體交歡。

當我的腳步聲帶著我遠離那聲音時，我試著將思緒重新聚焦到手頭的任務上。

[繼續。]

passages.name: VickEvents
Cave6
passages.content:
A soft sound comes from somewhere far overhead.  Looking up, I can see movement among the shadows that shroud the celing of the cave.

Focusing, it takes me a moment to realize that what I'm seeing is bats hanging above me.

[[Continue.|Enter the cave.]]
passages.content_zh:
一陣輕柔的聲音從頭頂上方的某處傳來。抬頭望去，我能看到籠罩洞穴頂部的陰影中有東西在動。

集中精神，我花了一點時間才意識到我看到的是倒掛在我上方的蝙蝠。

[繼續。]

passages.name: TavernOrgyExit
passages.content: My eyes linger on the scene for another moment, then I quickly withdraw from the situation before I can become part of it.  I am far more aroused than I care to admit as I move away from the gathered group.\n\n[[Continue on my way.|The Barmaids Daughter]]
passages.content_zh:
我的目光在那場景上又多停留了片刻，然後迅速抽身離開，以免自己也成為其中一員。當我從聚集的人群旁走開時，內心的悸動遠比我想承認的還要強烈。

[繼續我的路。]

passages.name: Shop Rivulets
passages.content: Glancing towards the shop window, I can see raindrops hitting the glass.  The drops lazily run down the glass like little rivers.  As drops meet, their decent becomes faster until the drops of rain seem to race [[towards the bottom.|General Store]]
passages.content_zh: 瞥向商店櫥窗，我能看到雨滴打在玻璃上。水滴像小溪般慵懶地沿著玻璃流下。當水滴匯合，它們的下落變得更快，直到雨滴彷彿在競相[奔向底部。]

passages.name: Cave1
passages.content:
The cave moans softly, the wind passing through it making it sound like a living thing.<<if $Day gte 5>>  

Behind me, I can hear the sound of heavy rain falling against the forest canopy outside the cave.<</if>>

[[Continue.|Enter the cave.]]
passages.content_zh:
洞穴輕柔地呻吟著，風穿過其中，讓它聽起來像個活物。[IF $Day gte 5]

在我身後，我能聽到洞外森林樹冠上大雨傾盆的聲音。[/IF]

[繼續。]

passages.name: Random Church
Random Town
DockPuddle
passages.content:
My footsteps echo softly between the nearby buildings<<if $Day gte 5>> over the sound of the rain<</if>> as I walk down the street.  

Absently, I step around a puddle that looks deeper than most.

[[Continue on your way.|the waterfront]]
passages.content_zh:
我的腳步聲在附近的建築物間輕柔迴盪[IF $Day gte 5]，蓋過了雨聲[/IF]，當我沿街行走時。

心不在焉地，我繞過一個看起來比大多數都深的水窪。

[繼續你的路。]

passages.name: Random Ruins
Random Tavern
Random Slum
Random Rich
Try to ignore what is happening and continue about your business.
passages.content: My  eyes linger on the scene for several more seconds before I am able to tear them away.  I make a conscious effort to look anywhere by at the group as I continue about my business.\n\n[[Continue on my way.|The Barmaids Daughter]]
passages.content_zh:
我的目光又在那場景上停留了好幾秒，才終於能強迫自己移開視線。我刻意努力看向任何地方，除了那群人，同時繼續做我的事。

[繼續我的路。]

passages.name: Random Docks
Random Park
Random Cave
Random Shop
Cave8
passages.content_zh:
洞穴內空氣的凝滯有點令人不安，尤其是考慮到其中一端對外界是如此開放。

這裡似乎應該有微風或什麼的才對。

[繼續。]

passages.name: BookEnd
passages.content:
Looking at the female abomonation laying at my feet, I idly wonder why she wanted the book so badly, //Guess there's no asking her about it now.//

Taking a deep breath, I let it out in a heavy sigh.

[[Continue.|Bluff]]
passages.content_zh:
看著躺在我腳下的女性異形，我漫不經心地想著她為何如此迫切地想要這本書，猜想現在是無法問她了。

深吸一口氣，我重重地嘆了出來。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Radom Room
Random Bluff
Random Trail
Trail2
passages.content:
As I make my way down the muddy forest trail, my clothes feel heavy from the moisture and clammy against my skin.

Doing my best to ignore the worst of the chill, I pick up my pace a little.

[[Continue.|Trail]]
passages.content_zh:
當我走在泥濘的森林小徑上時，我的衣服因濕氣而感覺沉重，緊貼著皮膚，黏膩不堪。

我盡力忽略最難受的寒意，稍稍加快了腳步。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Cave3
passages.content: Stepping into the big cave, I get the uncomfortable feeling that something is watching me.  I take a couple of minutes to look around, but I don't see the source of my unease.\n\n[[Continue.|Enter the cave.]]
passages.content_zh:
踏入這個大洞穴，我有種不舒服的感覺，好像有什麼東西在注視著我。我花了幾分鐘環顧四周，但沒有找到不安的源頭。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Shop2
passages.content: Closing the door behind myself, a particularly powerful gust of wind buffers the building.  The windows rattle softly, and a creak goes through the heavy rafters overhead.\n\n[[Continue.|General Store]]
passages.content_zh:
關上身後的門，一陣特別強勁的狂風衝擊著建築物。窗戶輕輕作響，頭頂沉重的屋樑傳來一聲吱嘎聲。

[繼續。]

passages.name: Slum Puddle
passages.content:
My footsteps echo softly between the nearby buildings as I walk down the street.  

Absently, I step around a puddle that looks deeper than most.

[[Continue on your way.|Run down part of town.]]
passages.content_zh:
我的腳步聲在附近的建築物間輕柔迴盪，當我沿街行走時。

心不在焉地，我繞過一個看起來比大多數都深的水窪。

[繼續你的路。]

passages.name: BluffLightRain
passages.content: The <<if $Day gte 5>>heavy<<else>>light<</if>> rain makes my <<if $Day gte 5>>soaked<<else>>damp<</if>> clothes heavy and chilled.  I fight back a shiver as I near the [[top of the bluff.|Bluff]]
passages.content_zh: 這[IF $Day gte 5]滂沱大雨[ELSE]細雨[/IF]讓我[IF $Day gte 5]濕透的[ELSE]潮濕的[/IF]衣服變得沉重而冰冷。我強忍住一陣顫抖，接近[懸崖頂端。]

passages.name: Virgin
passages.content:
Virgin status restored!  Never defiled by a man or beast!  Just ignore all those vivid, but obviously false, memories!

[[return|$return]]
<<set $Cherry = "True">>

passages.name: Remove Virginity
passages.content:
Don't know how you lost it for sure, but at least you don't have to worry about that pesky hymen! 

[[return|$return]]
<<set $Cherry = "False">>

passages.name: Cave4
passages.content: Entering the cave, every little stone beneath my boot seems to echo back at me from the enormous space around me.\n\n[[Continue.|Enter the cave.]]
passages.content_zh:
進入洞穴，靴子下的每一顆小石頭似乎都在周圍巨大的空間中向我迴響。

[繼續。]

passages.name: stats table stylesheet
Cave2
passages.content: As I move into the cave, the shadows seem to dance and move in ways that puts my nerves on edge.  \n\n[[Continue.|Enter the cave.]]
passages.content_zh:
當我往洞穴深處移動時，陰影彷彿在舞動搖曳，那種詭異的律動令我神經緊繃。

[繼續。]
